name: Cody Pruitt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

$0.05, Peter.

That’s how much it costs for our campaign to reach out to 1 voter in
Kentucky.

As the Organizing Director for this campaign, this number has been on the
top of my mind. Early and sustained voter outreach is going to be critical
so we can turnout newly engaged voters, raise up our voices this election,
and end Rand Paul’s dangerous and irresponsible lies.

So today I’m reaching out with an important request:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14067?refcode=em20211220-1353&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1353%2E346206%2ECV4LOb ]Peter, can
you be a sponsor of Jefferson County?

We’ve got about 632781 registered voters there. And at a cost of
roughly $0.05 per voter, we’ll need to raise about $31,639 to
cover our budget and reach every voter in Jefferson County.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14067?refcode=em20211220-1353&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1353%2E346206%2ECV4LOb ]Contribute $5

For too long, there’s been this myth that Kentucky is a red state. But
it’s not. It’s an unorganized, disenfranchised, and exploited state.

It’s one of the only states in the country with Republican senators and a
Democratic governor. Where the number of people who don’t vote outnumber
those who do. And when you look at recent political trends all the numbers
show that the tides are turning: we have a real chance to elect bold
progressive leadership in Kentucky and make history this election.

Rand Paul knows this. So his plan is to divide us, distract us from the
common bonds we share, and discourage us from voting. We’re seeing that
right now every time Rand Paul goes on live TV to spread misinformation
about COVID and attack safety measures like mask mandates. He’d rather
spread another dangerous lie than focus on the issues our families face.

That’s why early and sustained voter outreach is going to be a critical
part of our strategy to win. We’re bringing our campaign’s message for a
new kind of politics that centers working families to every corner of
Kentucky, from the hood to the holler.

We’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to power this historic
people-powered movement in Kentucky. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14067?refcode=em20211220-1353&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1353%2E346206%2ECV4LOb ]The price of reaching one voter in
Kentucky is $0.05 — so if you chip in $15, we’ll be able to reach 300
Kentuckians who may have never heard of Charles Booker before!

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14067?refcode=em20211220-1353&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1353%2E346206%2ECV4LOb ]Contribute $5

Let’s do this,

Cody
Organizing Director

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211220-1353-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1353_346206_CV4LOb&akid=1353%2E346206%2ECV4LOb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1353%2E346206%2ECV4LOb

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

| Good evening,

We are less than two weeks away from our end-of-the-year fundraising deadline. Right now, we are working to reach our goal of $15,000 before the end of the year, and this deadline is critical.

Let me tell you why:

On January 1st, 2022, we are officially in the fight to take back the House and reestablish a strong Republican majority.

Our country needs this - we have suffered for a whole year under the disastrous policies of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi. They have opened our southern border, wasted trillions of your tax dollars, killed our energy independence, and driven costs up for you and your family.

**We have one shot to fire Nancy Pelosi and stop Joe Biden in his tracks before 2024; this November is our shot. **

Right now, we need to make sure that we have every resource needed to fight a strong and successful campaign that restores our nation.

[_**> >> We are in this fight together; can I count on you to rush $20.22 now to help set us up for victory in 2022? <<<**_](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=29babfd2e0&e=13f35c4add)

Best,
Chris Jacobs

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: infuriating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
I am not going to stop fighting for a better future.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39881235/321839936/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211220-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTI0ZWE1My1mNDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZCSzMHcNPbeMxf4w3ln22r13sOqLAUMhsHLhccH6C4c=)
---
Team,

Earlier this year, I met with parents in my district to talk about the expanded Child Tax Credit. So many of the parents spoke to me, full of emotion, not about school supplies or new shoes they could buy, but about something much bigger — about the importance of having extra money available so they could start saving for their kids, about being able to look to the future.

**That’s why it is so infuriating that Senator Joe Manchin has announced his opposition to the Build Back Better Act, citing its high price tag.** Senator Manchin is demonstrating his opposition to expanding the Child Tax Credit, creating universal pre-K, and reducing child care costs for most parents and has called for a “strategic pause” on the bill.

Parents, caregivers, and kids don’t need a strategic pause — they need progress. Twenty-one months into a pandemic that has upended caregiving, America’s kids and parents are at a breaking point. **Some may say that we can’t afford this, but the truth is we can’t afford not to invest in our children.**

If Democrats negotiate against ourselves and fail to produce real results for American families, they will have no reason to trust us with another term in office. We saw this happen in 2009, and it led to Democrats losing control of the House for eight years. We cannot afford to let it happen again — and I am not going to stop fighting for a better future.

[_**To show that I have support on this major issue, please consider chipping in $5 or whatever you can spare to my re-election campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39881236/321839937/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211220-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTI0ZWE1My1mNDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZCSzMHcNPbeMxf4w3ln22r13sOqLAUMhsHLhccH6C4c=)

Sara Jacobs

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Fauci Fails
body:
[****](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=930ae4bf18c94930a59335b453c26e65&_e=bzep4A3fLk5vxxmgBfRaqk3-53u4hpQBBepoL0LFmPZ4kuCOcr5vrRDyszQJYQHkB-kxpAYFCdPJ9aM450WNz57nX4iVUYZSpdJO62vFs1dJwHYVubXkjxMzx9B8EU4v2tkONeIt5hfyeo_YVy-pemcuKsgMXJefyVaUfOaneoIru7BNy7HqbbgR0UWhoB4LpYk23urLOzjgrF9oW2gJt66sX22xPZOaS1TJ0h5SCLkLkwLZF3I4geyxgSWnfaFngNBG_nqcWyNvKKSADRnqK6ZUpfWXtNhtjeKfUgbw3nM_Zg27zL5oibhQPIwrQSmofvxDYFFf7DWvMNcvQ4f8tbfXhBAYOwO_hPwmfwnm6_tM_H2J9lYi_pk2tw8vAVj4)
Friend,
Over a year ago, Fauci claimed that vaccines were our ticket to post-pandemic normalcy. But Fauci, lockdown Leftists, and their radical government bureaucrat friends are STILL seeking to implement sweeping mandates and considering MORE heavy-handed restrictions and lockdowns.
[**DONATE $25 NOW TO HELP ME FIGHT BACK **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=930ae4bf18c94930a59335b453c26e65&_e=bzep4A3fLk5vxxmgBfRaqk3-53u4hpQBBepoL0LFmPZ4kuCOcr5vrRDyszQJYQHkB-kxpAYFCdPJ9aM450WNz57nX4iVUYZSpdJO62vFs1dJwHYVubXkjxMzx9B8EU4v2tkONeIt5hfyeo_YVy-pemcuKsgMXJefyVaUfOaneoKEJxouYu27mj7t5RfblEwikDYHFMIhn3SGwfesnEx_GH1RgrXbThZxLMu5MuN4lYTFhBgwBh-WrBlydigwt8INoBwxzybhmhsGaJY9bGo96Znia83lhfSbVpeVeZV07u35GdwdR4IHPhoGEASIF7uEin_DmxQKToFo9QHIDAtukIa_IqIbMVyz-w0AbAtGaMvUq4jXgMLhaTY9jgsng78W)
Either Dr. Fauci was flat out wrong, just as he has been on virtually every other claim he's made during the pandemic, OR he has become so drunk with fame that he will do anything to keep the restrictions and mandates going.

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Proud of this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
This is how you know our campaign is powered by people.
#
We want to share a fact we’re proud of:
**So far, more than 95% of online donations to our campaign are $100 or less.**
That’s how you know this campaign is powered by people, not special interests. We wouldn’t have it any other way.
Beto just got back from visiting 18 towns and cities across Texas, and we can’t wait to get back on the road again and bring more people into this movement. Devoting so much time to meeting Texans where they live requires a lot of resources, but we believe our grassroots team will power us every step of the way, thanks to folks like you chipping in $5 or $20 at a time.
[What do you say? Will you chip in your first $3 to help make Beto the next Governor of Texas? You’ll join tens of thousands of grassroots donors who are doing their part to make this campaign run. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50558?refcode=ema20211220-167855&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=167855%2E444211%2E2z9BLq)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50558?refcode=ema20211220-167855&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=167855%2E444211%2E2z9BLq)**
Greg Abbott may have dark money groups and GOP mega-donors behind him, but he’ll never have what we’re building together: the biggest, boldest grassroots movement Texas has ever seen.
It’s going to take all of us if we’re serious about winning next year. So as we look ahead to the rallies, canvasses, meetings, travel, staffing, ads, voter outreach, and more that we’ll need to fund over the next eleven months, we’re respectfully asking: **[Can we count on you to chip in $3 or any amount that feels right today to show your support for Beto?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50558?refcode=ema20211220-167855&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=167855%2E444211%2E2z9BLq)**
Thank you for having Beto’s back.
—Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211220-167855-footer&t=22&refcode2=167855_444211_2z9BLq&akid=167855%2E444211%2E2z9BLq)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=167855%2E444211%2E2z9BLq)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=167855%2E444211%2E2z9BLq)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

My story is an example of what is possible to achieve here in Maryland.
And this campaign is about making sure that all Marylanders have the opportunities to pursue their own dreams, and that is only going to happen if we continue to keep moving our state in the right direction.
[**With your help, we can keep moving forward. **](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86i-2FQV5YOPuH0GDsJb-2FO7ExkBjXqRBrIOoMy6FNa1GOnQPk2e86ik6qA6xLoaFtaZTuGU8_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6twUL3IV-2FDJp2hZRA7x6eNnpNIPQy5vZr9VXUgOVuDpdHq93vD9B-2FSGXgJIv5bDYnV4aCeNudztT-2BLJbNMNDTzm4oseTBeAQkzxZkHx9iRVDHXNyAsSjJ8rhSMU8HJvNPgz0YRWlNFM3c2lMyVipfp6cUYQuJSSPNgmUvN2Ispkls89gp68z6avQsf4-2FZYdCRIFOOYbxwpczo9CMDXJf36qCjNnSK-2B4MoIFEg8XSE39qR7pgZ4iGFnh9FSxvXGwyvwxITNnUzKAhhSCNd1I3ueunXAOh-2B7XhE3p46GRxPJ-2FpiCV4O-2FSq2F3ibsKJgJBhckW-2FEimRqjnf-2F8PO5m6y8pnhrO4UxAD0TrwAqfoppZGjzdTsZr42UEc8Ct20v2wTm-2FHVqj38MVARlnwLaxEmHsqHggc-2FJbDQ0D5qXOVN9V-2BThYOe8u2mW5oyKuef7TR4lZOSvD48IZUzk3a9H8F-2F8Jv6GkTSDLl-2BAPzrra7yWTp4SmsFoE5vimEgKeACoEn0lJ-2B2zxHtuTZrjTvpRANtviQ0tSB9cn3fZp5hN9fTw-2BDbXcmotRjqnsjZ8mKP6OkEZbwfq-2Ft7M4QRxQpkmzwQeT1ZBLOw37Z28Z-2FxZa146P6kcP7s0Tj6uZkHxRUcu5tAgdK5xrdqFcBKa6Rgxsl8x1WP6pKXfTTnmxusNBdmW6ngzZss59BjF0x8kOwGqsp23C086yp5Kf3mRMUX2DdxnHomiVfJsbB-2BDRcAJIi-2B81JDP3hX0m-2F2t0xJr2H51UqESrSf7GzD22PRdwtWuX-2Fc9IuULQ4yCrurjKoW-2FZM7gB5uBquDtcGiHSpoicX9lAJbHQY7nwQUSNQvli-2FON58aGDw-3D-3D)
Over the last eight years, Governor Hogan has led this state in the right direction. We’ve made tremendous progress cutting taxes, creating jobs, and making Maryland a more affordable place to live. I’ve been proud to serve in the Hogan administration and I’ve been proud to stand with the governor.
Each one of my opponents wants to take this state in a drastically different direction. I want to build upon the successes of the past eight years, and **I am the only candidate in this race who will be able to do that.**

clean_body: | | | | This is a campaign about opportunity - It’s about giving all Marylanders a chance to succeed. Dear Friend, This is a campaign about opportunity. It’s about giving all Marylanders a chance to succeed. This is the state where I raised my two boys, graduated college, started a small business, became a member of the House of Delegates, and became the first woman to serve as the cabinet secretary for the Department of Labor and the Department of Commerce – now, I’m running for governor. My story is an example of what is possible to achieve here in Maryland. And this campaign is about making sure that all Marylanders have the opportunities to pursue their own dreams, and that is only going to happen if we continue to keep moving our state in the right direction. Over the last eight years, Governor Hogan has led this state in the right direction. We’ve made tremendous progress cutting taxes, creating jobs, and making Maryland a more affordable place to live. I’ve been proud to serve in the Hogan administration and I’ve been proud to stand with the governor. Each one of my opponents wants to take this state in a drastically different direction. I want to build upon the successes of the past eight years, and I am the only candidate in this race who will be able to do that. Sincerely, | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

| | [Here in Colorado, nothing is more special than our public lands. Protecting them must be a priority for Congress. If you’re with me, please contribute to our campaign for CO-08 so we can continue to fight for our lands >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39881582/321849519/1424041718?amount=25&refcode=ea.e227c064-f861-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.e227c064-f861-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjI3YzA2NC1mODYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o6XnnoKAv1n_I2AF_R-Dy-h2z27xRZWUZqlgYYoJKaA=) Peter,

Growing up in Colorado, I was always surrounded by natural beauty and amazing sunsets.

Sometimes, when I’m out canvassing, I have to stop and take it all in. I took this photo in Thornton when I was on the campaign trail for State Representative in 2018: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39881583/321849520/1424041718?amount=25&refcode=ea.e227c064-f861-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.e227c064-f861-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjI3YzA2NC1mODYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o6XnnoKAv1n_I2AF_R-Dy-h2z27xRZWUZqlgYYoJKaA=) We’re incredibly lucky to have immense natural resources here in Colorado. From the Rocky Mountains to the Colorado River — we’re home to endless miles of rolling hills, vast plains, and flowing rivers.

All of that is under threat.

Democrats are working together to pass clean-energy legislation and build an economy that will preserve our planet. But Republicans are doing the exact opposite. Their pals in Big Oil and Big Gas are their top priority, and they refuse to get on board with climate legislation.

In the State House, I stood up to Big Oil and Big Gas, and I’m ready to do the same in Congress. But our district is one of the most competitive races in the country, and one of my likely GOP opponents is an anti-climate, former oil & gas engineer.

**[I need your help. ## **We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets,_growth in the size of government_. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.**

It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. [Read Full State & Federal Lands Policy Summary here.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODQ1MzAxNTI3OTY3NzAxMDA3JmM9cTVkMyZlPTAmYj04NDIzMDEyOTYmZD11MW0ycDR1.ejTt1i2Hu61LQYPGfATqb8a8P_wudCDf-FqxH73ogbk)

subject: To President Biden, on your eleven month anniversary in office:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Add your name >>
| Team, it has been ELEVEN MONTHS since President Biden was sworn into office — we can’t believe it!

_So we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!_ [SPACE IS LIMITED, ADD YOUR NAME TO THE CARD NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4592?t=6&akid=1034%2E878179%2E5goRHR) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4592?t=7&akid=1034%2E878179%2E5goRHR) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE CARD](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4593?t=8&akid=1034%2E878179%2E5goRHR)
---
**TO:** President Joseph Robinette Biden
**FROM:** A Proud American
**DATE:** December 20, 2021
**ADDRESS:** 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, Washington, DC 20500

**Dear President Joe Biden,**

Over the past four years, our nation has faced unprecedented hardships at the hands of Donald Trump.

But in just months, I’ve watched you steady the ship and bring us out of the worst economic crisis of our lifetimes, **and I couldn’t be prouder to call you my president!**

[I know your work is just beginning, Mr. President, which is why I’m donating $2 right now to VPP to elect Congressional Democrats who will fight for your agenda »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4592?t=9&akid=1034%2E878179%2E5goRHR) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE CARD »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4593?t=10&akid=1034%2E878179%2E5goRHR)
---
I know how important it is to keep the House, Mr. President.

**I still remember what happened when Republicans won the midterms in 2010 -- they stonewalled the entirety of President Obama’s agenda!**

We know better now, though, which is why I know we need to start our fight immediately.

[So I’m rushing $2 to PROTECT and EXPAND the Majority and help you accomplish your historic agenda »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4593?t=11&akid=1034%2E878179%2E5goRHR)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE CARD »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4593?t=12&akid=1034%2E878179%2E5goRHR)
---
Congrats on a successful first eleven months – I can’t wait to see what’s to come.

**_xx A Proud American_**
**!! SIGNATURE PENDING $2 DONATION!!**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1034%2E878179%2E5goRHR). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1034%2E878179%2E5goRHR).**

name: Christina Davidson
subject: This has nothing to do with health
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Health Freedom Defense Fund
body:
I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing to you today because I think we have something important in common. I think you're a patriot, and I think you know what's at stake. You know that freedoms given away are never given back... | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59071129:6u2XaAELN:m:1:3298722022:083947A4646B3818F68FCEA1532EDAB0:r)
---

Peter,

I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing to you today because I think we have something important in common.

I think you're a patriot, and I think you know what's at stake.

You know that freedoms given away are never given back.

And no matter your vaccination status, you know that your medical decisions are between you and your doctor - not you and your government, or you and your boss.

**That's why I'm suing the federal government alongside of 6,000 other federal employees with the help of the Health Freedom Defense Fund and why I hope I can count on your generous support today.**

[**Will you give $25, $50, $100 or more and give us the ammunition we need to win this legal battle?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59071129:6u2XaAELN:m:1:3298722022:083947A4646B3818F68FCEA1532EDAB0:r)

My name is Christina Davidson, I'm a paramedic firefighter, and I've worked for the Department of Defense for 14 years.

**_If I did what the government is doing I'd lose my license on the spot._**

I'm not allowed to give my patients medication without their consent, and I'm not allowed to threaten them to take medication.

But that's exactly what's happening to me and thousands of other employees across the country, and that's why we need you on our side.

_Because what starts with us won't end with us._

**If they can do it to me, they can do it to you.**

We're taking on this legal battle because we know if we give up and give in, it's only a matter of time before they come after you, your livelihood and your family the way they came after ours.

We want to stop tyranny in its tracks and codify our medical rights into law once and for all.

[**But we don't stand a chance without you.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59071129:6u2XaAELN:m:1:3298722022:083947A4646B3818F68FCEA1532EDAB0:r)

I won't mince words, we've got our work cut out for us.

The government is going to fight us every step of the way.

They've already shown us how far they're willing to go to push these mandates.

They've blatantly defied the courts, and are encouraging private employers to do the same. The President has even told businesses to ignore the courts.

Federal employees lucky enough to get an exemption are required to undergo "reeducation" training.

On top of regular threats, we're told we have no chance of promotion unless we shut up and take it.

And if we're fired, it won't just be a matter of finding a new job.

They're making it so that we'll never be able to find work again.

They want to make us so desperate that we have no choice but to surrender once and for all.

This has nothing to do with health.

**They want to break our wills, break our spirits, and send a loud, clear message that they have control over our lives.**

And if we let them win, there's no turning back.

[**Which is why I hope you'll fight along with me with a generous gift of $25 or more today to help fund lawsuits to fight vaccine mandates and preserve medical freedom.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59071129:6u2XaAELN:m:1:3298722022:083947A4646B3818F68FCEA1532EDAB0:r)

**I don't know if you're vaccinated - and I don't want to know.**

It's none of my business.

I want to know if you'll stand up for your countrymen when it matters most.

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,

Christina Davidson
Paramedic & Firefighter
Proud Supporter, Health Freedom Defense Fund

| [ DONATE ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59071129:6u2XaAELN:m:1:3298722022:083947A4646B3818F68FCEA1532EDAB0:r)

name: American Update
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8236%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ZIWUT1g%2bVkGIzyAjxgQtfA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10132%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SksOrgrBucNI8tJCMnn13g&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well.
Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time.
How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges?
Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.
Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves.
**So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
_**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more.
The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10133%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xwx%2b%2bX9zME%2bexWFwhBSetA&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long.
Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10134%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ypKuL%2bBiTz6JGifzMAY82g&sysid=1)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8236%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ZIWUT1g%2bVkGIzyAjxgQtfA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8236%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ZIWUT1g%2bVkGIzyAjxgQtfA&sysid=1)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmqmq55hchsqq511lc28il96dfh7je7a35mpf1gg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1ge1o36c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z93jeaf0t6ltm0631trobk9l3ghrichtgsilji2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1ge1o36c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj61r4qmp988gujbtpvufpbd9efq3t4oht2lepbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1ge1o36c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Celine Ryan Ciccio
subject: Expose leftist indoctrination
body:
America’s college campuses are a mess, full of biased professors, cancel culture, and left-wing bullies. Radical leftist ideo
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpffegm1bjmioetm47gd22lpjo9lqanq8qsj4r40_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1dpncgp3asbgeer32d34ehir9o72mlin0oj46uoeat70s8or5ddgeeqn6dtkc3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmecr0curm0pjkciqj9ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm0o30s3g69p724no)
Through Campus Reform, they write stories that reverberate across America and draw national attention to left-wing abuses on campus.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpu2a9ugm2jt9dbq566m9rhs9ftfsn48gbt7lol8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1ge1o34sjh2bs) Dear Patriot, America’s college campuses are a mess, full of biased professors, cancel culture, and left-wing bullies. Radical leftist ideologies -- like Critical Race Theory -- originate in academia then spread into public schools, corporate America, and public policy. _The result is devastating for our country._ **America’s colleges must be held accountable for the damage they do to students, and to society.** Fortunately, brave conservative college students fight back and expose the campus left’s abuses through the **Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform**. [**Fight leftist abuses**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3m15tt4tp50p2tc1kph9mq5prk9b6ub9rvb2cng_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1ge1o34sjh2bs) I’m Celine Ryan Ciccio, Editor-in-Chief of LI’s Campus Reform. I lead a team of professional journalists who work alongside more than **180 brave student journalists** to expose the left, stop them from stomping out conservative students, and end the toxicity infecting American life. LI’s Campus Correspondents are dedicated conservative student reporters. They conduct investigative research, write articles, and appear on national television. **These brave students powerfully expose the leftist indoctrination, bias, and abuse they’ve often experienced firsthand.** I was a Campus Correspondent myself when I was in college. Dozens of conservative media stars rose up through those ranks just like I did. **Campus Correspondents write stories that reverberate across America. They hold colleges and universities accountable.** Stories written by Campus Correspondents often appear on national news outlets like Fox News, One America News, and Newsmax. They draw national attention to left-wing abuses on campus. **LI’s Campus Reform articles create real change.** When leftist bias and indoctrination is exposed, universities often respond to public pressure and stop the worst of their abuses. Since 2014, LI’s Campus Reform reporting has led to more than **214 campus victories**. That means unfair policies revoked, free speech protected, and abusive professors punished or fired. [**Will you support these Campus Correspondents’ vital efforts to hold America’s colleges and universities accountable?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1j12a420u535u31adm9ncbo0bl24r9qqi0seceg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1ge1o34sjh2bs) [**Yes, I'll stand with these brave young conservatives**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc3hllqo80ssficr1upcved6021992kqs0sg1rh0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1ge1o34sjh2bs) **Your donation today will help my Campus Reform team:**
* Hire and train more Campus Correspondents
* Expose more incidents of leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination
* Hold universities accountable for the leftist nonsense they promote
* Reverse unfair policies, fire abusive professors and administrators, and **score more victories for conservatives**
So much of today’s leftist nonsense starts on campus. If you and I don’t act now to hold colleges and universities accountable, a new generation of students will graduate hating America. [**If you agree that conservative college students must stand up and expose the campus left, please click here to make a tax-deductible donation to the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4g1dsih75u35q2mc6fa0d9mnlahmmlpa2spmr10_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1ge1o34sjh2bs) Thank you so much. Sincerely, Celine Ryan Ciccio
Editor in Chief, Campus Reform [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu8ulpa36t4t91f13mkqgjkv25th1rls9k6itad0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1ge1o34sjh2bs)

subject: A dangerous ideology
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvi0pktv7548emud6eap7dqbjiut97fpibvdssg8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpbecljc8oj3cpmc5pj5dhm6uob7chgc2o6echjc2rrdd3j6tir2c72cdp6eo30sv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti61j38ppl6hg7co3665ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5g60o70shg6eoh5u)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfk3h9um3tpo4bt6fbdj5irk68ocj71cospbnqp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1ge1p30cth2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7guuo810tlm12isq8pi1rd5ibrs53is5isor8oo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1ge1p30cth2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfp574ccqeh6oebbvrf3g1g5eapd34eo04ldb1to_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1ge1p30cth2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39884678/321868017/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211221medicaid_TB_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDc5YTZkOC01YTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Fh2lKEzq0lkq1vXa175781LxIRkdiqKrxdJzNmFzHE=)
---
Friends, remember when Elise Stefanik ran for office claiming she was going to protect our healthcare rights? Well, she didn’t when she cast **_one of the deciding votes in the GOP effort to repeal the Affordable Care Act._** | [DONATE TO HELP REPLACE ELISE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39884679/321868018/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211221medicaid_TB_full_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDc5YTZkOC01YTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Fh2lKEzq0lkq1vXa175781LxIRkdiqKrxdJzNmFzHE=)
---
By casting that vote, she continued her relentless assault on our individual liberty by trying to take away one right after another.
North Country Public Radio did a deep-dive into this. They talked to budget analysts, policy experts, and health care executives. **The verdict: Elise was lying when she said she would protect individual liberties such as healthcare.**
One expert even said the bill Elise supported “threaten[ed] the entire Medicaid system, which covers about half of kids in New York State and about a quarter of seniors in the state.”
**Unlike DC politicians who don’t understand real people, Bridie has personal experience with Medicaid and understands firsthand the challenges of our healthcare system. She will never support gutting Medicaid or Medicare.**
[**Can you pitch in $10, $25, or $50 to help us replace Elise with a North Country champion who doesn’t go back on her promises and will actually fight for health care access?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39884680/321868019/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211221medicaid_TB_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDc5YTZkOC01YTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Fh2lKEzq0lkq1vXa175781LxIRkdiqKrxdJzNmFzHE=)
Bridie Farrell is a crime victims advocate and former U.S. National Speed Skater running against far-right Rep. Elise Stefanik in her home district of NY-21. clean_body: | = Friends, remember when Elise Stefanik ran for office claiming she was going to protect our healthcare rights? Well, she didn’t when she cast one of the deciding votes in the GOP effort to repeal the Affordable Care Act. | = By casting that vote, she continued her relentless assault on our individual liberty by trying to take away one right after another. North Country Public Radio did a deep-dive into this. They talked to budget analysts, policy experts, and health care executives. The verdict: Elise was lying when she said she would protect individual liberties such as healthcare. One expert even said the bill Elise supported “threaten[ed] the entire Medicaid system, which covers about half of kids in New York State and about a quarter of seniors in the state.” Unlike DC politicians who don’t understand real people, Bridie has personal experience with Medicaid and understands firsthand the challenges of our healthcare system. She will never support gutting Medicaid or Medicare. = Bridie Farrell is a crime victims advocate and former U.S. National Speed Skater running against far-right Rep. name: Ashley Ward
subject: Getting to know Ashley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]

Getting to know Ashley:
The Importance of Public Service

Too often we think that public office holders are the only public servants. Little is said about the thousands of us who volunteer countless hours every week in our communities without publicity or recognition.

image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/joel-muniz-3k3l2brxmwQ-unsplash.jpg]

When I was growing up, my mother, a single mom, didn't have money to give, but she gave her time and energy, taking me along with her as she delivered meals in our rural community. She also fostered at-risk animals, providing a safe haven for them when they were taken from their owners because of abuse. She and I spent hours bottle feeding and caring for the most unwanted and unloved animals.

My mother taught me the importance of compassion and giving - of caring for those most in need. Even when we didn't have money to donate, she insisted we had our time and energy to give. And so we did.

Read More About My Family[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_3469.jpeg]

My husband is a 30-year teaching veteran, I taught at UNC for several years, and our oldest daughter is a second grade teacher.
My family understands the importance of supporting our educators, our public schools, our children.

When my children were in school, I volunteered multiple times per week.. During this time, I was an officer in the PTA and led the most successful fundraising efforts in the school's history (and in the entire district), raising over $25K per year to support the Artist in Residence program and buy supplies for our teachers.

I helped teachers in Kindergarten and 1st grade with literacy, pulling students out to read with them one on one, increasing the teacher's classroom capacity to serve more students. Often I stepped in to assist substitute teachers when a teacher took maternity leave, helping out in any way needed to make the transition in the classroom smoother.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/GraduationDay_Girls%20%281%29.JPG]

During this time...
I was also a full-time student at UNC with two small children of my own. I graduated with highest honors from my Bachelor's program and went on to graduate school on a fellowship from my department. My volunteer work in the school system continued.

When I graduated with my PhD, I did not go to work in the private sector where my pay would have been twice as high as the public sector. I specifically looked for and took jobs in the public sector because I believe we need expertise in our public sector to address our most challenging issues .

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/milada-vigerova-XJoOb7EDXTw-unsplash.jpg]

Since 2010, I have taught online courses for a small, rural, under-resourced school in eastern NC. The school hit a crisis point about 10 years ago when there was no one to teach required courses and the school could not recruit the talent to do so. They reached out to my husband to do it, but with his other obligations he could not.
I stepped in, despite being paid a fraction of what I would be paid to teach the same course at our local universities. I continue to do it because kids in rural areas also need good teachers, but rural areas have the least capacity to recruit them, exacerbating already existing disparities.

This disparity became increasingly more clear during COVID when many of my students had no access to Internet at home and were writing papers and submitting assignments on their mobile phones or serving as primary caregiver to siblings at home while also taking courses to graduate. Teaching in a rural school reminds me of how important it is that we ensure the benefits of technologies extend to our rural areas.

I also volunteer with local community organizations, where I deliver meals to rural Orange County residents and assist in collecting and providing supplies to families in need, particularly during times of crisis.

During COVID, I was asked, and served, on the Orange County Schools COVID task force as an expert to help the school board understand the data and make informed decisions around COVID. I think the successful local leadership in Orange County speaks for itself. Orange County has maintained one of the lowest, if not the lowest, transmission rates in the entire state of NC.
Like me, volunteers work hard in our communities every day in the spirit of community service, without public spotlight or recognition.

It is these experiences that help me know my community and keep my feet firmly grounded in Congressional District NC-06. My name might not be as recognizable as some others running to be your Congressperson in 2022, but hopefully you will now know that I have a servant’s heart.

As your Representative, I will work every day to serve our Congressional District to the best of my ability.

https://youtu.be/HxSNEhqi_M4 [https://youtu.be/HxSNEhqi_M4]Please follow along with me!

Join our mailing list, follow the campaign on social media, come see me at one of our events, or reach out to me!

LEARN MORE ABOUT ME [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/] SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-ashley-ward-1]https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
Friends of Ashley Ward
P.O. Box 1092
Mebane, NC 27302
United States

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Records Detail U.S. Embassy Concerns about China’s ‘Anal Swab’ COVID Testing of U.S. Diplomatic Personnel
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it received eight pages of email communications from the U.S. Department of State revealing concerns by the U.S. Embassy in Beijing that U.S. diplomatic personnel were being asked to submit to an anal swab COVID testing policy. The redacted documents show that at as many as two people were either asked or required to take an anal test for COVID by the Chinese government.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 20, 2021
---|---|---

### [FITTON: Why Absolutely No One Is Surprised Hillary Clinton’s Influence-Peddling Foundation Collapsed ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57422&L=26409&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kYWlseWNhbGxlci5jb20vMjAyMS8xMi8wMy9maXR0b24td2h5LWFic29sdXRlbHktbm8tb25lLWlzLXN1cnByaXNlZC1oaWxsYXJ5LWNsaW50b25zLWluZmx1ZW5jZS1wZWRkbGluZy1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLWNvbGxhcHNlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) The Daily Caller When one of the most recognizable nonprofits in the world loses 75% of its contributions over a four-year period, there are typically investigatory reports written into what has gone wrong. That isn’t the case with the Clinton Foundation. The Foundation received $62.9 million in 2016 but only $16.3 million in 2020, and very few people seem to have noticed. The redacted documents show that at as many as two people were either asked or required to take an anal test for COVID by the Chinese government. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 20, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it received eight pages of email communications from the U.S. Department of State revealing concerns by the U.S. Embassy in Beijing that U.S. diplomatic personnel were being asked to submit to an anal swab COVID testing policy. The redacted documents show that at as many as two people were either asked or required to take an anal test for COVID by the Chinese government. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch is fighting to “force the release of Joe Biden’s Senate records,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton states in the Weekly Update. “Given the public interest in these records, the public financing of the University of Delaware under Delaware law, we thought these records should’ve been public,” Fitton adds. ---|--- | | | | == | == While local law enforcement agencies around the United States weather extensive budget cuts, the federal government is dedicating $1.5 million to assist police in El Salvador with challenges and stress created by COVID-19. The goal is to help the Central American nation’s 26,966-member National Civil Police (PNC) asses its role and capacities during a crisis and efficiently provide training to manage a public health emergency like the pandemic. “The training will particularly focus on public health orders, personal and workplace safety measures, education in regards to transmission and proper treatment, and management of operational continuity,” according to a grant announcement made public this month. == ---|--- | | | | = | = According to the incident report, an attorney turned in “possibly stolen luggage” to the Delray Beach PD which contained “documents and envelopes in folders” with the name Ashley Biden. The Delray Beach PD included bodycam footage of an attorney handing over the items. = ---|--- | | | The Daily Caller When one of the most recognizable nonprofits in the world loses 75% of its contributions over a four-year period, there are typically investigatory reports written into what has gone wrong. Padilla, a lawsuit filed by Judicial Watch to enjoin California from requiring that publicly held corporations headquartered in California include at least one director who “self-identifies” as a woman. | We just completed over 1,000 miles this past week on the west side of the state! No other candidate is going to hit the ground in a meaningful way to get out the vote, beat the pavement, or fight for our values.
Biden ran his campaign from his basement - and we have people in this Senate race who will run it from their penthouse.
We are in a street fight with these radical Democrats. They are NOT playing with us and they are determined. We need a candidate who will really fight for us, our nation, and our children's future!

name: Eddie Geller
subject: The one thing Joe Manchin has said that I absolutely agree with
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39886744/321878816/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211221manchin_EG_main_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTQ1MGM2Ny02NjYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BuxPFBOobH2VZ2CgGkVkk15zuiol3MtieE6o-Zz3V4k=)
---
Friends,
I’m mad at Joe Manchin, you’re mad at Joe Manchin, _everybody_ is mad at Joe Manchin.
Nothing encapsulates the frustration of our current politics in Washington more than watching one man with deep financial ties to the coal lobby from one of the poorest states in the country blow up the historic, incredibly popular, people-first agenda that Democrats ran and won on in 2020.
There are think pieces aplenty about why Manchin is doing what he’s doing and why it makes no sense; so instead of getting into that, I want to point out one thing he’s said that I absolutely agree with:
**To pass more progressive legislation, you have to elect more progressives.**
[**We’re trying, Joe, we’re trying! Will you chip in to this campaign and help send a progressive with big ideas and the grit to get them done to Congress next November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39886751/321878828/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211221manchin_EG_main_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTQ1MGM2Ny02NjYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BuxPFBOobH2VZ2CgGkVkk15zuiol3MtieE6o-Zz3V4k=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Hello,
Senator Joe Manchin needs a lesson on sacrifice. If he thinks he will lose reelection because he supports President Biden’s historic Build Back Better plan, then so be it.
**Nearly 40 years serving in the U.S. Navy taught me that sometimes the hardest thing to do and the right thing are the same.**
When I was just a young captain in late 2002, the Bush White House ordered the Pentagon to plan the invasion of Iraq. I represented the U.S. Navy and was the most junior person at a table of political appointees and more senior officers.
When the vote was called, we had to vote for one of three invasion scenarios. I alone voted for a fourth option: No invasion. Sometimes you have to stand alone, not bow to political pressure, and just do the right thing.
Many Democrats lost their seats in 2010 after voting for the Affordable Care Act known as Obamacare. Imagine if they had instead sacrificed the health of our nation just for personal political gain.
**In the Senate, I won’t be a “Joe Manchin Democrat.” I won’t kowtow to corporate PACs or special interests. I’ll always do what’s right for Iowa and for our country.** That can’t be said of my Republican opponent Chuck Grassley, a 46-year-incumbent. He has Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs raising millions of dollars in a vain attempt to defeat me. Yes, they will come after me. I’m their biggest threat.
**I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if I’m going to defeat Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate with Democrats who will actually _vote_ like Democrats, I need grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, can I count on you to chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – whatever you can afford before our next fundraising deadline – to help me win next November and go to the Senate to vote for the people of Iowa and our country? Your support today is the only way we’ll be able to take on Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell’s millions.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39886907/321879130/-42398318?refcode=em20211221am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzY5ZTQ0NS02NjYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qS4an2snsxdBMAqzWy2HlP3l9KBLnAATweq_a0wrh8M=)

clean_body: Hello, Senator Joe Manchin needs a lesson on sacrifice. If he thinks he will lose reelection because he supports President Biden’s historic Build Back Better plan, then so be it. Nearly 40 years serving in the U.S. Navy taught me that sometimes the hardest thing to do and the right thing are the same. When I was just a young captain in late 2002, the Bush White House ordered the Pentagon to plan the invasion of Iraq. I represented the U.S. Navy and was the most junior person at a table of political appointees and more senior officers. When the vote was called, we had to vote for one of three invasion scenarios. I alone voted for a fourth option: No invasion. Sometimes you have to stand alone, not bow to political pressure, and just do the right thing. Many Democrats lost their seats in 2010 after voting for the Affordable Care Act known as Obamacare. Imagine if they had instead sacrificed the health of our nation just for personal political gain. In the Senate, I won’t be a “Joe Manchin Democrat.” I won’t kowtow to corporate PACs or special interests. I’ll always do what’s right for Iowa and for our country. That can’t be said of my Republican opponent Chuck Grassley, a 46-year-incumbent. He has Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs raising millions of dollars in a vain attempt to defeat me. Yes, they will come after me. I’m their biggest threat. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if I’m going to defeat Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate with Democrats who will actually vote like Democrats, I need grassroots donors like you to give now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’ve tried to live a life of service to others and my country. That will continue every day if I’m elected to the United States Senate. Thank you for your support. Mike Franken, Vice Admiral, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I don’t regret it for a second.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But it didn't matter. I had to do what was right for our country.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59070285:66xfxAEN-:m:1:3253819041:4500569928265B55E0FEB896D0417D18:r)
---
Peter,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59070285:66xfxAEN-:m:1:3253819041:4500569928265B55E0FEB896D0417D18:r)
---
**I knew full well the price I 'd have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn't matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59070285:66xfxAEN-:m:1:3253819041:4500569928265B55E0FEB896D0417D18:r)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59070286:66xfxAEN-:m:1:3253819041:4500569928265B55E0FEB896D0417D18:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59070287:66xfxAEN-:m:1:3253819041:4500569928265B55E0FEB896D0417D18:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59070288:66xfxAEN-:m:1:3253819041:4500569928265B55E0FEB896D0417D18:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59070289:66xfxAEN-:m:1:3253819041:4500569928265B55E0FEB896D0417D18:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59070290:66xfxAEN-:m:1:3253819041:4500569928265B55E0FEB896D0417D18:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59070285:66xfxAEN-:m:1:3253819041:4500569928265B55E0FEB896D0417D18:r)**
---
**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
As President Trump said, there aren't many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.
---
_But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don 't regret it for a second._
---
I refused to let the Deep State and their stooges in Congress take down President Trump for crimes he did not commit.
---
Because if they could do it to a sitting president they disagreed with, then what could they one day do to you?
---
As I said, I knew the Deep State would try to ruin me for having the guts to defend President Trump and find him innocent.
---
That's why I hope grassroots patriots like you will continue to defend me as they try to bury me in legal fees and attacks.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59070285:66xfxAEN-:m:1:3253819041:4500569928265B55E0FEB896D0417D18:r)
---
Thank you,

body:

With a deadline in 9 days Dr. Bob is up against corporate PACS and dark money. We need you. Can you pitch in and make a contribution today?**_ [HELP US FIGHT FOR WORKING FAMILIES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39898492/321906789/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWQ0MWNhYS03MDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vDk4MlUOE5PGTkpz9x1S6JnUG88IrIGQgPy9MZCJrsU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39898493/321906790/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWQ0MWNhYS03MDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vDk4MlUOE5PGTkpz9x1S6JnUG88IrIGQgPy9MZCJrsU=) [ON-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39898494/321906791/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWQ0MWNhYS03MDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vDk4MlUOE5PGTkpz9x1S6JnUG88IrIGQgPy9MZCJrsU=) Good morning, Friends. As the Build it Back Better framework makes headlines, I share constituents' disappointment in Sen. Manchin. But, it's important to note Sen. Manchin isn’t single-handedly defeating this legislation. What about the Senate colleagues on the other side of the aisle? Do all 50 Republican Senators honestly believe this is lousy legislation? What's happening in Congress is again a sign of party politics – party before the Nation, party before the people. I appreciate compromise, negotiation, and healthy debate, but this type of political posturing hurts the American people, many of whose livelihoods can greatly benefit from the government's proactiveness. Like many of you, I am highly disappointed in Sen. Manchin's lack of support for the framework to fund domestic programs and mitigate climate change. Why did he change?
* He thought parents would waste monthly child tax credit payments on drugs instead of providing for their children. The vast majority of the time, this is not true. Sen. Manchin, please provide your data to support your claims. If true, this Nation is in more significant trouble than all of us could imagine. The child tax credit cuts child poverty by nearly 30% and is well-spent tax dollars.
* He believes that Americans would fraudulently use the proposed paid sick leave policy – an unfortunate and inaccurate diagnosis of the character of the American people.
* Manchin claims the bill would be inflationary. Some economists state any adverse impacts will be small and brief. Many economists believe the bill to be deflationary.
* He doesn't support the climate change provisions. I hope this isn't influenced by his family's wealth from 'waste coal.'
* Manchin argues this would add to the national debt, but the Congressional Budget Office (CBO) states nearly 90% is paid for by taxes on those making more than $400,000. There is no substantial addition to the national debt.

I am equally disappointed by Senators on the other side of the aisle for refusing to pass meaningful legislation that will directly support the lives of so many hardworking families in this Nation. I support national leaders who make decisions based on facts and a vision to improve the state of the nation. I find it disheartening that our two parties have their own facts, although not shared. What would I like to see? — a vote in the Senate and the House with overwhelming bipartisan support. Please show us it can be done. It's time to end this great divide. As leaders of our great Nation, please start the healing process and lead us forward together. We can and will do better than this. – Dr. Bob Lorinser [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39898495/321906792/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWQ0MWNhYS03MDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vDk4MlUOE5PGTkpz9x1S6JnUG88IrIGQgPy9MZCJrsU=) _**The Dr. Bob Lorinser for Congress campaign is 100% funded by individual donors. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39899511/321911315/-367306429?refcode=20211221_CGVA_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTU0NzUzMC03MTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C1fVAw1-MGPSctkUC4nj77b3qT978Kwcyl762DmBnOo=)

| | Derek, In a moment, I'm going to ask you to help my re-election campaign before our critical midnight deadline — so we can keep Georgia blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen to the future of our progressive agenda without it.

My journey to becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator was an unlikely one. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth — I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. But through hard work and the support of my community, I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, this kid from the housing projects is fighting in the Senate to build a government that works for everyone — not just those at the top.

Since day one, I've made my priorities clear: Defend and expand voting rights to strengthen our democracy, raise the minimum wage to build an economy that works for everyone, and expand affordable health care so filling a prescription doesn't break the bank. But here's the honest truth: I simply can't win these critical fights for justice without grassroots folks like you by my side — so I have to ask:

With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to put Mitch McConnell back in power — and election experts from The Washington Post to NBC News confirm that I'm the GOP's top target for defeat. This means that Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate will be in serious danger if we don't have the resources to keep Georgia blue.

But right now, we're not on track to raise the $15,000 we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win in Georgia. The ONLY way I can close this budget gap is with your grassroots support, Derek.

My last election was one of the most expensive races in history, and there's no question that the GOP will spend MILLIONS on top of millions to try and crush our people-powered movement again. We can't let them. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. So please, I'm personally asking:

[**Before our critical midnight deadline, will you split a $25 donation between our campaign and CommonGood so we can win in Georgia, protect our Democratic Senate majority and continue fighting for our progressive values?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39899520/321911324/1524405433?refcode=20211221_CGVA_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTU0NzUzMC03MTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C1fVAw1-MGPSctkUC4nj77b3qT978Kwcyl762DmBnOo=)

Thanks for fighting alongside me at moments like these — I appreciate you.

— Sen. Raphael Warnock

_Here are the facts:_
When expanded Child Tax Credit payments started hitting families’ bank accounts last summer, low-income families with children saw immediate relief across the country. Reports show that those households experienced a 25% drop in food insecurity following initial payments.
The effects were particularly strong in Black and Latino households.
**And initial payments kept _3.5 million_ American children out of poverty in August alone.**
Unless President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda passes, working families won’t see another payment next month or after. So we want to hear from you, Peter: **Do you support extending the Child Tax Credit?**
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39899661/321912016/454032934?amount=25&refcode=ea.6726dcd8-7262-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.6726dcd8-7262-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzI2ZGNkOC03MjYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9QFvQDjP0j3BahSNSnUOlpoiAUwPVth46gxamQE9ic=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39899663/321912018/454032934?amount=25&refcode=ea.6726dcd8-7262-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.6726dcd8-7262-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzI2ZGNkOC03MjYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9QFvQDjP0j3BahSNSnUOlpoiAUwPVth46gxamQE9ic=)

So we want to hear from you, Peter: Do you support extending the Child Tax Credit? = | = ---|--- Thanks so much, Team Cooper = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
Republican super PACs MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39899748/321912349/-420428835?refcode=20211221_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWRlNzcxZS03MzYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3n_GxkvcsGnEnKJGyoOMAlbrtKj2844niNyzhQb1OG8=) Friend - [In honor of 2021 coming to an end, I was hoping 500 supporters would make a donation of $20.21 by the end of the day tomorrow to help us end the year with a bang! Because we won in 2020, Tom’s been able to accomplish so much already — like funding the Gateway Tunnel Project and lowering healthcare costs in our country. With you by our side, we can win again and ensure Congress can continue delivering for our country.

But we need your help today! We have so much to celebrate and still have so much work ahead of us.

[Please, make a donation today to help us not only celebrate our successes from 2021, but to help us ensure we re-elect Tom in 2022!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39900527/321916214/1474767726?amount=15&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_211221_1_2&refcode2=b702040d-7662-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzAyMDQwZC03NjYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=idx2XlFe-Kh1-z9YjDw87XOpVGisG0lBTnNUAjGz5pg=)

Brooke

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: they want me in jail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Dear Peter --

Time is short, and I need your help right
away.

RINO Liz Cheney and Communist Democrats like
Adam Schiff on the Soviet-style January 6 Witch Hunt committee
are demanding my phone records so they can leak them to CNN and
the rest of the fake news media. . .

The D.C. swamp is waging a scorched earth war
against me because I fought for President Trump, and I fought for
you.

And the Never Trump RINOs like Cheney and the
Communist Democrats are terrified that they can't bully me into
backing down.

SIGN YOUR "STAND WITH MTG" STATEMENT OF
SUPPORT

FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE JANUARY 6 WITCH HUNT
Now Cheney, Schiff, and the rest of their
Communist Democrat pals think they can silence me by seizing my
phone records and leaking the contents of my communication to the
public.

But time is running out before RINO Liz
Cheney and the Communist Democrats leak my text messages.

Do you stand with me?

SIGN YOUR "STAND WITH MTG" STATEMENT OF
SUPPORT

FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE JANUARY 6 WITCH HUNT
The January 6 witch hunt committee already
voted to throw two President Trump aides in jail!

And Never Trump RINO Liz Cheney openly
threatened to charge President Trump with a crime.

Adam Schiff. . .Liz Cheney. . .Nancy Pelosi.
. .

They want to throw me and my colleagues in
jail!

There is no one in Congress with a bigger
bullseye on their back than me.

SIGN YOUR "STAND WITH MTG" STATEMENT OF
SUPPORT

FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE JANUARY 6 WITCH HUNT
Liz Cheney and the Communist Democrats scheme
to disclose my text messages to her pals in the fake news media
because I stood up to their lies and police state power grabs.

That's why I hope you'll
sign your statement of support and then rush an emergency
contribution of $17.76 right away.

Never-Trumpers teamed with Communist
Democrats to kick me off my committees and expel me from Congress
from day one.

But they couldn't get me the first time, or
the second time, or the third time. . .

So now, they're coming after me with this
bogus January 6 Witch Hunt Committee.

Here's why:

Never Trumpers and Communist Democrats
seethed over the fact that I refused to play the swamp's games.

I've led the fight to:

>>> Impeach Joe Biden for his lawless
presidency and allowing an illegal alien invasion of America;

>>> Sue Nancy Pelosi over her illegal mask
mandate;

>>> Fire Dr. Fauci for his lies and
tyrannical and unconstitutional vaccine mandate; and

>>> Stop the Communist Democrat takeover of
our elections and demand a full audit of 2020.

Now Liz Cheney is triggering the nuclear
option.

Leaking my text messages and phone records is
the DC Swamps revenge for leading the fight for Donald Trump's
America First movement.

body:
| Did you see Annie’s message? With Nancy Mace and her allies voting in favor of oppressive voter suppression tactics across the country, we need to fight back to ensure equal access to the polls.

[Read Annie’s message and sign on to join her call for Congress to pass voting rights protections immediately >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39901400/321920923/-158385848?refcode=AA_EM_PT_1MO_211221_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=YSyQxvOnyi%2B5hO8tF4aMioAPjzRnBGcEJEtBzE23rTOWlVpkF74Q81Sw%2BzIKiBWO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDIyOTE5YS03NzYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6W3n02Ndz9sV1G8zsS5kv4X_cd87g2JiI_9EGKf7kA=&emci=8cc0e827-b461-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fd22919a-7762-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6125529)

_Begin forward message from Dr. Annie Andrews:_

Friends,

I believe everyone deserves to have their voice valued in electing leaders who put our community first, which is why **equal access to the polls is crucial to our democracy**.

But today, in states across the country, the extremist politicians are committed to imposing voter suppression tactics that would strip _millions_ of their voices in our political system.

[I need you to stand with me today in this crucial fight. With the Senate poised to act, will you sign on to urge our elected officials to pass federal voting rights protections?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39901402/321920925/-158385848?refcode=AA_EM_PT_1MO_211221_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=YSyQxvOnyi%2B5hO8tF4aMioAPjzRnBGcEJEtBzE23rTOWlVpkF74Q81Sw%2BzIKiBWO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDIyOTE5YS03NzYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6W3n02Ndz9sV1G8zsS5kv4X_cd87g2JiI_9EGKf7kA=&emci=8cc0e827-b461-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fd22919a-7762-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6125529)
| | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39901405/321920928/-158385848?refcode=AA_EM_PT_1MO_211221_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=YSyQxvOnyi%2B5hO8tF4aMioAPjzRnBGcEJEtBzE23rTOWlVpkF74Q81Sw%2BzIKiBWO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDIyOTE5YS03NzYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6W3n02Ndz9sV1G8zsS5kv4X_cd87g2JiI_9EGKf7kA=&emci=8cc0e827-b461-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fd22919a-7762-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6125529)

Time and time again, minority voters have marched to the polls to save our democracy.

Politicians like Nancy Mace know the power of their vote, which is why she voted _against_ the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, siding with those who are actively imposing barriers to voting and blocking legislation which would ensure equity at the polls.

[I am running to champion voting rights in Congress — but I can’t do it alone. Will you sign on today and tell Congress to pass federal voting rights protections?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39901407/321920930/-158385848?refcode=AA_EM_PT_1MO_211221_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=YSyQxvOnyi%2B5hO8tF4aMioAPjzRnBGcEJEtBzE23rTOWlVpkF74Q81Sw%2BzIKiBWO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDIyOTE5YS03NzYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6W3n02Ndz9sV1G8zsS5kv4X_cd87g2JiI_9EGKf7kA=&emci=8cc0e827-b461-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fd22919a-7762-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6125529)

Thanks for stepping up,

Dr. Andrews
