name: Geoff Diehl
subject: I stand with you and your Constitutional rights...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Please support my campaign against policies that are taking away your freedoms!
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
|
---
Dear Friend,
With all of the announcements of new mandates being made this week at the local, state and national levels, it is very frustrating to see people's rights being taken away step by step.
I want you to know where I stand. I stand with you and your rights.
Forced vaccinations by hospitals have led to hundreds of nurses and medical professionals being laid off and creating staff shortages, which in turn are causing delays in surgeries and care. While the Governor is trying to stem the demand in our emergency rooms with National Guard members, I believe that healthcare providers and networks should rescind their mandates and let their valuable front-line workers make their own healthcare decisions, and allow for continual testing for those who feel a vaccine is not appropriate for them based on their medical history.
Meanwhile, I strongly oppose Boston Mayor Michelle Wu's decision to implement expanded mandates for vaccination and proof of vaccination in the City of Boston. These mandates are clear violations of the civil rights of anyone who lives in, works in, or travels to the city, and will make it even more difficult for Boston's economy to recover from the pandemic. What's more, it's unfair to ask members of law enforcement and small business owners to enforce these mandates against members of the public. I am proud to stand alongside first responders who believe these mandates are unfair and inappropriate and who don't want to be in the position of enforcing them.
I look at all mandates critically and through the same lens of whether they are consistent with the Constitution; many are not. While I openly acknowledge and share concern over rising case counts in Massachusetts, infringing on citizens' right to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness is never an acceptable solution.
When I become Governor, one of my first official acts will be to take an oath to support the state and federal Constitutions. That means I will honor and defend the rights and freedom our founding documents guaranteed to the people. There is no greater responsibility for a public servant. I'll uphold that solemn oath each and every day, and with everything I do, as I work to make Massachusetts a better place to live.
You can count on it.
---
---
|
---
---
I'm running for Governor because I'm on your side. I'm advocating for policies to help people live a better life here in Massachusetts.
In short, I'm fighting for what's right for our state. But, I can't do it alone. I need your help.
Will you please help me as I work to get the message out and stand up against mandates that take away your rights? If you are able to, please consider making a donation today:

---
---
| [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qxpn1--70sseXWEtTM-Tr-axVt_UaoK1UqPA0P1LphVwQklzuJTAlQckqlroogppyyI-X69peFLQvfp9p_dbrXd1WlIjkP3aQffXeR07r2W9gvKAZYVuoon0wYSQiqlqPaICdmARciOd3LHfU2H3y37pBWoWpL6pjJ7lf3RdG1SJeS_K8dF5WA==&c=slq1GveIb_HP_OQlLKwGGdYFfuzWjs2u0wvPkv6Ga_A7m8jNPoCFvQ==&ch=0bWSbO7nEwmiY2pebp49tgPoUq5u-AdAVpKvOLKhCE_0vdCTWHHzhQ==)
---
---
Thanks, as always, for your support!
---
---
Geoff Diehl Republican Candidate for Governor

|

name: Eric Lynn
subject: Help me get on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
It just takes a minute https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-petition-1221 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-petition-1221]Dear friends,
Last week, we had some exciting announcements about elected officials and community leaders endorsing my campaign. We still have a long road ahead, and a boost from these leaders is just what we needed before the new year!
That said, we still need to qualify for the ballot, and that means that we need to collect over 2,500 petition signatures from people across Florida.
We need your help: will you please sign our ballot petition?
By following the steps below, you’re helping me get my name on the ballot. Any registered voter in Florida is eligible to sign, and completing a petition has no obligation beyond helping get my name on to the ballot and supporting democracy. Here are the simple steps:
1) Click here to download a ballot petition [http://ericlynnforcongress.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/Lynn-Petition.pdf]
2) Complete the petition and be sure to include either your birthday OR your voter ID number in the required field.
3) Return the petition by mail to Eric Lynn for Congress, PO Box 16991, Saint Petersburg, FL 33733
That’s it! It’s an easy way to offer an immense amount of help to our efforts as we move forward with this campaign. And please ask your friends and neighbors to sign a petition as well.
If you’d like to offer a helping hand to the campaign beyond your petition signature, please click here to donate. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-petition-1221]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-petition-1221?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-petition-1221?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-petition-1221?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-petition-1221?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-petition-1221?express_lane=true&amoount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-petition-1221]With your help, we’ll qualify for the ballot, win this election, and continue the work to restore America’s dignity.
Thank you,
Eric Lynn

clean_body: It just takes a minute [ friends, Last week, we had some exciting announcements about elected officials and community leaders endorsing my campaign. We still have a long road ahead, and a boost from these leaders is just what we needed before the new year! That said, we still need to qualify for the ballot, and that means that we need to collect over 2,500 petition signatures from people across Florida. We need your help: will you please sign our ballot petition? By following the steps below, you’re helping me get my name on the ballot. Any registered voter in Florida is eligible to sign, and completing a petition has no obligation beyond helping get my name on to the ballot and supporting democracy. Here are the simple steps: 1) Click here to download a ballot petition [] 2) Complete the petition and be sure to include either your birthday OR your voter ID number in the required field. 3) Return the petition by mail to Eric Lynn for Congress, PO Box 16991, Saint Petersburg, FL 33733 That’s it! It’s an easy way to offer an immense amount of help to our efforts as we move forward with this campaign. And please ask your friends and neighbors to sign a petition as well. If you’d like to offer a helping hand to the campaign beyond your petition signature, please click here to donate. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39901870/321923657/-1552190924?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211221rally_wm_60da_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjFhNzVlMS03ODYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K9ql2xJZw-B2zbkmpDD_ezv_u03cV23-wZVs_sYFcyE=)

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: Leftists Ideology has taken control of our educational system
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59076737:6ofR4AEN9:m:1:3298722022:DC446036BB898EBDFDEC49D17D3151B1:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59076737:6ofR4AEN9:m:1:3298722022:DC446036BB898EBDFDEC49D17D3151B1:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59076737:6ofR4AEN9:m:1:3298722022:DC446036BB898EBDFDEC49D17D3151B1:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59076737:6ofR4AEN9:m:1:3298722022:DC446036BB898EBDFDEC49D17D3151B1:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59076737:6ofR4AEN9:m:1:3298722022:DC446036BB898EBDFDEC49D17D3151B1:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59076737:6ofR4AEN9:m:1:3298722022:DC446036BB898EBDFDEC49D17D3151B1:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59076738:6ofR4AEN9:m:1:3298722022:DC446036BB898EBDFDEC49D17D3151B1:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59076739:6ofR4AEN9:m:1:3298722022:DC446036BB898EBDFDEC49D17D3151B1:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59076740:6ofR4AEN9:m:1:3298722022:DC446036BB898EBDFDEC49D17D3151B1:r)

clean_body: Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that: It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech. The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus. For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters. In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm. It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the Young America 's Foundation (YAF). When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --and won. But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. Young America 's Foundation has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses exclusively through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are #1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America. Here's why: YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, Lt. Col.Allen West , SpeakerNewt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, NFL star and Congressman Burgess Owens, Star Parker, Fox News'sJesse Watters, and many others. YAF teaches millions of students across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!) And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments. No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation. That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events. They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. We don't care about the presents underneath the Christmas tree

Make our wish come true

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39905260/321940263/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzQ4MmU5Yy04MzYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nA0oir0eOqKyD746nXB0eTMCgqLvoJiq_6KyQgXXES8=&emci=32066259-da61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bc482e9c-8362-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
Even as the Omicron variant rips through Arizona, causing yet another surge of COVID infections and deaths, **Gov. Doug Ducey quietly issued an executive order prohibiting local governments from using every tool available to them to help keep their communities safe with COVID-19 vaccines.** This includes the City of Tucson.
Does Ducey's Senior Advisor Juan Ciscomani, Republican candidate for AZ-02, have the courage to stand up for the health and safety of Southern Arizonans? Or will he also choose to curry favor with the far right base of the Republican Party at the expense of our communities?
We need elected officials who believe in science, listen to doctors, and prioritize public health over political ambition.

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: a guy with a houseboat and a Maserati obstructed progress for millions of working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We are one vote away
#

Folks,
It’s absurd to me that, in our country, a guy with a houseboat and a Maserati can obstruct progress and relief for millions of working families.
We are one vote away from capping insulin prices, providing universal pre-K, and taking real action against climate change — but the multi-millionaire senator from West Virginia is trying to blow it all up.
Joe Manchin’s betrayal of working families makes one thing clear: We need more working people in the United States Senate.
Look, if I have the honor of becoming Pennsylvania’s next Senator, I’ll be the 50th vote Democrats need to pass President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda.
**But I need your help to get there. That’s why I’m respectfully asking you to make a $3 contribution to my campaign today. So what do you say?**
[If you’re able to do so, can you pitch in $3 to take our fight for working families to the U.S. Senate? No matter the amount, every donation adds up to help us win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39905279/321940447/-360183459?refcode2=8218431b-8462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211221-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjE4NDMxYi04NDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lNmIfbGIuvwcESHk9xiXqu-jD-wvbvvpwuecWyAXmc0=)

name: Meg Platt
subject: meeting reminder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, I’m giving the Senator a Q4 fundraising update tomorrow, and here’s what I need to share with her:
* How much we have left to raise to hit our December fundraising goal
* How much support we have from 03264 this month
* Whether we anticipate needing to make budget cuts

**[Please – will you make sure that your name is on the list of donors I share with her? I’m doing the export at 7AM tomorrow, so there is still time to be included. Even $5 will work!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39905314/321940541/-913685435?refcode=e20211221_mpq4&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjBhNDUwNi04NDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BFul-3xFxtAdbkeNA50z6pDwC5jgbyFZYSaIdkXJDBA=)** Donations from 03264 are critical because right now, we’re not seeing as many as we projected. Making up ground will help us more accurately plan out TV ads, make staffing decisions, and talk to voters about how hard Maggie Hassan is fighting for them in the Senate. If our December fundraising ends up shy in 03264, I’m going to be left scrambling to explain to the Senator why that is, and our team is going to need to make budget cuts that could cost us this race – and the Senate majority. I need to ask again: **[please rush $5 or as much as you can to reelect Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire and protect the Senate majority. We’ve got a budget hole to fill by the time I meet with the boss tomorrow, and we really need your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39905315/321940542/-913685435?refcode=e20211221_mpq4&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjBhNDUwNi04NDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BFul-3xFxtAdbkeNA50z6pDwC5jgbyFZYSaIdkXJDBA=)** Thank you,
Meg _Meg Platt, Finance Director
Maggie for NH_

clean_body: Making an impact before 2022. . Or to receive fewer emails, . = 2022 is fast approaching, and so is our critical FEC filing deadline. After this deadline – which is midnight on December 31, 2021 – our fundraising numbers for the entirety of 2021 will go public. In previous FEC filing reports, we’ve blown expectations out of the water, so we don’t only have to beat our opponents. We’ve got to beat what we did last quarter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you for everything you do, Ben Ben Samuels is a Democrat running in Missouri’s Second Congressional District. As a sixth-generation Missourian, economic policy expert, and businessperson, Ben will work tirelessly to deliver results for the community his family has long called home. This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible. __= || || Ben Samuels for Congress 9621 Olive Blvd. P.O. Hi folks, Want to send you an update about where our digital fundraising stands right now: We set a 72-hour goal to raise $20,000 because we’re anticipating a big slump as folks log off and unplug for the holiday weekend. Michael doesn’t accept a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists — so he counts on grassroots donations to power this campaign. name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: I have a personal favor to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I didn’t want to be the one to tell you this but we’re out of option and Conservatives are dangerously behind our LAST AND MOST CRUCIAL deadline of the year.
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?34bmg--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

This is Sarah Huckabee Sanders. I have a personal favor to ask of you:
[**I’m hoping you’ll pitch in $17 right now. Why? Because Democrats just CRUSHED their “must-hit” fundraising goal AND outraised us by $115,000,000+ from texts and emails like this one.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-34bmg-1q91z-4qqlpo8/)
Conservatives are so close to winning back the House but if we give up now, all our hard work will be for NOTHING.
**This is urgent.** I’m partnering with my friend Steve Scalise to build an unstoppable surge of support to help our Conservative allies and defeat the Democrats NATIONWIDE.
[**We are both counting on you to be a part of it.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-34bmg-1q920-4qqlpo5/)
Look, we don’t have scores of Trump-hating billionaires forking over tons of cash to our campaigns, and we don’t have the Liberal Media on our side _**(trust me, I know that better than anyone)**... _
**But what we DO have is something to be much more proud of:**
We have a movement of strong Conservative Patriots who love our Country and believe we should ALWAYS PUT AMERICA FIRST.
[**We cannot win back the House alone. Please do your part and join us by chipping in $17 or more straight away.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-34bmg-1q921-4qqlpo6/)
Thanks for all you do.

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Texas Showdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| |
---
Fellow Conservative:

There are two types of Republicans in Congress – those who will stand up to their own party's leaders to advance conservative policies, and those who won't. It's that simple.

And with very few exceptions, the Republicans who will stand up to the establishment and actually fight for our principles are members of the House Freedom Caucus. You see, these conservatives know they have to work arm-in-arm with other like-minded lawmakers to overcome opposition from established elites in both parties.

This is why freedom-loving Americans in every state should support **Christian Collins** for Congress in the 8th District of Texas.
|
---
Christian Collins
Candidate for Congress, TX-08
|
---
Christian is a strong conservative leader who has publicly pledged to join the House Freedom Caucus if he's elected to replace retiring Congressman Kevin Brady (R-TX).

However, Christian is running against another Republican in the March 1 primary election, **Marcus Luttrell** , who has said he _will NOT join the Freedom Caucus._

It's why pro-establishment Republicans have endorsed Luttrell, not Collins. They want more yes-men, not principled leaders in the Freedom Caucus who will buck them when they side with the Democrats to mortgage our future.

**[Please join us in supporting Christian Collins with a generous contribution to his grassroots campaign.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zf5gpc38kulh095i266vtg4als0iftjm6ifq8g40_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chg69or4cdh2bs)**

HFF will pay all processing fees so Christian can spend 100% of your donation on voter contact.

Our polling shows Collins surging in this race and our goal is to get him into a head-to-head runoff with Luttrell next year. We're confident Collins can win that match-up, but he needs your help today.

**[Please support Christian Collins now.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zk99k58b1tk1hjifndh65a4uqqvftl03ibjmhjfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chg69or4cdh2bs)**

This race is very important because we're not going to build a conservative Congress and stop the Left's assault on our liberties with more pro-establishment Republicans. We need fighters with guts to stand up for our values – even if that means rejecting the liberal policies promoted by their own party leaders.

If we help elect Christian Collins, he will do just that. He will join Jim Jordan (R-OH), Lauren Boebert (R-CO), Scott Perry (R-PA), Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-GA), and others in the fight for our freedoms.

**[This is our chance to make a real difference so please take immediate action to support this outstanding candidate.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znc6k1pjorb1jfg5q2nfnds16pgqs0pcvi1qgsug_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chg69or4cdh2bs)**

Thank you for considering this important request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund
|
---
**FREEDOM CAUCUS**
**CANDIDATES**
|
---
**END OF THE MONTH**
**COUNTDOWN**
|
---
[**DONATE**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znfg0426t43a8jr036hrad4djg6s8mmb48vg9s8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chg69or4cdh2bs)
|
---
_**"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." – Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_
|
---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

name: Team Flowers
subject: Step 1: Defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. Step 2: Save our democracy.

Peter,
---
The liberal media continues to deny reality when they refuse to report fairly on what’s happening to this country.

Our so-called mainstream media has failed multiple times to report on the devastating Hunter Biden scandal that suggests our government has suffered from _**corruption and backdoor deals on an international scale.**_

Now they have scandals of their own. Chris Cuomo gets fired, and Don Lemon is under fire for trying to help out Jussie Smollett when his hate crime hoax imploded on itself!

But when the Russian Hoax got called out for its falsehood with the investigation into the Steele Dossier, how did the liberal media respond? _**By putting its head in the sand**_ , hoping Americans don’t come out in droves demanding accountability for the lies we’ve had to put up with for years now.

clean_body: | | | | We need facts in our news again Peter, The liberal media continues to deny reality when they refuse to report fairly on what’s happening to this country. Our so-called mainstream media has failed multiple times to report on the devastating Hunter Biden scandal that suggests our government has suffered from corruption and backdoor deals on an international scale. Now they have scandals of their own. Chris Cuomo gets fired, and Don Lemon is under fire for trying to help out Jussie Smollett when his hate crime hoax imploded on itself! But when the Russian Hoax got called out for its falsehood with the investigation into the Steele Dossier, how did the liberal media respond? By putting its head in the sand , hoping Americans don’t come out in droves demanding accountability for the lies we’ve had to put up with for years now. See my full explanation as to why the Liberal Media nonsense needs to end: This level of disservice to the American people cannot be tolerated. | Peter,

Do you remember the last time we had a true White Christmas in Baltimore? Odds are, you’ll have to strain your memory seeing as the last time we got a measurable amount of snow was in 2002. What’s more, the days leading up to this year’s holiday are expected to be warmer than usual. When I read statistics like that, I’m reminded of the adverse impact climate change continues to have on our planet and Maryland specifically. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: DeSantis asks for total control, wants 60+ women’s votes thrown out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Republican Florida Governor Ron DeSantis recently called for a dedicated police force to “investigate election crimes and fraud,” according to the Associated Press. In reality, this force would disqualify thousands of valid votes from women over the age of 60 who rely on ballot drop-boxes. Now, CNN reports that DeSantis wants “to reestablish a World War II-era civilian military force that he, not the Pentagon, would control.” DeSantis refuses to specify what he will order the force to do aside from “emergency response,” threatening that it will be able to “mobilize very, very quickly.” Val Demings is running to oust Marco Rubio from the Senate and turn the political tide against DeSantis and the GOP's insidious authoritarianism in Florida. And today Democratic women over 60—who DeSantis is targeting because they vote in larger numbers than any other demographic in Florida—are rallying behind Val Demings' historic progressive campaign. Right now, Marco Rubio's team is spreading vicious lies about Val Demings on every Floridian's television in an aggressive new attack ad spread. If Rubio and DeSantis succeed in turning Florida into a one-party state, that strain of right-wing authoritarianism will infect the entire country and our democracy will be permanently wounded. But in order to have their way, they must first crush Val Demings and destroy our movement. Val Demings was just two points behind in this race until the GOP's on-call millionaire donors wrote Marco Rubio a blank check last month so he could strengthen his lead. Today ahead of the upcoming FEC filing deadline we're still $6,000 short from hitting our fundraising goal. DeSantis' hand-picked secret police force will suppress the vote, handing Rubio another six years in the Senate, and inflaming right-wing authoritarianism nationwide if progressives don't step up right now. Will you stand with us right now, Peter? **[Help us fight this, Peter: Please, chip in $1, $10, or even $100 if you can by midnight tonight to help us hit our fundraising goal. We need your immediate support to buck Ron DeSantis' voter suppression campaign and end Marco Rubio's dangerous Senate career. clean_body: | | | Peter, Republican Florida Governor Ron DeSantis recently called for a dedicated police force to “investigate election crimes and fraud,” according to the Associated Press. In reality, this force would disqualify thousands of valid votes from women over the age of 60 who rely on ballot drop-boxes. Now, CNN reports that DeSantis wants “to reestablish a World War II-era civilian military force that he, not the Pentagon, would control.” DeSantis refuses to specify what he will order the force to do aside from “emergency response,” threatening that it will be able to “mobilize very, very quickly.” Val Demings is running to oust Marco Rubio from the Senate and turn the political tide against DeSantis and the GOP's insidious authoritarianism in Florida. And today Democratic women over 60—who DeSantis is targeting because they vote in larger numbers than any other demographic in Florida—are rallying behind Val Demings' historic progressive campaign. Right now, Marco Rubio's team is spreading vicious lies about Val Demings on every Floridian's television in an aggressive new attack ad spread. If Rubio and DeSantis succeed in turning Florida into a one-party state, that strain of right-wing authoritarianism will infect the entire country and our democracy will be permanently wounded. But in order to have their way, they must first crush Val Demings and destroy our movement. Val Demings was just two points behind in this race until the GOP's on-call millionaire donors wrote Marco Rubio a blank check last month so he could strengthen his lead. Today ahead of the upcoming FEC filing deadline we're still $6,000 short from hitting our fundraising goal. DeSantis' hand-picked secret police force will suppress the vote, handing Rubio another six years in the Senate, and inflaming right-wing authoritarianism nationwide if progressives don't step up right now. Will you stand with us right now, Peter? = | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with us. Hi —

My opponent, James Lankford, has made his positions clear on critical issues impacting Oklahomans: he has voted against paid leave and against affordable healthcare for working families, and he’s in favor of the Supreme Court gutting Roe v. Wade, taking away a woman’s right to make her own medical decisions. **He’s leading Oklahoma to the bottom on a lot of today’s top issues.**

Everywhere I go, I hear that James Lankford no longer represents everyday Oklahomans like you and me. And yet, he continues to raise massive sums of money.

I am running against self-serving politicians to work for you and if elected will make history as the first woman Senator from our state. But I need your support.

**[Our first Federal Election Commission (FEC) reporting deadline is on New Year’s Eve and my team has no choice but to have a strong report. With the holidays approaching, I’m asking for your help now. Will you rush $10 or anything you can?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39907491/321950509/-1020040127?amount=10&contactdata=sObSiS4dJtr%2BDAS52DlPdKC6OyC8sDbRQQ8jZ9kRxDb0fgVRay9X7Y33T02rVpi4hRCwZnlZWAymoyS3hvYichynrInkVAD3144ZnmKlC98%3D&refcode2=069d04fb-8d62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_211221_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjlkMDRmYi04ZDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebHEQXjWa1vCFynGEJ2rHc1fizEgwwNsfSxVytmnOb0=)**

I’m scared of what would happen if the Supreme Court left reproductive health up to the states. Oklahomans have already seen what happened in our neighboring state of Texas — heck, we see desperate people coming into our state all the time because of it.

The discussion should not be about restricting women's access to healthcare, but instead about broadening access to contraceptives, education, childcare, paid leave, and improving Oklahoma’s healthcare system, **_which is ranked 48th in the country._**

We need leaders who will actually listen to Oklahomans all across our great state and represent them in Washington. I’m ready to do so, but first I have to hit this goal.

**Senator Lankford’s team, prospective endorsers, and everyone in between will be looking at this report. Let’s make it a strong one.

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/madison-fr-dec21](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39907498/321950516/-1020040127?amount=10&contactdata=sObSiS4dJtr%2BDAS52DlPdKC6OyC8sDbRQQ8jZ9kRxDb0fgVRay9X7Y33T02rVpi4hRCwZnlZWAymoyS3hvYichynrInkVAD3144ZnmKlC98%3D&refcode2=069d04fb-8d62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_211221_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjlkMDRmYi04ZDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebHEQXjWa1vCFynGEJ2rHc1fizEgwwNsfSxVytmnOb0=)**

clean_body: | = Hi — My opponent, James Lankford, has made his positions clear on critical issues impacting Oklahomans: he has voted against paid leave and against affordable healthcare for working families, and he’s in favor of the Supreme Court gutting Roe v. Wade, taking away a woman’s right to make her own medical decisions. He’s leading Oklahoma to the bottom on a lot of today’s top issues. Everywhere I go, I hear that James Lankford no longer represents everyday Oklahomans like you and me. And yet, he continues to raise massive sums of money. I am running against self-serving politicians to work for you and if elected will make history as the first woman Senator from our state. But I need your support. = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly = = = = = = I’m scared of what would happen if the Supreme Court left reproductive health up to the states. Oklahomans have already seen what happened in our neighboring state of Texas — heck, we see desperate people coming into our state all the time because of it. The discussion should not be about restricting women's access to healthcare, but instead about broadening access to contraceptives, education, childcare, paid leave, and improving Oklahoma’s healthcare system, which is ranked 48th in the country. We need leaders who will actually listen to Oklahomans all across our great state and represent them in Washington. I’m ready to do so, but first I have to hit this goal. Senator Lankford’s team, prospective endorsers, and everyone in between will be looking at this report. Let’s make it a strong one. = Let’s get to work! Madison | = | = Our country is facing major challenges that demand action from servant leaders to work together to build on America’s legacy. Madison is running for Senate to work towards the promise of the American dream and represent Oklahomans who have been left behind by self-serving politicians. Together, united by a common set of values, we can work to fight inequities, secure and defend our country, and build a better future. Help support her campaign by = Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison Oklahomans for Madison PO Box 2601 Oklahoma City, OK 73101 United States **

body:
You won't catch us on HGTV any time soon, but that doesn't mean we don't believe everyday objects need a little **refresh** every now and again.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39907560/321950827/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWYzNDYxOS04ZTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=awdbPPtxyLejdI7S9DriTuOlylxz8p37Ldsw_YV8OvE=)

Peter,

You won't catch us on HGTV any time soon, but that doesn't mean we don't believe everyday objects need a little **refresh** now and again. If you're feeling like your laptop, bike, fridge, or water bottle could use a bit of a makeover -- we have an idea: **Team Tom bumper stickers.**

But in all seriousness: Our bumper stickers aren't just for looks. They help get the word out about Tom's campaign, and in a field this crowded, every conversation could make the difference between winning and losing.

**_[So, Team: Will you lend a little piece of your favorite surface to support Tom? Click HERE to get your Team Tom bumper stickers!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39907561/321950828/804242737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWYzNDYxOS04ZTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=awdbPPtxyLejdI7S9DriTuOlylxz8p37Ldsw_YV8OvE=&emci=7f729669-7549-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1ef34619-8e62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)_**

We're blown away by the support we've seen for Tom so far, and want to keep this momentum going -- and that starts with you! We can win this race and help Tom build a brighter future for Maryland families if we continue to lend our time, money, and enough space for a sticker (or two!).

_**[Click here to get yours, and help spread the word in your area!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39907563/321950830/804242737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWYzNDYxOS04ZTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=awdbPPtxyLejdI7S9DriTuOlylxz8p37Ldsw_YV8OvE=&emci=7f729669-7549-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1ef34619-8e62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)**_

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Our healthcare system is at a breaking point
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39907626/321951062/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDUxYjY2NS04ZTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zJd6A8Dh9BTeR_cASr1nSjY5ru5gKW_GZsdLbXEn9vo=&emci=427f94de-8862-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e451b665-8e62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

COVID-19 cases are skyrocketing in Rhode Island and staffing shortages are plaguing the healthcare system. As a result, Rhode Island's emergency care system is at a breaking point, with patients spending many hours in emergency waiting rooms and care providers stretched too thin.

Times of crisis call for real leadership, and once again the current administration is moving too slowly.

**Yesterday, I put out a plan to address the dangerous hospital staffing shortages:**
* Use federal stimulus funding to immediately boost compensation for nurses, CNAs, and techs in emergency room settings.
* Call up the National Guard to assist with administrative and technician functions, freeing up nurses to focus on the work only they can do. Just this morning, Governor Baker in Massachusetts activated the National Guard, joining Maine, New Hampshire and others in taking this action.
* Grant temporary reciprocity to healthcare workers with medical licenses in neighboring states.
* Temporarily suspend licensing requirements to allow certain trained medical professionals such as EMTs, paramedics, and retired nurses to assist in hospitals.
* Ensure all hospital employees have access to counseling services as burnout from the past two years is a huge factor in retaining nurses and other healthcare professionals.

We need leadership and we must take these short-term actions to save lives. We also need to address the structural issues that caused staffing issues even before the pandemic.

It's going to take all of us doing our part to get through this surge - getting boosted, wearing masks, and socially distancing. I hope that you and your loved ones stay safe and healthy during these challenging times.

Thank you,

Seth

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawn=20Hyland?=
subject: The Left’s Economic Plan is Destroying American Work Ethic
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2fcb6f999c01/the-lefts-economic-plan-is-destroying-american-work-ethic?e=5167ed8367)
---
|
---
# Americans want to get back to rebuilding our nation while keeping Washington out of the picture
Peter,One of the best qualities of American tradition is our heart for the destitute and our desire to eliminate poverty whenever it arises. Stemming from our long history of charity and altruism, many Americans have taken upon ourselves to create a nation which provides opportunity for all its people.
| [HELP ME KEEP AMERICAN OPPORTUNITY ALIVE, DONATE TO MY CAMPAIGN](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=e259e7657b&e=5167ed8367)
---
American opportunity and economic liberty have already proven themselves to indispensable cornerstones of our Republic. The world wants to imitate our success with millions eager for the chance to call themselves Americans. We are exceptional because we built a nation that rewards hard work, encourages innovation, and empowers good ideas. But the story of American opportunity goes ever further.We have enjoyed the fruits of an economic system that has produced the hardest workers and finest minds around the world. Strong families, competitive universities, and public libraries gave each generation the tools necessary to build good lives for themselves and their families. Millions upon millions of Americans left poverty this way. We still boast a strong, competitive, and educated pool of workers.The reckless spending of today’s government, unfortunately, has cut American businesses off at the knees and is disincentivizing workers.Just last month, the New Jersey Business and Industry Association [released their outlook survey](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=7f7f6397bc&e=5167ed8367). 28% of small businesses in our state will be sold or close sooner than expected and another 31% of small business owners are unsure about the future of their business. The number one reason for this burdensome business outlook was rising inflation costs.
| [VOLUNTEER AND HELP BRING PRINCIPLED, NJ LEADERSHIP TO WASHINGTON](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=b17ce01e0f&e=5167ed8367)
---
We must decrease taxes on small businesses and lift burdensome regulations to unleash economic opportunity zones in local neighborhoods so American workers are once again motivated by rising wages, eager to take risks with their own businesses, and reinspire investors to have the confidence to expand our commercial sector.We can ensure with economic freedom that everyone has an equal opportunity to succeed. We need to prove to Americans, and New Jerseyans, that good policy with a local approach, small government, and increased opportunity through free enterprise is the way forward for healthy nations.I know that budgets are tight right now and inflation is dampening the holiday spirit, but I am confident that Americans still have the spirit of generosity that has come to define the Christmas season. Our country has been through worse and I’m confident that the American people will once again stand resilient in the face of adversity, it’s part of our heritage. I hope you’ll join me on that journey to a better America and New Jersey. I wish you and your family a very Merry Christmas. Shawn Hyland
|
---
| | | | [](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=5b3210725a&e=5167ed8367)| [](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=74e0b5dabe&e=5167ed8367)| [](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=d1ec603697&e=5167ed8367)| [](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=01c47f27a4&e=5167ed8367)

| [HELP US FIX DEMOCRACY](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=31b7930481&e=42a933bda9 "HELP US FIX DEMOCRACY")
---
| |
# Let’s talk about Sen. Joe Manchin...

I know... it’s crazy to hear a Democratic candidate bash another Dem, but if we care about honesty, this needs to be said.

For those of you who haven’t seen it, Manchin went on Fox News on Sunday to say that he will not be voting in favor of the Build Back Better Act. Needless to say, I’m livid.

Sen. Manchin’s disingenuous attempts to continuously derail one of the most progressive pieces of legislation in our country’s history is unconscionable.

**Here’s some of what Manchin is voting against:**
* Universal pre-k
* Expanded child tax credits
* The boldest legislation addressing climate change in U.S. history
* Reduced prescription drug costs
* Expanding the ACA
* Investment in affordable housing
* Expanded Pell Grants for students going to college
* Substantial investment in our rural communities

Sounds crazy to not be in favor of this, right? To add to the insult, Manchin is using the same Republican talking points used to stifle climate legislation for years.

I do not care if Manchin is a Democrat. Politicians like him, who spread misinformation and play games with the health and safety of this nation for his own benefit, are the problem.

Our government is broken. What can we do about this? Easy. **Send competent people who actually care about everyday, working people and their families to Congress.**

I need help ousting a terrible Republican conspiracy theorist who cares far more about maintaining his power than helping the people of Wisconsin. **[We have 10 DAYS before our first filing deadline. I’m asking you to help chip in a little bit today, so we can help this country tomorrow.](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=230c0eba16&e=42a933bda9)**

Sincerely,
Jessica

body:

| Friend,
Critical Race Theory may have been defeated in Virginia, but the Radical Left is determined to make sure it's taught to our children across the rest of the country.
Just because they suffered losses doesn't mean they will give up, but neither will we.
They have tried to bully and strong-arm concerned parents and proud patriots from speaking out. President Biden militarized the DOJ and FBI against Americans exercising their First Amendment rights by speaking out at school board meetings.

Joe Lombardo believes in protecting and defending America's borders.
As an Army veteran, and as Sheriff of Nevada's largest county, Joe has protected our freedoms, our values, and our safety, and that mission to keep us safe extends to securing our home from the record number of illegal immigrants pouring across the Southern Border.
Do you agree with the Sheriff that our home needs to be protected and secured?

clean_body: Joe Lombardo believes in protecting and defending America’s borders. | | | | | | | == | | Peter, Joe Lombardo believes in protecting and defending America's borders. As an Army veteran, and as Sheriff of Nevada's largest county, Joe has protected our freedoms, our values, and our safety, and that mission to keep us safe extends to securing our home from the record number of illegal immigrants pouring across the Southern Border. Do you agree with the Sheriff that our home needs to be protected and secured? Let us know with a quick signature on the petition below: | | | == | == | Joe's the only candidate in the race for Governor to have put bad guys behind bars or deported violent criminals... He knows what keeping Nevada safe from illegal immigration really means. If you're with him in stopping the Open Borders that only lead to higher crime, and empowered drug cartels and human traffickers, == Add your name to the petition below, and let's show that we want a secure border in order to protect the country! | | | == | Thank you for signing your support, Team Joe Lombardo | | Lombardo for Governor | == | == == == | | Lombardo for Governor | P.O. body:
We know you’ve been working hard to take back our Republican Senate majority.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1mcnp7rnio466jjftf3plsb7taoe97sg0bc6h70_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqrcd3mcgp66p1iemr6eopj6tj64p72c6q38crim1in3d5nmuqmap3m6iojecln6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti61j31d5jcorr5cb66pgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5g68p36c9i61oh5u)
Fellow Conservative, We know you’ve been working hard to take back our Republican Senate majority.

That’s why we want you to have this **[limited edition Membership Card](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7g2ceu7ttn3b5bqaeitqjjblbl0lfshrnd88am8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chi6coj4c3h2bs) **for our grassroots conservatives. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zojeb6e63qhoibl6sqs934uhjl077iqlgk9nci20_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chi6coj4c3h2bs) [**GET YOUR CARD**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkikfr6nbk86elafeqhnl1i4fhul5so0t2v4s2h8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chi6coj4c3h2bs) _The radical Left may try to cancel you._

_Your Democrat neighbors might get “offended.”_

**But this card shows the world that NOTHING will stop you from supporting President Trump and putting America first with a Republican Senate Majority.**

We only have a limited amount of Membership Cards to give out, so be sure to claim yours day before it’s too late!

**[Get your Membership Card TODAY and show the world that you’re a card-carrying Trump patriot helping TAKE BACK THE SENATE.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpt032e22f9jek2p8j4srmkrc3jg8qu02apqi3co_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chi6coj4c3h2bs)** [**GET YOUR CARD**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvjkfmmiskdi57cja1muraeg5ripajrih9iahrro_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chi6coj4c3h2bs) Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. We need patriots from across the country to join the fight and do their part to help win back the Senate majority. This is a team effort! Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.

| Friends, It's that time of the year again! A little more than a year ago, we were able to take back the majority in the New Hampshire Senate. It is because of support from Granite Staters like you that we were successful! **And look at all the good that our majority has done!**
* **$300 million in property tax relief**
* **Tax cuts across the board for NH businesses**
* **Prohibition on discriminatory teachings in NH schools**
* **An end to late-term abortion**
* **School choice for low-income families**

NH Senate Republicans are going to keep fighting for you, but we need your help if we want to keep Republicans in the charge and grow our majority in 2022!

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Want to become a 2022 Sustaining Member of the NH Senate Republicans? | | | Friends, It's that time of the year again! A little more than a year ago, we were able to take back the majority in the New Hampshire Senate. It is because of support from Granite Staters like you that we were successful! And look at all the good that our majority has done! $300 million in property tax relief Tax cuts across the board for NH businesses Prohibition on discriminatory teachings in NH schools An end to late-term abortion School choice for low-income families NH Senate Republicans are going to keep fighting for you, but we need your help if we want to keep Republicans in the charge and grow our majority in 2022! | | | | | | That's why we are asking you to consider renewing your membership or becoming a new sustaining member of the NH Senate Republicans by pledging a monthly donation of $5, $15, or even $25 per month.** By becoming a sustaining member and signing up to make a small monthly contribution, you will help ensure that we have the funds we need to fight back against all of the Democrats' false attacks that we know will be coming over the next year. Thank you, The New Hampshire Senate Republicans | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Chuck Morse Chairman | | | NH Senate Republicans PAC | | P.O. name: Matt Schoonmaker, Campaign Manager, John Cranley for Governor
subject: Hi, I’m Matt.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
Inside info for our strongest supporters. | Hey there, I’m glad to get the chance to introduce myself. I’m Matt, and I’m proud to join John’s team as his campaign manager. I know that together — and with your help — we can build a movement that will finally flip Ohio from red to blue. [**(I have to say it: The best way you can directly impact our campaign’s success is by making a donation of any size, right here, right now.)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909302/321958770/-1406512299?amount=15&refcode=ea.e87b9f5f-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.e87b9f5f-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODdiOWY1Zi05NDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OuT5chmcaqFAw__h2mk-Autjejn6YpjkSoR0l0CZrVE=) As we head into the election year, I want to take a moment to update our strongest supporters like you on what we’ve been up to and where we are: John spent this month traveling across Ohio talking to voters where they are — including in Dayton, where Dayton Fire Fighters Local 136 endorsed our campaign. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909303/321958774/-1406512299?amount=15&refcode=ea.e87b9f5f-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.e87b9f5f-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODdiOWY1Zi05NDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OuT5chmcaqFAw__h2mk-Autjejn6YpjkSoR0l0CZrVE=) He spoke with community organizers in Toledo about his plan to bring Ohio back. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909304/321958781/-1406512299?amount=15&refcode=ea.e87b9f5f-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.e87b9f5f-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODdiOWY1Zi05NDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OuT5chmcaqFAw__h2mk-Autjejn6YpjkSoR0l0CZrVE=) And he got to know folks around the Cleveland area who are ready to support our campaign. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909305/321958788/-1406512299?amount=15&refcode=ea.e87b9f5f-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.e87b9f5f-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODdiOWY1Zi05NDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OuT5chmcaqFAw__h2mk-Autjejn6YpjkSoR0l0CZrVE=) In recent weeks, we’ve also earned endorsements Ohio Legislative Black Caucus President state Rep. Thomas West, Columbus Fire Fighters Local 67, Warren Mayor Doug Franklin, state Sen. Teresa Fedor, and the Stark County Black Caucus. **As our coalition grows, it’s clearer than ever that this campaign is consistently building the momentum we need to win next year.** I firmly believe that our campaign already has a path to victory, but we do need to have resources on hand to keep up our efforts and start preparing a field program to get out the vote in the primary. **[I know you care about flipping Ohio blue and electing a leader who can turn our state around, so I’m asking personally if you could chip in just $15 or any amount that works for you right now. Click here to give, and thanks in advance>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909306/321958795/-1406512299?amount=15&refcode=ea.e87b9f5f-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.e87b9f5f-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODdiOWY1Zi05NDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OuT5chmcaqFAw__h2mk-Autjejn6YpjkSoR0l0CZrVE=)** John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909316/321958811/-1406512299?refcode=ea.e87b9f5f-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.e87b9f5f-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODdiOWY1Zi05NDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OuT5chmcaqFAw__h2mk-Autjejn6YpjkSoR0l0CZrVE=)

clean_body: Inside info for our strongest supporters. | Hey there, I’m glad to get the chance to introduce myself. I’m Matt, and I’m proud to join John’s team as his campaign manager. I know that together — and with your help — we can build a movement that will finally flip Ohio from red to blue. = As we head into the election year, I want to take a moment to update our strongest supporters like you on what we’ve been up to and where we are: John spent this month traveling across Ohio talking to voters where they are — including in Dayton, where Dayton Fire Fighters Local 136 endorsed our campaign. = He spoke with community organizers in Toledo about his plan to bring Ohio back. = And he got to know folks around the Cleveland area who are ready to support our campaign. = In recent weeks, we’ve also earned endorsements Ohio Legislative Black Caucus President state Rep. Thomas West, Columbus Fire Fighters Local 67, Warren Mayor Doug Franklin, state Sen. Teresa Fedor, and the Stark County Black Caucus. As our coalition grows, it’s clearer than ever that this campaign is consistently building the momentum we need to win next year. I firmly believe that our campaign already has a path to victory, but we do need to have resources on hand to keep up our efforts and start preparing a field program to get out the vote in the primary. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = I’ll be in touch, Matt Schoonmaker = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

subject: We don’t want to look back and wonder ‘what if’

body:

#
---
Team — Primary election day is exactly 70 days away. It’s going to be here before we know it, and we’ve got a lot of work left to do before folks start voting. We need to reach out to voters across every inch of Texas, but that’s going to take big-time resources. We have a plan to do that, and we need your help to make sure we have the resources to fully fund our strategy to fight to earn every vote in every county. [**Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign as we head into the final stretch? We’ll put your contribution to use immediately for critical voter contact work:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909330/321958829/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211221_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdiOWY1Zi05NDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sUyW5RgrHi0hOm7JV2DK5KWqaEBFMzGgo-zlQ5fzDPg=) | [CHIP IN $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909331/321958830/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211221_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdiOWY1Zi05NDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sUyW5RgrHi0hOm7JV2DK5KWqaEBFMzGgo-zlQ5fzDPg=)

Folks, this is going to be a close race. No matter how hard Dan Patrick tries to ignore our campaign, Texans across our beloved state are hungry for change. They’ve witnessed Dan Patrick ignore working families and put his corporate PAC donors first for eight long years.
When voters hear from Mike, they understand that he’ll put people first and fight for the needs of _all Texans —_ not just those at the top or the well-connected.
Here’s the thing: We don’t want to look back after the primary and wonder if we could have done more. With 70 days to go, that means we need to make sure our campaign plan gets fully funded _right now_.
[**Can you make a $3 donation today to help us invest in critical organizing work? The only way we will win is by building a powerful grassroots movement:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909332/321958831/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211221_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdiOWY1Zi05NDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sUyW5RgrHi0hOm7JV2DK5KWqaEBFMzGgo-zlQ5fzDPg=)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Democrats need to take action before it's too late
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The American people voted for Democrats in 2020 to take action and deliver
— to reduce prescription drug costs, fight climate change, pass paid
leave, cancel student debt, protect access to abortion, and so much more.

But they haven’t done any of it. We agree with AOC:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87813?refcode=em20211221-21084&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21084%2E1203867%2EqmcLPM ]Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez tweet that reads 'It is actually delusional to
believe Dems can get re-elected without acting on filibuster or student
debt, Biden breaking his BBB promise, letting CTC lapse, 0 path to
citizenship, etc Esp when they run from convos abt race+culture (which is
what 1/6 was abt) We need to act now"

By not taking action on the filibuster or student debt, with Biden
breaking his promise to deliver investments for working families, and by
failing to provide a pathway to citizenship — Democrats will suffer in the
midterms.

And we’ve seen this play out before. When Democrats lose elections, they
blame progressives. But it’s clear that the Democratic Party has failed to
meet the urgency of this moment — and the American people are taking
notice.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87813?refcode=em20211221-21084&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21084%2E1203867%2EqmcLPM ]We need change now. Our Justice Democrats in Congress and our
progressive primary candidates will bring about a the change we
desperately need. Will you donate $3 right now to elect
progressives and transform the Democratic Party?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87813?refcode=em20211221-21084&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21084%2E1203867%2EqmcLPM ]Contribute $3

The vast majority of voters may know absolutely nothing about Joe Manchin,
the infrastructure bill, or even Build Back Better. All they know is that
Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have failed to deliver on the policies
that they campaigned on.

Establishment politicians don’t govern in the people’s interests, but then
are surprised when they lose elections.

For months, corporate lobbyists called the shots and fought to remove
progressive priorities in the reconciliation bill, strike down provisions
for climate action, and water down spending for necessary and popular
programs. But, when Democrats lose elections — as they did in Virginia —
they blame progressives instead of their own inaction.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87813?refcode=em20211221-21084&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=21084%2E1203867%2EqmcLPM ]AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, and our Justice Democrats’ primary
candidates are the future of the Democratic Party. Give right now,
whatever you can, to help us elect more progressive champions to fight
alongside the Squad.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=21084%2E1203867%2EqmcLPM ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=21084%2E1203867%2EqmcLPM ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211221-21084-footer&t=1026&refcode2=21084_1203867_qmcLPM&akid=21084%2E1203867%2EqmcLPM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=21084%2E1203867%2EqmcLPM

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[ ]AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, and our Justice Democrats’ primary candidates are the future of the Democratic Party. Give right now, whatever you can, to help us elect more progressive champions to fight alongside the Squad. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

subject: When democracy is threatened, who keeps your vote safe?

body:
Elections you can trust with a leader you can trust.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909964/321963496/651272630?refcode=EM_C_211221Meadows_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODBjZDY4Zi05ODYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d6Ux_4xMc0UjeR217BpDS1hplRu94j3B-0dhhx5p1LQ=&emci=03974c03-a75e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=080cd68f-9862-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3583156)
They came after our elections in New Mexico in 2020 – and they’ll do it again.
_Distrust in our elections may be the most important issue we are dealing with in our democracy today._

As I’m sure you already know, evidence recently surfaced regarding Trump Chief of Staff Mark Meadows’ emails and a PowerPoint that included plans to declare all electronic voting invalid, replace Biden electors with Trump electors, and create a fake national security emergency to delay the certification.
**We simply cannot let conspiracy-fueled extremism threaten the sanctity of our democracy.**
**Do you think the organizers of the January 6th insurrection should be held accountable?**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909966/321963498/651272630?refcode=EM_C_211221Meadows_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_G_N_L1_YES&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODBjZDY4Zi05ODYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d6Ux_4xMc0UjeR217BpDS1hplRu94j3B-0dhhx5p1LQ=&emci=03974c03-a75e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=080cd68f-9862-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3583156)[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909967/321963501/651272630?refcode=EM_C_211221Meadows_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_G_N_B1_YES&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODBjZDY4Zi05ODYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d6Ux_4xMc0UjeR217BpDS1hplRu94j3B-0dhhx5p1LQ=&emci=03974c03-a75e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=080cd68f-9862-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3583156)
