**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909972/321963512/651272630?refcode=EM_C_211221Meadows_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_G_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODBjZDY4Zi05ODYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d6Ux_4xMc0UjeR217BpDS1hplRu94j3B-0dhhx5p1LQ=&emci=03974c03-a75e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=080cd68f-9862-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3583156)**
As New Mexico’s Secretary of State, **Maggie Toulouse Oliver knows what it takes to keep your vote protected.**
We hope you will stand with us.

Team MTO
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy!**_ _**______[FIND OUT MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909973/321963535/1198618133?refcode=EM_C_211221Meadows_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_G_N_BIO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODBjZDY4Zi05ODYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d6Ux_4xMc0UjeR217BpDS1hplRu94j3B-0dhhx5p1LQ=&emci=03974c03-a75e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=080cd68f-9862-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3583156)**_

subject: A fatal blow to Build Back Better
body:
Reason is what's needed in Washington
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cYETOMVgL8yjU1UBZJQHcMjLC2PAf02hBBE4wou5SDsPRWGDLtB8QQnnixi6UF931A0lU70qxO3kc4NT8Q5fs4PcBwRq4d50pm197RSrWrPEwMhTMAZm2poKltSwa0w3-9nXwFNN9XLO3Nqi3TsHQu7NRLSrddCw&c=bVORYGyHYpL0SVZwI2nnRz2JxzrH3K4v9aCnZv-s7xkVeK8pL5-9rA==&ch=q__Z3pmYPHKZVQy6qtJCNJW0Pjhu0Cpm_uAikG54yTQVGm0LA88GaA==)

# Fatal blow to Build Back Better
---
"I can't get there."
On Sunday, Sen. Joe Manchin said he would not support the Democrat insanity of the "Build Back Better" bill. I applaud the senator for acting on what is best for America rather than bowing to party ideology.
The Build Back Better bill would be like throwing gasoline on the fire of inflation already burning in our nation. Additionally, the social spending in this bill would impact an already weakened work force and crush small businesses trying to reach full employment. But the fight isn't over. Watch for this bill to be repurposed next year as Democrats look to socialize America.
Next up, Democrats will attempt to cram through voting rights legislation before the end of the year--if passed, it will fundamentally change elections in our nation, and virtually guarantee one-party rule remains in Washington.
Among a litany of changes, the Freedom to Vote Act expands voter registration (in the way of automatic and same-day registration) and voting access (vote-by-mail and early voting). It also limits removing voters from voter rolls. The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act of 2021 is proposed legislation that would restore and strengthen parts of the Voting Rights Act of 1965, certain portions of which were struck down by two United States Supreme Court decisions.
These two pieces of legislation essentially hijack our elections, giving power to the federal government through "preclearance" checks by the states, and twists laws to make it virtually impossible for states to defend their laws. It's a Washington power grab designed to keep Democrats in power.
We need more people in Washington to stand up for what's right and who put country before party. Help me get to Washington to stop the takeover by the radical left. Please join our cause by donating today.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I knew the price I’d have to pay....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But it didn't matter. I had to do what was right for our country.

Peter,

President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59078387:6gV_s1ENQ:m:1:3298722022:C87FBEC67E7EA433EC4E0AADE0317451:r)

**I knew full well the price I 'd have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn't matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59078387:6gV_s1ENQ:m:1:3298722022:C87FBEC67E7EA433EC4E0AADE0317451:r)

**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
As President Trump said, there aren't many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.

I refused to let the Deep State and their stooges in Congress take down President Trump for crimes he did not commit.

Because if they could do it to a sitting president they disagreed with, then what could they one day do to you?

As I said, I knew the Deep State would try to ruin me for having the guts to defend President Trump and find him innocent.

[🚨I’m worried that North Carolina is on the verge of flipping blue and becoming a failed Socialist experiment🚨](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=ae16685105b04aa7a0583b3a245a3623&_e=mx1pQUrToAuwmWVYKT6v9qv737XHnIYezmJe7AIIHx0HU9gPFmSoswr_JXK43zNC8c2BAPatAvXJN6Zd2ubgZGbxzwZyXCISZZDEdvL3-9W3ztapa6BV4EgKxNnRWzXuMUoIG3BJqByshfNVebmHmF1ZndFYEXu1xiyZznIJcpSq98eLeePOrnH0-ndX9a1SegNHJrMOoDLmUqI6SUMJhguENTc7OkaTNDRnumI2xcE7lWsk4jYOPG3J9iTWZkouptnmEa2DRRhgf4vGyqJCOiE_xxonbUGCM7XcwWLolt2BSaTyGmkh8zN6SIi4y60I1uvQtIGwMFyySwL7UM5VtcNMb9YzAptMwHd0AQo_oRZEHp9pIjwQ9n4EHzRoJEig9nNrk_dkZMqlIlNVD8tdP_JVDBxHL8AyRCiHq133Pb9MxI3TRL1aZ6cRkPMHLEiUKlpSyTo8hqIffwRtHMdQK9v6idycnbKc56UJdbcGF_Y%3D)

[🚨I’m worried that soon, our streets will see rampant crime, chaos, and violence🚨](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=ae16685105b04aa7a0583b3a245a3623&_e=mx1pQUrToAuwmWVYKT6v9qv737XHnIYezmJe7AIIHx0HU9gPFmSoswr_JXK43zNC8c2BAPatAvXJN6Zd2ubgZGbxzwZyXCISZZDEdvL3-9W3ztapa6BV4EgKxNnRWzXuMUoIG3BJqByshfNVebmHmF1ZndFYEXu1xiyZznIJcpSq98eLeePOrnH0-ndX9a1SegNHJrMOoDLmUqI6SUMJhguENTc7OkaTNDRnumI2xcE7lWsk4jYOPG3J9iTWZkouyx10z75dxVRwh5H2IiYrgwyrnKMwLvDFnUQOxVOHd1Zfz9Jkxf7rPD1sb5YAJUc1BMkBrftRcLhS_VkJFAAMRzCVMIo-RwAxOS05S04ydDXHCWNeM3k51HrEap3mKdzdd_iA-Ao8DM7iwkP7-yzmOfowZkBxvvzZSp1x4SmrlAUV1FiEt88SA-yKKCwPJcBXWPgxvYt3HuyPC5eF8dpNYm_wFuukBRCsFw8xNSkKu-4%3D)

I’m worried - aren’t you?**

We are so close to losing our country, and if we’re going to stop the Radical Left, **we have to win North Carolina.** That means rejecting RINOs who will only appease the Socialist Squad. It means electing a true, proven conservative, who isn’t afraid of standing up for our rights, values, and freedoms. **It means electing a conservative who has President Trump’s highest endorsement.**

I’m endorsed by Trump and I’m ready to stop Socialism dead in its tracks. But, if we’re going to keep North Carolina RED and stop Trump-hating Pat McCrory from stealing this seat, **we need to ensure that we meet our End-of-Year fundraising goal.** Believe me - these fundraising deadlines are crucial.

**[I cannot beat a 32-year, career politician like Pat McCrory without your support RIGHT NOW - will you join me?](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=ae16685105b04aa7a0583b3a245a3623&_e=mx1pQUrToAuwmWVYKT6v9qv737XHnIYezmJe7AIIHx0HU9gPFmSoswr_JXK43zNC8c2BAPatAvXJN6Zd2ubgZGbxzwZyXCISZZDEdvL3-9W3ztapa6BV4EgKxNnRWzXuMUoIG3BJqByshfNVebmHmF1ZndFYEXu1xiyZznIJcpSq98eLeePOrnH0-ndX9a1SegNHJrMOoDLmUqI6SUMJhguENTc7OkaTNDRnumI2xcE7lWsk4jYOPG3J9iTWZkouBQRxoj82G9XP_tn0Va-RncERa3EXCGXsXXAv_j9uXLnr25bp0vc9VVJJ5HfQaqJ2v192Q6349Q2mETyPiAsBEK8SDl2AYN4uQj1ljSnbD5BB7im0xc4HB8jXN0gghv0_7ZtFOSVmBctu_7X-WPm6oa5X2DeSe_8a7ZeHp1AYwtJcGU_5YqXqeOexyYXLQ-aiEsArq61pH9SXG6wJOr9uPRXMv9cSnxfJ-guHdOzRbz0%3D)**

clean_body: Aren’t you? | TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Friend, I’m extremely worried. I’m worried - aren’t you? We are so close to losing our country, and if we’re going to stop the Radical Left, we have to win North Carolina. That means rejecting RINOs who will only appease the Socialist Squad. It means electing a true, proven conservative, who isn’t afraid of standing up for our rights, values, and freedoms. It means electing a conservative who has President Trump’s highest endorsement. I’m endorsed by Trump and I’m ready to stop Socialism dead in its tracks. But, if we’re going to keep North Carolina RED and stop Trump-hating Pat McCrory from stealing this seat, we need to ensure that we meet our End-of-Year fundraising goal. Believe me - these fundraising deadlines are crucial. God Bless, Ted Budd TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA | Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Margie Bright Matthews
subject: Why I’m supporting Mia for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia for South Carolina
body:
Our best shot at defeating Henry McMaster. | | | Friends, My name is Margie Bright Matthews, and I serve with Mia McLeod in the South Carolina State Senate. **[Before I tell you more about why I’m supporting Mia, will you consider chipping in a donation to her campaign for governor? With the new year approaching, it’s so important her campaign gets off to the strongest start possible in 2022.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6gX0kiVsN444dnYrQFTx5rXkPoP2SVK0_suQdMHto7x-U5N_3G22r_ZoreWv4hn-_kip8xB2-IZb-pxmJcce_0uXemrdPlhLQMcM3CMbvGf1rU2BsAY4aDfjg3AuApgLibmZXzc8Rhx-Lje0w06zh-vi5uFThFzXpPcNqUOPl6jUTYDLebrApJ4jkCSvP98e0JgDJGVI9R1nvYUgrvL2AfhwWtanhPy9HBxPzSWCjblMqloWa5QgAb8s7RmI93XczTJdkfvE1vGVmgBr_Jy78LHIwnL8uktWd3ZbNpSFfbCVNFWPpMgalbWKsI0yQ_4gdB5h1wBjNU9pe5EYKJG_LsHveYYPTeaarfF_2hhj_PVCRbqK1p7250jD0GVJd8a4djhO65zArXYJ-uP2acjxf-w/3i1/Yc_RX4NPQkmlmeIDi9OiXw/h0/AlZh59E5wsrB_ioEqo5ngggYny9m6TXXDotNMgzeDew)** I’m supporting Mia for Governor because she has a unique record of service that gives her the courage and experience to lead. From fighting back against the hypocrisy and double standards of our Republican colleagues in the Senate by introducing her Viagra bill, to her work taking on the state’s domestic violence crisis, Mia has never been one to back down from the fight for what’s right. For too long, South Carolina’s “leaders” have only catered to their donors and most influential supporters. But Mia is running to change that and give all our communities an equal opportunity to build back and thrive. **Mia gives Democrats our best chance at defeating Henry McMaster and flipping South Carolina blue next year. But she can’t do this without you, so I’m asking:** **[Will you make a donation to Mia’s historic campaign for Governor? clean_body: Our best shot at defeating Henry McMaster. | | | Friends, My name is Margie Bright Matthews, and I serve with Mia McLeod in the South Carolina State Senate. I’m supporting Mia for Governor because she has a unique record of service that gives her the courage and experience to lead. From fighting back against the hypocrisy and double standards of our Republican colleagues in the Senate by introducing her Viagra bill, to her work taking on the state’s domestic violence crisis, Mia has never been one to back down from the fight for what’s right. For too long, South Carolina’s “leaders” have only catered to their donors and most influential supporters. But Mia is running to change that and give all our communities an equal opportunity to build back and thrive. Mia gives Democrats our best chance at defeating Henry McMaster and flipping South Carolina blue next year. But she can’t do this without you, so I’m asking: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, — Margie Bright Matthews South Carolina State Senator District 45 Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. | | | Paid for by Mia for South Carolina | | Sent via . Team New Deal,

**ExxonMobil has locked out roughly 650 workers from their Texas plants since May.** Represented by the United Steelworkers, these union employees are demanding adequate seniority protections — but instead of negotiating fairly, the Big Oil giant has bullied these hard-working folks out of their jobs for the past **_SEVEN MONTHS._**

Workers' rights across the country are under attack, and we MUST stand in solidarity with our unions as they go up against some of the wealthiest and most powerful CEOs to demand basic employee rights in order to provide for their families. As the proud daughter of a union worker, this fight is personal for me.

Over the weekend, I attended two Christmas fundraiser events held by the local union AFL-CIO Christmas to help raise money for the USW 13-243 workers who have been locked out by Exxon.

**Jessica Mason was born and raised in Dallas and has experienced firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that impede the success of Texas working families.** **As a former Navy medic, Jessica received her Master's Degree in Public Administration so that she could pursue her passion for public service. She's running for Congress to represent Texas' 30th District because she's tired of seeing everyday people left behind.** **TX-30 deserves policies that are designed for the success of the people who live here. subject: Democracy is at risk

The radical right-wing of the GOP and QAnon conspiracy theorists are tearing at the fabric of our country, and they are only 5 seats away from taking control of Congress. It's that serious. My friend Josh Harder is one of the 5 swing seat Democrats standing in their way, which is why we need to make sure he's got everything he needs to win another big election --just like he did in 2018 and again in 2020! -- but it's going to take everyone's support! [**That 's why I'm reaching out to you before the major end-of-year fundraising deadline and asking you to please make a generous donation to Josh's campaign today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3hwtOHcW9H_CokU6KDi1ImA4avpDZqulxwxoYHUMzg=/iSkJ4OA5rBuLg-i-TX-LmA-39lhjqSCHbrLkMq27SfU=?refcode=E13077-20211221-SchiffSurrogate-SL-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3hwtOHcW9H_CokU6KDi1ImA4avpDZqulxwxoYHUMzg=/iSkJ4OA5rBuLg-i-TX-LmA-39lhjqSCHbrLkMq27SfU=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13077-20211221-SchiffSurrogate-EL-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**

We came so close to losing our democracy -- much closer than anyone thinks. Donald Trump and his allies were hell-bent on keeping him in power and spreading their Big Lie, despite the results of our free and fair election.
We need leaders like Josh who bravely stand up for our country -- and against the extremists.
Last year, it was tough to see Democrats lose so many toss-up seats in my home state of California. But thanks to the power of grassroots donors, Josh pulled through and Democrats maintained our razor-thin majority. Now we have to defy the odds and do it again! With your support, I know that anything is possible. We've already proven that before.
[**We must hold on to this seat, so please send in a donation of as much as you can right now to help us protect Josh and save our democracy!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3hwtOHcW9H_CokU6KDi1ImA4avpDZqulxwxoYHUMzg=/iSkJ4OA5rBuLg-i-TX-LmA-39lhjqSCHbrLkMq27SfU=?refcode=E13077-20211221-SchiffSurrogate-SL-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
Thank you,
Adam Schiff
* * *

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3hwtOHcW9H_CokU6KDi1ImA4avpDZqulxwxoYHUMzg=/iSkJ4OA5rBuLg-i-TX-LmA-39lhjqSCHbrLkMq27SfU=?refcode=E13077-20211221-SchiffSurrogate-footer-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)**

name: Answer Missing
subject: re: saving PBS.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **UPDATE via Yahoo News: “Republicans call for defunding PBS”**

The right-wing push to defund PBS is gaining traction, and we need to know where Democrats stand on this essential service -- **but we still haven't heard from you!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5133?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211221-AnswerMissing-DefendPBSRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211221-AnswerMissing-DefendPBSRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2355%2E9716520%2Ek1CVLK)
**Do you support keeping PBS fully funded?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5133?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211221-AnswerMissing-DefendPBSRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211221-AnswerMissing-DefendPBSRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2355%2E9716520%2Ek1CVLK)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/5133?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211221-AnswerMissing-DefendPBSRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211221-AnswerMissing-DefendPBSRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2355%2E9716520%2Ek1CVLK)
---

This is OUTRAGEOUS:

Ted Cruz just labeled PBS _“government propaganda.”_ Top conservatives are calling for its defunding. And now, Fox News and far-right Republicans are joining forces to DEVASTATE an American treasure.

**The threat is growing by the minute -- right-wing members of Congress have already introduced a bill that would END federal funding for PBS** and imperil a network that has brought free, educational programming into American homes for generations!

It’s crystal clear: The GOP’s movement is gaining momentum, and **we need to know where you stand.**

We've launched a LIVE POLL to find out where Democrats in 18326 stand on the GOP push to defund PBS, **but we’re missing your response! Please tell us:**

**Do you support keeping PBS fully funded?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5133?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211221-AnswerMissing-DefendPBSRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211221-AnswerMissing-DefendPBSRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2355%2E9716520%2Ek1CVLK)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/5133?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211221-AnswerMissing-DefendPBSRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211221-AnswerMissing-DefendPBSRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2355%2E9716520%2Ek1CVLK)
---

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2021-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=2355_9716520_k1CVLK&akid=2355%2E9716520%2Ek1CVLK)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=2355%2E9716520%2Ek1CVLK)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2355%2E9716520%2Ek1CVLK)** to unsubscribe.

Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc.org](https://www.dscc.org/)** | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Sen. Cortez Masto
subject: Please, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1772%2E3611125%2ECNeBJR ][IMG]

folks—With the Senate split 50-50, Mitch McConnell only needs to
gain ONE seat to regain control.

Nevada and Ohio have both been named among CNN’s 10 Senate seats most
likely to flip—Senate control hinges on our races so we simply can't
afford to miss our fundraising goals, folks.

Tim and I are both within single digits of our Trump-wannabe opponents—and
we’ll need your help to close the gap to hold and expand our Democratic
Senate majority. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6308?t=1007&akid=1772%2E3611125%2ECNeBJR ]I have nowhere else to turn, so I'm urgently asking
you to split $25 between my campaign and Tim’s before our critical
end-of-year deadlines.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6309?t=1013&amount=25&akid=1772%2E3611125%2ECNeBJR ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6309?t=1014&amount=50&akid=1772%2E3611125%2ECNeBJR ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6309?t=1015&amount=100&akid=1772%2E3611125%2ECNeBJR ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6309?t=1016&amount=200&akid=1772%2E3611125%2ECNeBJR ]Donate $200

The latest polling has us down but we’re within the margin of error—that
means we can still turn this around if we take action now!

This is a make-or-break moment, and Tim said I could count on this team to
help us out. With the GOP on my heels, your immediate donation could be
the difference between winning or losing in both Nevada and Ohio. Please,
folks, I'm personally asking you to chip in before midnight.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6308?t=1008&akid=1772%2E3611125%2ECNeBJR ]Split $25 or more to help us close the polling gap, protect Nevada's
critical toss-up seat, and flip Ohio so we can expand our Democratic
Senate majority!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6309?t=1017&amount=25&akid=1772%2E3611125%2ECNeBJR ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6309?t=1018&amount=50&akid=1772%2E3611125%2ECNeBJR ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6309?t=1019&amount=100&akid=1772%2E3611125%2ECNeBJR ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6309?t=1020&amount=200&akid=1772%2E3611125%2ECNeBJR ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6309?t=1010&amount=250&akid=1772%2E3611125%2ECNeBJR ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6309?t=1011&amount=25&akid=1772%2E3611125%2ECNeBJR ]Other Amount

I can't thank you enough for your commitment to defending this seat and
our Democratic Senate majority.

¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues!

Catherine Cortez-Masto
Senator for Nevada

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Major Polling Update
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
I have some incredible news to share with you today. According to a recent survey conducted last week, I am the number one choice for Governor among Baltimore area voters. An overwhelming 73% of those surveyed said they would vote for me if the Democratic primary were to end today.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdatedecember?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdatedecember?amount=20.22]To our Baltimore area residents who made their voices heard, I am truly humbled by your trust and support. Baltimore’s success is Maryland’s success, and as Governor, I’ll make sure our great City plays a central role in our economic recovery.
This latest polling update is a major moment for our campaign, and we can’t let it go to waste. Fresh off the heels of this news, we’re looking to raise an additional $2,500 in grassroots donations by 11:59 PM tonight, and a groundswell of grassroots support should easily get us there.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdatedecember?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdatedecember?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdatedecember?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdatedecember?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdatedecember]Anything you can give is greatly appreciated. I’m building a people-powered movement to create a people-centered government, and grassroots supporters like you are crucial to our efforts. Together, we’re going to change the way that government does business in 2022, and deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift our communities into the quality of life they deserve.
Thank you for your support,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdatedecember?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0ecc4683-9062-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/751ef5ab-9d62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTFlZjVhYi05ZDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w5I2U-8rpdz__KLjqOqellE29p9wjm6Gn2hLlmqZBKw=&id=136194660 .

body:
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=be97e10f35df4a958203f2ff61497857&_e=WQ-8g2bELV8NBizIoJ-nUJ9W9bRfWfu6fST56LNib4jt7WBDB1dswk0GOrWHObLf-i_RWV0knS8IZznOJn_lE_G3Uekx-ulX7Iqzh02Y_-FPEE1HuYH-xy6P2ObCrpGTN9rM1K4fPnTOlYabblis3GA-NgNjBoV13zBGwbs5DHwAyxOpFbSWAwrArsDWWYIhU3eMtwZfhYl2F-koDaZK8qHRdj6vukgkdJVW6W9gnMz3QX7CACGh49lohh9RnjlfXcJzG-L3rxEWHYtlgVB2lUmUFyI-QJYcHTiB6f_L2V-bq-6wEKlZ2AbgupSw-5-OxnlFgZh0zE_BlYx1qUvIG4nYm2DXa1eR68KQAEv-qIRBXmhonX_5D5pRFPuNt6EhKK8EFAF3UrZrwcI8JwZqfZ9NaZFBu8C1SXemmM38QO0%3D) | |

Peter,
Stop me if you’ve heard this one before — Big Tech company accommodates Authoritarian Chinese government. _**We hear these kinds of stories FAR too often**_ , and this week is no different, but this story is shameless, even by Silicon Valley standards.

[_**I will not give up fighting to hold Silicon Valley for their cozy relationship with Communist China, putting profit over people. Help fight back — chip in $25, $10, even just $5. Every dollar helps!**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=be97e10f35df4a958203f2ff61497857&_e=WQ-8g2bELV8NBizIoJ-nUJ9W9bRfWfu6fST56LNib4jt7WBDB1dswk0GOrWHObLf-i_RWV0knS8IZznOJn_lE_G3Uekx-ulX7Iqzh02Y_-FPEE1HuYH-xy6P2ObCrpGTN9rM1K4fPnTOlYabblis3GA-NgNjBoV13zBGwbs5DHwAyxOpFbSWAwrArsDWWYIhhGKZLt3Oa5ZFe_z00r-_GDaozQAVZrw3fBGO4fJZ76NoYHhwcUV-CdM6IYSl9hQklBrq5dDqY9rqoMB79M9cigNb3mTxJSqvplxahd0ibgDSv7oyzFCgWOOtWPSmTERaxSW5c1o0QRUXy6GrVGP8A3oJV-jPgDtdR5LHepyWKlzuyRJ2ifThtOLWcQHMFP1rOkB7jsOdrVvBk42JPZw8gh7FrxWdEUFr3BcTnIkJ4jA%3D)

The most recent transgression? Amazon was selling a collection of writings by Chinese President Xi Jinping, and the reviews and ratings were not all glowing. China was furious and demanded action. Instead of allowing shoppers to give honest and fair reviews, Amazon removed the comment and rating section, keeping information from shoppers, and covering up the legitimate concern with President Xi.
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=be97e10f35df4a958203f2ff61497857&_e=WQ-8g2bELV8NBizIoJ-nUJ9W9bRfWfu6fST56LNib4jt7WBDB1dswk0GOrWHObLf-i_RWV0knS8IZznOJn_lE_G3Uekx-ulX7Iqzh02Y_-FPEE1HuYH-xy6P2ObCrpGTN9rM1K4fPnTOlYabblis3GA-NgNjBoV13zBGwbs5DHwAyxOpFbSWAwrArsDWWYIh4drK0GVi9u-4nEmpdMbzkSH3cvzYSsvGMYEYGamU0vOG9U1z9w0Hk7Q4BCAQQB1byAsZD613Jo9ZQEhqTSZEeJQU9duGeCXnDgLtzZbrZNP3ERpOotpM41Vm96_MMacc-yqt7GlvFzeb4VvQMm8vvsTup4xv0M38M5Etj0igcklRSlaGoZ9EElA5V1wpmBYsVBNNSIIW8VHS_hEVnEWmteeEEL25fXE5BFUVE7JS00s%3D)
At every turn, Amazon caves to pressure from the Communist Chinese government, and suppresses free speech, and it’s wrong. _**I’m working hard to hold Silicon Valley ACCOUNTABLE for their hypocritical virtue signaling**_. Woke big tech companies decry America, the freest nation in human history, while enabling Authoritarian regimes.

[_**Help us end the year strong by donating today! Every dollar helps us take the fight to the left and hold them accountable for their misplaced priorities and poor policies >>> DONATE.**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=be97e10f35df4a958203f2ff61497857&_e=WQ-8g2bELV8NBizIoJ-nUJ9W9bRfWfu6fST56LNib4jt7WBDB1dswk0GOrWHObLf-i_RWV0knS8IZznOJn_lE_G3Uekx-ulX7Iqzh02Y_-FPEE1HuYH-xy6P2ObCrpGTN9rM1K4fPnTOlYabblis3GA-NgNjBoV13zBGwbs5DHwAyxOpFbSWAwrArsDWWYIh0ERp-bWb965irag-7fgwYNXBcf_1uEqTq8lN-lnHXxymBuIPLNSRYYRgQl10_Cmou3FkCoqoBNZBDGgitQ1uMtNqGfdjLmpklXt3uG8vQHidAGmW0LbpOjzLiMLXfhASsm1xshdV8SnlMeEewjBfW0LMpN9egznPXySVGemEqmGbXRNN9Hud98yp5LXrIgO8oW4Y61CAOai4_4a_NYxnN2L-clFYbIs_YAldV88UogQ%3D)
Thank you,
Josh Hawley

subject: We know the holidays are here, but this will be quick!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
With Christmas in just a few days, we don’t want to take up too much of your time.

We’re closing up shop for the holiday tomorrow, but before we do, we have one final goal.

If we can raise $4,000 before the end of the day tomorrow, our fundraising will be back on track ahead of the last FEC filing deadline before the election year. Can we count on you to give $5 to help us get there?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-dec?refcode=EM_FR_211221peom1_peom_tlbr_3_NG_Na_text

Thank you and happy holidays!

Team LBR

Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

name: Mckayla
subject: Please let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, This has been an incredible year for our campaign. From our launch in January through now, I have been overwhelmed by the support we’ve seen from our community. There is still a long way to go for our movement, and in a moment I’m going to ask you for a contribution to keep on with our good work, but first I hope you’ll give me a minute to let me explain why your support is so important. **[_If you already know why this race is so important, please make a donation now before our End-of-Year Fundraising Deadline >>_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w_NOmPsolGX67ikLwxsr_D09dnMWzlbUj7qnOvg9Vjx0tyNLBjLouS3w1bD2SfkKZ1T9nbb8UwuxuiqKnJGIXnvBGvhDIm_5ytyVaXebPefYqZar91WLvwkdZOvvLzYyln14Uw-2VRDtMul-PblZHKKIIl7DcXTLIhCMyIChMjg4R0TU9diwxHubW90jGK3VU4dr7M0Rtr5qbVRCZUjknfjlYx0zS3SME9bOdLydt7XuIzU-5o3xNXKzXjdahrOmjuCGxrEcfyz84xELvol1PG/3i1/JThemG_HSZGv9Ey-Ip44XQ/h0/DYsJaczCGEwaHHpDLbdLRjHNL2onK6lcSH5JWcjry8s)** Yesterday, Joe Manchin told us he was not going to support Joe Biden’s Build Back Better plan. That means he’s standing in the way of an expanded child tax credit, a huge investment in fighting the climate crisis, and capping the cost of prescription drugs like insulin. **That’s what conservative Democrats do – they stand in the way of progress when we have Democratic majorities in the Congress and the White House.** We have an opportunity for meaningful change and – this is no exaggeration – a chance to save the planet from catastrophe in our lifetimes. Instead, Joe Manchin has put his big money donors first and has stood in the way of economic and environmental justice. **But this is why I’m running. I want to be a voice for ordinary folks in Congress. I don’t take ANY corporate PAC money so you know it’s _you_ I’ll be representing.** **[If that’s the sort of campaign you can get behind, please consider contributing now. clean_body: | | | Team, This has been an incredible year for our campaign. From our launch in January through now, I have been overwhelmed by the support we’ve seen from our community. There is still a long way to go for our movement, and in a moment I’m going to ask you for a contribution to keep on with our good work, but first I hope you’ll give me a minute to let me explain why your support is so important. Yesterday, Joe Manchin told us he was not going to support Joe Biden’s Build Back Better plan. That means he’s standing in the way of an expanded child tax credit, a huge investment in fighting the climate crisis, and capping the cost of prescription drugs like insulin. That’s what conservative Democrats do – they stand in the way of progress when we have Democratic majorities in the Congress and the White House. We have an opportunity for meaningful change and – this is no exaggeration – a chance to save the planet from catastrophe in our lifetimes. Instead, Joe Manchin has put his big money donors first and has stood in the way of economic and environmental justice. But this is why I’m running. I want to be a voice for ordinary folks in Congress. I don’t take ANY corporate PAC money so you know it’s you I’ll be representing. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | We’re heading into a crucial End-of-Year Fundraising period. Every donation we receive between now and December 31 goes towards our goal of getting elected to Congress in 2022. subject: ICYMI: Bill McSwain joins Sean Duffy on FOX Business
body:
Bill McSwain sat down with Sean Duffy to discuss the growing state of lawlessness across American cities. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/icymi-bill-mcswain-joins-sean-duffy-on-fox-business?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**December 21, 2021
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# ICYMI: Bill McSwain joins FOX Business Tonight to talk conservative leadership with Sean Duffy
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- ** Republican Candidate for Governor** ** Bill McSwain sat down with Sean Duffy on Friday to discuss the growing state of lawlessness in Philadelphia and across American cities and how the progressive agenda is contributing to the breakdown of civil society.

McSwain emphasized that as Governor he will fight back against the growing culture of victimhood and deferred responsibility cultivated by progressive leaders:
---
|
> **_"Whether it's New York, San Francisco, or right here in Philadelphia, areas that are led by progressive politicians are seeing terrible crime spikes. Progressives are celebrating lawlessness, they're celebrating rioting and looting, and they're replacing hard work with government handouts and replacing personal responsibility with a culture of victimhood. The antidote to cure this liberal disease and for things to improve is accountability, deterrence, and conservative leadership - and that's why I'm running for Governor." _**
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=0a1b039534&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **

Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=34cf55f50b&e=b1ec95759b)
###

McSwain emphasized that as Governor he will fight back against the growing culture of victimhood and deferred responsibility cultivated by progressive leaders: | "Whether it's New York, San Francisco, or right here in Philadelphia, areas that are led by progressive politicians are seeing terrible crime spikes. Progressives are celebrating lawlessness, they're celebrating rioting and looting, and they're replacing hard work with government handouts and replacing personal responsibility with a culture of victimhood. The antidote to cure this liberal disease and for things to improve is accountability, deterrence, and conservative leadership - and that's why I'm running for Governor." | | | | BACKGROUND: Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available | | | | | | | | | | billmcswain.com | | Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

[](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=de8cc882e60f4d909bbf54e4cc386c90&_e=oYJgTeXH4mANVH8hfWsnyF5KpR42mv0v9cNxWjCEVsKOnWaPNgw0PT7-1FktqFUlbelEnUyu1ORVbLJxZE2EOjbYl6YK6sa9qt-w0-nZObdwRYee0-fe9BqyHzkA-1v5aWQCxRxXn3gDN2ewfveFVC0_wt4vDVcZ-2f69HHG2lJC3VtDToGV6gEvbT4lfgfRPl76t16mMGJb95JPJxV3lLkGkemk_rJ8tp165gQG37KoDLHTUPV2NmkWjdnBkgZoaF_NNXDmu_v9yiRAsiwU40QXTFINo1-PZOyeS6XckCMay5_1ZD7UNPMagCDP5fvizOmRCLCndq_vajutn5YfMyWbzBy2Hnio4bgzvJHmo3VTZiacNkrO47-EvlwJB40OrRf7cZnoSM7USV3GMuXSN8eIWpheamkdIKujzhW7YEGs_WwaSjRoYtS2WeriW3-DzaSu9-K8Y1WpuVJAxtS5xuZClYouDM9HdINS4EISb3h77WcNB8NdEdkAAtxX0t3P68TWeAtGcwJF0uUutBxgzptolNEcENH_i7mjk19GQ6Q%3D)

Fellow American,

Joe Biden’s vaccine mandate is bad news for hard-working Americans.

Not only does this mandate completely contradict our Constitution, but it creates a **major problem** for the people who created the greatest economy in the world. This mandate is affecting the men and women who go to work every day and understand the sacrifice that is required to keep our economy up and running. **As a career politician Biden knows very little about what it is like to do just that.**

[**Chip in now to stop Biden’s reckless vaccine mandate. >>**](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=de8cc882e60f4d909bbf54e4cc386c90&_e=oYJgTeXH4mANVH8hfWsnyF5KpR42mv0v9cNxWjCEVsKOnWaPNgw0PT7-1FktqFUlbelEnUyu1ORVbLJxZE2EOjbYl6YK6sa9qt-w0-nZObdwRYee0-fe9BqyHzkA-1v5aWQCxRxXn3gDN2ewfveFVC0_wt4vDVcZ-2f69HHG2lJC3VtDToGV6gEvbT4lfgfRPl76t16mMGJb95JPJxV3lLkGkemk_rJ8tp165gQG37KoDLHTUPV2NmkWjdnBkgZoaF_NNXDmu_v9yiRAsiwU40QXTFINo1-PZOyeS6XckCMay5_1ZD7UNPMagCDP5fvizOmRCLCndq_vajutn5YfM3CdIS8ttWo9_drZ0hwE-oOCrQXQh-6jPOxL62g_MYTPb0L_2eW8df5Smvbsx514f7ckVxAWgSU-DfTl_1qSLj-0wSbiH-Ei4PBmKmk0-JhNzuKzEp6-Mo58xPY2avP632g3ZOEJvtcFww4M2QpR0Bcbt3ma65Pf0H6FuvPnCiu4D0pN4e32k09DXuwzR6yx6itwJaacqqFOKoYJjdaJCT0%3D) [**STOP THE VACCINE MANDATE**](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=de8cc882e60f4d909bbf54e4cc386c90&_e=oYJgTeXH4mANVH8hfWsnyF5KpR42mv0v9cNxWjCEVsKOnWaPNgw0PT7-1FktqFUlbelEnUyu1ORVbLJxZE2EOjbYl6YK6sa9qt-w0-nZObdwRYee0-fe9BqyHzkA-1v5aWQCxRxXn3gDN2ewfveFVC0_wt4vDVcZ-2f69HHG2lJC3VtDToGV6gEvbT4lfgfRPl76t16mMGJb95JPJxV3lLkGkemk_rJ8tp165gQG37KoDLHTUPV2NmkWjdnBkgZoaF_NNXDmu_v9yiRAsiwU40QXTFINo1-PZOyeS6XckCMay5_1ZD7UNPMagCDP5fvi-jecCnHBXUZE-pFeFwkSUEgMj9D3KaFHXnsfjSkPTBHAnEBlSrWwv5XdbC3y8-XpPUj0OYUCJtZAtpG4yiDNql5f3aRBIfGcXveCZrlshtlK_pI0taZPhEOXeiiuye_pMVlyfSCgpxw_iKZ9cHG6c_O1NvK5tv1BdKjzhQvPpwWSXiXo9HwMgYrG80-uCkoXRbVpZE-FZ2F4Q5aYrjZU8JnRIzDz5FuKps7_-DZzXHLYdA85PlcyvjV_UH-itMOr)
---

This mandate shows how out of touch Biden is with the heartbeat of America. The bottom line is this... this vaccine mandate is discouraging people from joining the workforce, forcing businesses to fire workers, and punishing businesses with fines. _**The private sector is the backbone of the economy and Joe Biden is doing everything in his power to break it.**_

clean_body: This vaccine mandate is dangerous | | | | | | | | | Fellow American, Joe Biden’s vaccine mandate is bad news for hard-working Americans. Not only does this mandate completely contradict our Constitution, but it creates a major problem for the people who created the greatest economy in the world. This mandate is affecting the men and women who go to work every day and understand the sacrifice that is required to keep our economy up and running. As a career politician Biden knows very little about what it is like to do just that. This mandate shows how out of touch Biden is with the heartbeat of America. The bottom line is this... this vaccine mandate is discouraging people from joining the workforce, forcing businesses to fire workers, and punishing businesses with fines. The private sector is the backbone of the economy and Joe Biden is doing everything in his power to break it. God Bless, Congressman Fred Keller (Taking the values of PA's 12th District to Congress) Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress Our mailing address is: 23 North Derr Drive, Suite 2 Lewisburg, PA 17837 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

Folks, I know the pundits doubt our odds of keeping the majority in the House of Representatives. But we can protect our majority by taking back seats in competitive districts. That includes electing Gabe Vasquez, a true champion for New Mexico, in our southern district. Democrats won District 2 in 2018 — and the House majority along with it. Now, our chances are even better with the new district map. **I endorsed Gabe early on, even before the new district lines were drawn.** That’s because I know he has the passion and determination to deliver on economic justice, equal pay for equal work, affordable housing, and access to quality health care for all. **New Mexico Republicans will do everything they can to stop Gabe from defeating Trump Republican Yvette Herrell and strengthening our House majority. But I know this movement has the strength to come together to make sure Gabe wins. name: Michele Rayner
subject: December’s #RaynerRundown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELE FOR FLORIDA
body:
THE RAYNER RUNDOWN

Hi Peter,

The holiday season is upon us! Between gearing up for the new year and preparing to gather with family and friends over the next few days, these are busy (but exciting) times!

Last year, this time of year looked very different, and a lot of us were having virtual holiday celebrations. Some folks might still be this year, too. With the Delta variant, as well as Omicron spreading throughout the country, it’s crucial that we remain vigilant to avoid damaging the progress we’ve made in combating COVID-19.

So no matter what you’re doing for the holidays, please make sure you’re vaccinated (and boosted if eligible!) and staying safe so we can have a happy and healthy 2022 ahead!

While we’re so looking forward to ringing in 2022, we cannot lose sight of what’s at stake here. Republicans have been spending a lot of time and money to ensure they take a majority in Congress next year – and we cannot allow them to win.

Between our Trump-puppet of an opponent and the final FEC quarterly fundraising deadline coming up quickly, we have a lot of work to squeeze in in such little time.

But that’s okay Peter – so long as we stick together and fight for our democracy, we can get it DONE.

From all of us at Team Rayner to you and your family, have a lovely holiday season and an amazing end of 2021.

With love,

Michele and Team Rayner

DONATE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112_email_rayner?refcode=em21_211221_rundown

#RunWithRayner | On Social Media

Michele Rayner Twitter Post: Today: Republican legislator: The answer to solving the food desert/food insecurity issue is Uber eats. Me: Absolutely not! Let’s talk about the intersection of transit, food, housing, etc. His privilege LEPT all the way out. #ubereatsforall#cantmakeitup

TWITTER POST >> https://twitter.com/micheleforfl/status/1470563103230279684

Michele Rayner Twitter Post: Watch Now: @StPeteFL will decide to accept the results of the study on structural racism commissioned by the city and carried out by @USouthFlorida . The study shows us what we already know: Structural racism exists and amplifies inequality & segregation of our Black communities.

TWITTER POST >> https://twitter.com/micheleforfl/status/1469029846508613633

Michele Rayner Twitter Post: Our communities' livelihoods in Pinellas and across Florida depend on our clean water. We have to take appropriate measures to ensure long-term safety and sustainability of our pristine waterways.

TWITTER POST >> https://twitter.com/micheleforfl/status/1468326231888306183

Michele Rayner Twitter Post: PERIOD! While the other side wants to have culture wars and protect subverters of our democracy- Dems are putting in work + making sure folks have good jobs + safe housing + building back better. This is why we need to keep the House. This is why I’m running for Congress.

TWITTER POST >> https://twitter.com/micheleforfl/status/1469340584150286349

#RunWithRayner | Out and About

“It was wonderful to see old friends and make new ones. We also spoke about the importance of keeping CD13 blue and making sure we have a fighter in DC.”
– Michele at the North Pinellas Dems holiday picnic

“Everything we do MUST be rooted in building collective political power. I was also happy to run into my good friend, Charlie Crist. It’s always about the people!”
– Michele at the Fight for 15 Florida state conference

“It was wonderful to spend time with amazing Democratic women who have done incredible work throughout Pinellas.”
– Michele at the Democratic Women’s Club of Upper Pinellas

subject: we have nowhere to turn, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arballo For Congress P
body:
what the price of a cup of coffee can do for our movement:

| **Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign!**
Message & data rates may apply.
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39911709/321973012/145944154?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjNiYTI1Yi1hMjYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M30lMtKmZvSX0BQGQuCa-RakkZ7kKzrBkyL-FM4q1fQ=)
Peter, we know how busy the holiday season can get.

But we’re rushing to meet our _$65,000 end-of-year goal to elect Phil Arballo in California’s Special Election!_

**Phil told us not to be so direct, but we have nowhere else to turn:** This holiday fundraising slump is hitting our grassroots campaign hard, Peter.

[**We need 1,000 donations by midnight to keep our pace. name: Derek Marshall
subject: Our new district map
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
Here’s the deal: California’s now-final maps have been released, and our district is changing. **We will now be running in California’s 23rd Congressional district, instead of the 8th.** We’re picking up new areas that are both Republican and Democratic, so it’s hard to tell exactly what it means for our race until we can crunch the numbers and know for sure. But here’s what we do know now: **Jay Obernolte will not hesitate to embolden his Republican base with the same Trumpian playbook he’s been using since he got into office. **
No matter how the specific data looks for our new map, our focus will remain constant. **That’s to bring real change to the high desert by supporting popular progressive policies that voters on both sides of the aisle want by a strong majority.** The pandemic has taught us that providing social safety nets for working people is incredibly popular and we currently have a representative who votes no on every aid bill that supported families during these deadly two-plus years.
**In fact, the only thing Jay Obernolte can seem to vote yes on is blank checks for a bloated military budget and voting to overturn a free and fair presidential election.** The soon-to-be 23rd district may look different now that the new lines are drawn but what won’t change is my dedication to fight for every single person I aim to represent.

clean_body: Peter, Here’s the deal: California’s now-final maps have been released, and our district is changing. We will now be running in California’s 23rd Congressional district, instead of the 8th. We’re picking up new areas that are both Republican and Democratic, so it’s hard to tell exactly what it means for our race until we can crunch the numbers and know for sure. But here’s what we do know now: Jay Obernolte will not hesitate to embolden his Republican base with the same Trumpian playbook he’s been using since he got into office. No matter how the specific data looks for our new map, our focus will remain constant. That’s to bring real change to the high desert by supporting popular progressive policies that voters on both sides of the aisle want by a strong majority. The pandemic has taught us that providing social safety nets for working people is incredibly popular and we currently have a representative who votes no on every aid bill that supported families during these deadly two-plus years. In fact, the only thing Jay Obernolte can seem to vote yes on is blank checks for a bloated military budget and voting to overturn a free and fair presidential election. The soon-to-be 23rd district may look different now that the new lines are drawn but what won’t change is my dedication to fight for every single person I aim to represent. = = I know I write to you often with appeals for money, but it’s because our entire campaign depends on our ability to raise the resources we need to win. If we don’t reach the ambitious fundraising goals we set, we lose out on crucial elements of our strategy, including our digital, political, and field programs. Grassroots supporters like you keep the wheels turning on this campaign, and for that I’m incredibly grateful. = In solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-08 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39911997/321974519/993346776?refcode=em_fr_2021.12.21_b1_ohhq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGQ1MzJiYy1hNDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bXvOODjZi-k0EIwP6KFad3t3PKUSQvWvGrOZKZNt30g=)** Hey friends, our team has been reflecting on Tom’s hard work in Congress this year, and we wanted to share some of his biggest accomplishments. [**In a minute we’ll ask you to chip in and help make sure that Tom can continue fighting for all of us in Washington -- but if you’re already with us, can you make a donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39911998/321974520/993346776?refcode=em_fr_2021.12.21_b1_ohhq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGQ1MzJiYy1hNDYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bXvOODjZi-k0EIwP6KFad3t3PKUSQvWvGrOZKZNt30g=)
* Tom voted to pass the American Rescue Plan, bringing millions of dollars of funding to folks all over Arizona.
* Tom worked with Democrats and Republicans to pass the Bipartisan Infrastructure Plan and bring much-needed infrastructure to rural areas in Arizona.
* Tom voted to pass the Build Back Better Act to help our nation recover from the pandemic and invest in our future.

We hope that you are as proud of the work Tom has been doing in Washington as we are. Thanks to his efforts and the Democratic House Majority, working people in Arizona and beyond will have greater resources, infrastructure, and support in the coming year. **And that’s why it’s so important to keep Tom in Congress.[If you are able, can you chip in to Tom’s campaign so that we can keep him in Washington doing good work for Arizonians? clean_body: = Hey friends, our team has been reflecting on Tom’s hard work in Congress this year, and we wanted to share some of his biggest accomplishments. = Tom voted to pass the American Rescue Plan, bringing millions of dollars of funding to folks all over Arizona. Tom worked with Democrats and Republicans to pass the Bipartisan Infrastructure Plan and bring much-needed infrastructure to rural areas in Arizona. Tom voted to pass the Build Back Better Act to help our nation recover from the pandemic and invest in our future. We hope that you are as proud of the work Tom has been doing in Washington as we are. Thanks to his efforts and the Democratic House Majority, working people in Arizona and beyond will have greater resources, infrastructure, and support in the coming year. And that’s why it’s so important to keep Tom in Congress.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, O’Halleran HQ Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

We’re not waiting to build a successful primary challenge to Kyrsten Sinema. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPP75mpgRsqOAcpyYiu5XktMk-DXxbftowo2RwOET1GUzNiDU8v9p7rbqVWExUXbIE-0W4Tv-I1ApWCSKoaYqBf963VhT6DgyQsdyRFjda1nI1Zws80Es8SsiOKbz3jSZkKyDBUHh8Z__xYboNBSP4B0dOKwMzdWKtx-02uuUyGirrgjkwAcOAfXcUwn6SI0hzEWYqXhfIjV959d6ohcYX1c/3i1/bkf6Y6W7QlGmN6v7HZPS1A/h0/CQbMBVuKSxpmMTwn6CiVOdoyecKfiE2bFPbJPvQV800)
We’re proud to share this news with you, Peter:
**** The Primary Sinema Project has built incredible grassroots momentum to oust Senator Kyrsten Sinema — and thanks to supporters like you, we just made our first disbursements of $10,000 each to two Arizona grassroots-powered organizations that are setting the stage for a successful primary challenge to Sinema. One organization we’re supporting is **Living United for Change in Arizona** , or **LUCHA** , which organizes voters across Arizona and has been on the front lines of holding Senator Sinema accountable. We’re also supporting **Be a Hero**. Led by activist Ady Barkan, Be a Hero is working to remind every voter in Arizona and nationwide what's at stake in the fight for a more just health care system. Funding grassroots organizations like LUCHA and Be A Hero right now, as opposed to waiting around for Sinema’s future primary challenger, is key to our strategy — because **simply put, we can’t afford to wait.** Senator Sinema’s obstruction blew up President Biden’s Build Back Better Agenda. She’s weakening Democrats’ ability to win in 2022, including her fellow Arizona Senator Mark Kelly’s, and she’s threatening our majorities in Congress. That’s why we’re holding Sinema accountable NOW — and the significant resources we just committed to LUCHA and Be A Hero came entirely from thousands of folks like you pitching in. **[If you’re excited about the momentum we’re building against Sinema after she betrayed Arizona voters, will you consider chipping in $3 toward our work? Every dollar we raise will help organizations like LUCHA and Be A Hero lay the groundwork to replace Sinema.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSR9OQKdSQXzVArKugTrJOOQWQd3NceyB5_QTem6EmXswgbPWRFTwcUeaq4mERdozkRl3rjj0wbPfiSa1Fa0GhXg9LIKw2GpE8DjuKDjlejox592exJNYonoTQGEi4oWGlsoqQuJ_SCXC0_uk0e7eZ3ztZBVuynPSr0zTb9SuqyiMyjrwJ5FJky8Iv4VoEBYUVQT_6q1VhXbz58v4Np_gVjf8MsZufk2PvbPtb_fPJXUNDEh9yk_diuRKKB4O6mcQhOZR6fsZuzJncJcQ4_85KNXeMv37ps6ZJXa0hs3KmSOE/3i1/bkf6Y6W7QlGmN6v7HZPS1A/h1/p8xyliSgu3yboQvhQi2EP6HjPnt0BvWx1aEB_J9zZV8)** **[Contribute $3](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSR9OQKdSQXzVArKugTrJOOQWQd3NceyB5_QTem6EmXsyOIm3tkqI2R6Obbo9GQmVsCC6YkIgowFfKy55byKMyiHQ4ujyfrAvZz1mmko2wvh_xOjQt9w81FHyTW9mXl8cFnrzH8O0Q_dd4ALsffuvrKFBWxQyC2R16pi6FHL5mB7VhHagIFcJlOgcFMq_3xuZWNExcayApeC3MXszu8XLgij3wIAnAm0VhHkuhGmSAGJVQIsduuQNSmmnSvBX7QQG9GEjg-Y2FHx-CrJMXE9Ogx5IGhEVvFZ1fBzeD_mv5izc/3i1/bkf6Y6W7QlGmN6v7HZPS1A/h2/-0dUcTAlFS0njGRKCpr4L2YrSewF7z-B46S5_POD0Z8)** We're energized by all the Arizonans and folks across the country who are ready to join us to beat Kyrsten Sinema. Let’s keep it up and finish the year strong. With gratitude, Primary Sinema Project

clean_body: We’re not waiting to build a successful primary challenge to Kyrsten Sinema. | | | We’re proud to share this news with you, Peter: ** The Primary Sinema Project has built incredible grassroots momentum to oust Senator Kyrsten Sinema — and thanks to supporters like you, we just made our first disbursements of $10,000 each to two Arizona grassroots-powered organizations that are setting the stage for a successful primary challenge to Sinema. One organization we’re supporting is Living United for Change in Arizona , or LUCHA , which organizes voters across Arizona and has been on the front lines of holding Senator Sinema accountable. We’re also supporting Be a Hero. Led by activist Ady Barkan, Be a Hero is working to remind every voter in Arizona and nationwide what's at stake in the fight for a more just health care system. Funding grassroots organizations like LUCHA and Be A Hero right now, as opposed to waiting around for Sinema’s future primary challenger, is key to our strategy — because simply put, we can’t afford to wait. Senator Sinema’s obstruction blew up President Biden’s Build Back Better Agenda. She’s weakening Democrats’ ability to win in 2022, including her fellow Arizona Senator Mark Kelly’s, and she’s threatening our majorities in Congress. That’s why we’re holding Sinema accountable NOW — and the significant resources we just committed to LUCHA and Be A Hero came entirely from thousands of folks like you pitching in. We're energized by all the Arizonans and folks across the country who are ready to join us to beat Kyrsten Sinema. Let’s keep it up and finish the year strong. With gratitude, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC | | Sent via . subject: ANOTHER MARJORIE MISSTEP: Compares Efficacy of the COVID Vaccine to Polio Vaccine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Strahan for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/84ef71ea8506/businesswoman-jennifer-strahan-announces-challenge-to-marjorie-taylor-greene-in-ga-8591517?e=daf3f68050)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Jake Monssen, jake@strahanforcongress.com
---
| | **ANOTHER MARJORIE MISSTEP: Compares Efficacy of COVID Vaccine to Polio Vaccine**
---
| **DALLAS, Ga** : This weekend, in a failed effort to make a point about vaccines, [Rep. Greene called out Sen. Cory Booker for his COVID diagnosis after being vaccinated](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=0b0e17715d&e=daf3f68050). However, her comparison with polio and COVID fell short.

Polio has been almost eradicated in the western world since the creation and availability of the vaccine. According to the [CDC](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=f25f84ba23&e=daf3f68050), there hasn't been a polio infection in the United States for 30 years.

This is not the first time Rep. Greene has made incorrect comparisons or comments regarding COVID or vaccines. Recently, she [claimed schools didn't shut down to stop the spread of cancer](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=9a68d2cfa9&e=daf3f68050). Known to most, cancer is not airborne. It cannot spread from person to person like COVID can.

"I support vaccines and also believe individuals have the right to choose whether or not they want to receive one. Rep. Greene’s efforts to create mass hysteria surrounding these vaccines are despicable," said Strahan. "We should be thanking President Trump and his Administration for ensuring the development of these life saving vaccines in record time."
---

#

Hi friend,
Next week, 2021 will come to a close, and we’ll ring in the New Year.
We’ve accomplished a lot together, and I’m so proud of how far we’ve come as we’ve been building a grassroots movement strong enough to win against candidates backed by wealthy corporations.
Before the year ends, I hope you’ll support our campaign as we work to reach _our final $25,000 fundraising goal._
I’m looking forward to what’s ahead for our movement in 2022 and what we’ll achieve in Congress for folks across the country — but I am also up for re-election next year, so it’s time to get serious about defending my seat.
**[If you can, please chip in any amount to support my re-election campaign ahead of our end-of-year fundraising deadline next Friday. clean_body: Hi friend, Next week, 2021 will come to a close, and we’ll ring in the New Year. We’ve accomplished a lot together, and I’m so proud of how far we’ve come as we’ve been building a grassroots movement strong enough to win against candidates backed by wealthy corporations. Before the year ends, I hope you’ll support our campaign as we work to reach our final $25,000 fundraising goal. I’m looking forward to what’s ahead for our movement in 2022 and what we’ll achieve in Congress for folks across the country — but I am also up for re-election next year, so it’s time to get serious about defending my seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Republicans are going into next year’s midterms confident that they’ll take back control of Congress — and they’ve got a leg up due to partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression. But we still have what it takes to prove them wrong. Just last year, grassroots supporters like you were instrumental in my efforts to be elected to represent New York’s 17th Congressional District. Together, we made history when I became the first openly gay, Black Congressmember. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = I will continue to fight to deliver for working- and middle-class families in our country. Protecting our voting and reproductive rights, securing racial and LGBTQ+ justice, saving our planet from the climate crisis, and abolishing the filibuster are just a few of the critical issues I’m pushing for at the policy-making table. Let’s end the year on a high note and reach our final fundraising goal. Thanks for your ongoing support, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. I have an important ask to make ahead of our end-of-year fundraising deadline. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. After the end of our official fundraising deadline on New Year’s Eve, we’re going to report our fundraising numbers for this quarter. We have to put up a strong showing. But there’s another reason why this is so important. **We’re running against at least one candidate with the backing of a $10 million Super PAC and another who has committed to spending $50 million in this election. We actually have FIVE opponents in total so far. We’ve endured millions of dollars in attack ads already, with more on the way. And Donald Trump flew to Arizona and directly attacked our campaign.** So I need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of these challenges. It’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 50,000 contribution goal. **My team tells me we’re close, and if we can get there, it’ll show that our campaign is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:** **[If you’re able, will you split a contribution between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's? A few days ago, Rep. Adam Kinzinger said the following about Kevin McCarthy: “I don’t think history books are going to be kind to him.”
Respectfully, this history book line is tired. We need to be focusing on the present. Right here. Right now. A lot of folks rightfully direct a lot of their anger at the Senate’s #1 Bad Guy Mitch McConnell. **If you’re looking for the House equivalent, look no further than Kevin McCarthy.** Bends to the will of the most extreme members of his party, both his colleagues and ex-Insurrectionist-in-Chief Donald Trump? **Check.** Ignores the people he’s supposed to represent in Congress and does nothing while his constituents ask for help? **Check.** Works to block once-in-a-generation legislation because it won’t benefit him and his wealthy, corporate donors? **Check.** Always angling for the most power, even if it means giving in to people who want to overthrow the government? **Check, check, check.** [**This is our present. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Adam Kinzinger said the following about Kevin McCarthy: “I don’t think history books are going to be kind to him.” Respectfully, this history book line is tired. We need to be focusing on the present. Right here. Right now. A lot of folks rightfully direct a lot of their anger at the Senate’s #1 Bad Guy Mitch McConnell. If you’re looking for the House equivalent, look no further than Kevin McCarthy. Bends to the will of the most extreme members of his party, both his colleagues and ex-Insurrectionist-in-Chief Donald Trump? Check. Ignores the people he’s supposed to represent in Congress and does nothing while his constituents ask for help? Check. Works to block once-in-a-generation legislation because it won’t benefit him and his wealthy, corporate donors? Check. Always angling for the most power, even if it means giving in to people who want to overthrow the government? Check, check, check. The movement we’re building is one made up of everyday folks who are sick and fed up of being ignored by Kevin McCarthy. We are sick of seeing him do everything he can to stop the passing of bills that would bring real relief to working people. We are sick of seeing him sell out the people he represents and this country, by continuing to let the most extreme members of his party say whatever they want and endanger their own colleagues with their rhetoric. Let’s get it done, Bruno | | ---|--- Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District. Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

name: Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island
subject: We’re building something real. Now let’s win.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Team —

First, Cynthia and Matt pitched tents outside the State House with several
advocates and activists in a direct action to demand that everyone have
safe & dignified shelter so that no one would freeze to death this winter.

Then, little by little, the movement started to grow. They started hosting
community gatherings every night, and built a community around the basic
principle that people have a right to shelter.

But then something amazing happened. More people joined in, hundreds
signed petitions to Governor McKee, and over 100 people participated in
the sleep out, making it the largest overnight demonstration in the State
House’s history. They weren’t going anywhere, and we were only going to
get louder.

Finally, Governor McKee was forced to do something, and provided immediate
shelter for 400 unhoused people.

This is a
real movement. We’re already doing big things together. Now, let’s win
governing power and build a Rhode Island for all.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/2945?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211221_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=328%2E43343%2ET2mStu ]A Green New Deal for Rhode Island, housing justice, universal
healthcare, a living wage for all workers, and more are within our grasp.
If you can, chip in right now to help power our work and take our momentum
further.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3162?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211221_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=328%2E43343%2ET2mStu ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

name: Dr. Gillian Battino
subject: Medicare for All and COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Battino for U
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39912961/321979382/464806879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDZhZjJiZi1hOTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2XcAoUEupkQscnPZwlgjN385fwkyi63ogEUFcYAt5PA=&emci=f4f794b7-8962-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b46af2bf-a962-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25515813) | Team, It’s tragic that as we enter the holiday season, another surge of COVID-19 is damaging our nation yet again. Despite being the wealthiest, most powerful country on Earth, America has been devastated by coronavirus. We only make up 5% of the world’s population, but we have suffered more than 15% of the global deaths. It's no coincidence that we also have the most expensive health system with poor health outcomes. Our system relies on employers to provide health care, which encourages hospitals, insurers, and Big Pharma to boost their profits while discouraging public and preventative health investments. The system created a perfect storm, where millions of people lost their jobs — and access to health care — during the worst global health crisis in living memory.

**_As a physician, I’ve spent years witnessing patients put off seeing their doctor for checkups because of co-pays and deductibles — only to be diagnosed with advanced cancer, diabetes or heart disease that could have been prevented. That’s why we need Medicare for All. _** When health care is a right instead of a privilege, we incentivize preventing disease instead of reacting to it. I'm running for Senate because I'm sick of being sick. [**Will you join me in replacing Ron Johnson with the first female physician in the Senate? clean_body: | | Team, It’s tragic that as we enter the holiday season, another surge of COVID-19 is damaging our nation yet again. Despite being the wealthiest, most powerful country on Earth, America has been devastated by coronavirus. We only make up 5% of the world’s population, but we have suffered more than 15% of the global deaths. It's no coincidence that we also have the most expensive health system with poor health outcomes. Our system relies on employers to provide health care, which encourages hospitals, insurers, and Big Pharma to boost their profits while discouraging public and preventative health investments. The system created a perfect storm, where millions of people lost their jobs — and access to health care — during the worst global health crisis in living memory. As a physician, I’ve spent years witnessing patients put off seeing their doctor for checkups because of co-pays and deductibles — only to be diagnosed with advanced cancer, diabetes or heart disease that could have been prevented. That’s why we need Medicare for All. When health care is a right instead of a privilege, we incentivize preventing disease instead of reacting to it. I'm running for Senate because I'm sick of being sick. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to defeat Ron Johnson and elect the first Democratic woman physician to the U.S. Senate will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you. clean_body: It’s time to send her into retirement... | Friend, Apparently if you’re Nancy Pelosi, this is what a lifelong career in politics gets you... [Source: The Week] Pelosi has spent more than 3 decades in Congress, enriching herself above all else while peddling the Left’s radical, progressive agenda. But now, we finally have the chance to TAKE BACK the People’s House:Leaked reports claim Pelosi will RETIRE if we win the 5 seats needed to FLIP the majority. As 1 of those 5 must-win races, this is our moment to send Pelosi packing once and for all -- but I’m counting on your sustained support to help get the job done. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

clean_body: [Membership Pending] ---------- | Friend, In just a few short weeks we’ll have to close the books on 2021, and I don’t want to have a single regret about what more we could have done in this race. I really want you to join our fight to FIRE radical liberal Tony Evers, so that’s why I’m reaching out one final time to ask that you with my 2022 Campaign for governor. Every new Founding Member is one step closer to our ambitious $500,000 end-of-year goal to FIGHT BACK against Tony Evers’ latest barrage of lying attack ads as he tries to chip away at our new lead. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Mon, Nov 8, 2021 Subject: RE: Membership Pending To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, In just two months, we’ve built a remarkable grassroots coalition to defeat radical liberal Tony Evers and FLIP the battleground state of Wisconsin. But as the year draws to a close, I’ve been looking through our donor files and was surprised you never accepted your Founding Membership with our campaign... With Tony Evers already running lying attack ads against us, I’ve had to set an ambitious new goal to raise another $500,000 before we close the books on 2021. Now more than ever, I’m counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU to step up and accept your Founding Membership to ensure we have the resources to WIN this TOSS-UP race. We can’t afford for strong conservatives like yourself to be on the sidelines in this race. We need YOU. Plain and simple. An amazing opportunity lies in front of us to undo four years of devastation and failure at the hands of Tony Evers -- but I can’t seize this opportunity without you. I can promise you, Friend, your dollar will not be wasted in this race. In fact, we already have the advantage among registered Wisconsin voters... Our state’s most conservative congressional district has nearly 100,000 more registered voters than its liberal counterpart. But this all means nothing if we don’t have the resources to fight back against Evers’ attacks and press our advantage -- and that starts by growing our coalition of Founding Members right now. body:
As the Biden Regime and their Leftist Democrat Cabal in Congress continue to scare Americans into submission . . .

Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/UR75fBGtbYpKElRtR1994Q/4YD90YzAOQLhTg2K5pnlEg) As the Biden Regime and their Leftist Democrat Cabal in Congress continue to scare Americans into submission . . .

. . . as inflation rises . . .

. . . as the stock market plummets . . .

. . . as our 2nd Amendment rights are stripped with Red Flag laws . . .

. . . and now with a MASSIVE $2.8 TRILLION deficit hanging around the necks of our families, our children and grandchildren . . .

What does the GOP have to show for this year? What have they accomplished?

**What are Kevin McCarthy and his pals slapping each other on the backs over during their Congressional Christmas parties?**

NOTHING!

They're sitting back and allowing our nation to crumble in the hopes that things will GET SO BAD by the Mid-Term elections that they'll skate their way into power based upon America's disgust with Biden's performance!

It's why you need me in Congress, where I will **hold them accountable for their Do-Nothing Politics**. [**Please donate today and help me win.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/UR75fBGtbYpKElRtR1994Q/4YD90YzAOQLhTg2K5pnlEg)
