Every dollar I raise will be used to FIGHT and WIN - [**but I need your help to do just that**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/UR75fBGtbYpKElRtR1994Q/4YD90YzAOQLhTg2K5pnlEg).

By Midnight on New Year's Eve, I have to meet my goal, **or they 're going to mock me** . . . the Leftist Media will cheer my demise, while Establishment Republicans will sigh a breath of relief, thinking I'm not competitive.

**Please don 't let that happen . . . [please back my campaign today.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/UR75fBGtbYpKElRtR1994Q/4YD90YzAOQLhTg2K5pnlEg)**

Wade_ , and they are getting major help from the Supreme Court. I will _always_ fight for reproductive rights for all. I will _always_ fight to protect access to abortion. **And I am deeply honored to announce that I have just been endorsed for re-election by the Planned Parenthood Action Fund.**

Wade_****.** It appears that we cannot count on this Supreme Court to protect a woman's right to choose. It is up to Democrats to take action and defend reproductive freedom for all Americans. name: Response Needed (via Team Josh)
subject: This is what tyranny looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh
body:
Peter,

America as we know it is UNDER ATTACK.

In Joe Biden’s America:

- Conservatives are being denied their freedom of speech
- The IRS has been weaponized to spy on you
- Americans are FORCED to be vaccinated
Back in October, Joe Biden said that only dictators use executive orders. Since then, he has signed more executive orders than any other president in the first year of their presidency.

By his own definition, Joe Biden is a dictator, Peter. That’s why as one of Josh Mandel’s TOP supporters, we have an important question to ask you:

Do you think Joe Biden is a tyrant?

name: Great America Update
subject: We must engage them aggressively
body:
Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6691%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=aPw9lKWU2YzQhOjmq4RHuA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68166%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MlVYvaf4uL6iiqHOHII%2bSQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear fellow American, Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of American life. Today it asserts itself in many forms--including critical race theory--in our government, in our K-12 schools, in our corporations, in the media, in sports, and even in our military. The recent election in Virginia brought the corruption of American K-12 education, in particular, to the forefront of our national conversation. The breakdown (especially among younger Americans) of informed patriotism--without which self-government is impossible--is not something we can allow to continue. While there is reason to remain hopeful, there is much work to be done to reverse the current trends in the months and years ahead. **Education is where this attack on America began --and it is the battlefield on which we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and limited constitutional government. ** Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. We are now determined, with the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale’s mission, to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost. That’s why we have set a goal to raise $5.5 million online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2022. This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the effective ability to defend liberty through education. And we need your help. The** ** project has three key objectives:
1. _**Expand**_ the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.

2. _**Increase**_ the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution,” “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” and our newest course, “American Citizenship and Its Decline” with Victor Davis Hanson.

3. _**Launch**_** ** additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the new **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here’s why... As I’ve written to you in the past, Hillsdale College** conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty**--as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept one penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. This is the range in which most supporters give. We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated. Since we only have days remaining in 2021 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help. **You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/calendar-year-end-2021](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68167%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uQIKIW7mksywPkEVEEI37A&sysid=1)** As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture, and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, we must engage them ever more aggressively--including on the central battlefield of education. That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous year-end gift before our December 31 deadline. Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5.5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions **in 2022. Thank you for your generosity. I hope you’ll continue to stand with us by making a tax-deductible, year-end gift before December 31. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans. Please renew your support today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6691%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=aPw9lKWU2YzQhOjmq4RHuA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6691%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=aPw9lKWU2YzQhOjmq4RHuA&sysid=1)

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: Leftists arrested for assault on free speech
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077173:JfT6L1E7N:m:1:3253819041:E4731752E68B6DF85494A9CEA68F5723:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event-with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony-a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university -**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077173:JfT6L1E7N:m:1:3253819041:E4731752E68B6DF85494A9CEA68F5723:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O'Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America's Foundation._ _That's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077173:JfT6L1E7N:m:1:3253819041:E4731752E68B6DF85494A9CEA68F5723:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077173:JfT6L1E7N:m:1:3253819041:E4731752E68B6DF85494A9CEA68F5723:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077173:JfT6L1E7N:m:1:3253819041:E4731752E68B6DF85494A9CEA68F5723:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077173:JfT6L1E7N:m:1:3253819041:E4731752E68B6DF85494A9CEA68F5723:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077174:JfT6L1E7N:m:1:3253819041:E4731752E68B6DF85494A9CEA68F5723:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077175:JfT6L1E7N:m:1:3253819041:E4731752E68B6DF85494A9CEA68F5723:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077176:JfT6L1E7N:m:1:3253819041:E4731752E68B6DF85494A9CEA68F5723:r)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077177:JfT6L1E7N:m:1:3253819041:E4731752E68B6DF85494A9CEA68F5723:r)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077178:JfT6L1E7N:m:1:3253819041:E4731752E68B6DF85494A9CEA68F5723:r) **

You were added to the system March 29, 2021.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJfT6L1E7N). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJfT6L1E7N)

name: Christina Davidson
subject: No jab, no job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Health Freedom Defense Fund
body:
I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing t
I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing to you today because I think we have something important in common. I think you're a patriot, and I think you know what's at stake. You know that freedoms given away are never given back... | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfr1epplb0jl3cvjeid14766q66ctut7u0i1og70_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chh6ao74c3h2bs)
---

Friend,

I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing to you today because I think we have something important in common.

I think you're a patriot, and I think you know what's at stake.

You know that freedoms given away are never given back.

And no matter your vaccination status, you know that your medical decisions are between you and your doctor - not you and your government, or you and your boss.

**That's why I'm suing the federal government alongside of 6,000 other federal employees with the help of the Health Freedom Defense Fund and why I hope I can count on your generous support today.**

[**Will you give $25, $50, $100 or more and give us the ammunition we need to win this legal battle?**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ziu3katql9278m9i1ci4dr99aq40ui01q89mcrc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chh6ao74c3h2bs)

My name is Christina Davidson, I'm a paramedic firefighter, and I've worked for the Department of Defense for 14 years.

**_If I did what the government is doing I'd lose my license on the spot._**

I'm not allowed to give my patients medication without their consent, and I'm not allowed to threaten them to take medication.

But that's exactly what's happening to me and thousands of other employees across the country, and that's why we need you on our side.

_Because what starts with us won't end with us._

**If they can do it to me, they can do it to you.**

We're taking on this legal battle because we know if we give up and give in, it's only a matter of time before they come after you, your livelihood and your family the way they came after ours.

We want to stop tyranny in its tracks and codify our medical rights into law once and for all.

[**But we don't stand a chance without you.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvvni0v6cv4e9ldp1jp3ud41qmebgora3g5ovbao_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chh6ao74c3h2bs)

I won't mince words...we've got our work cut out for us.

The government is going to fight us every step of the way.

They've already shown us how far they're willing to go to push these mandates.

They've blatantly defied the courts, and are encouraging private employers to do the same. The President has even told businesses to ignore the courts.

Federal employees lucky enough to get an exemption are required to undergo "reeducation" training.

On top of regular threats, we're told we have no chance of promotion unless we shut up and take it.

And if we're fired, it won't just be a matter of finding a new job.

They're making it so that we'll never be able to find work again.

They want to make us so desperate that we have no choice but to surrender once and for all.

This has nothing to do with health.

**They want to break our wills, break our spirits, and send a loud, clear message that they have control over our lives.**

And if we let them win, there's no turning back.

[**Which is why I hope you'll fight along with me with a generous gift of $25 or more today to help fund lawsuits to fight vaccine mandates and preserve medical freedom.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zd8lu0co7b522o6s72l1170s2svktn3cvvrnhke8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chh6ao74c3h2bs)

**I don't know if you're vaccinated - and I don't want to know.**

It's none of my business.

I want to know if you'll stand up for your countrymen when it matters most.

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,

Christina Davidson

| [ DONATE ](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zceshko4qn000au0i2pevc924k3b7mv171drumt8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chh6ao74c3h2bs)

body:
Here’s my plan:
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39913587/321982108/1058120998?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20211220_p_s_gnd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzhkNzk4Zi1hZTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPajh6F8fw2_pLMXtowq7CCDq31cJDO_pmM9MkD7lCE=&emci=10e7e129-a562-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=778d798f-ae62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684840)
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39913588/321982109/1058120998?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20211220_p_s_gnd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzhkNzk4Zi1hZTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPajh6F8fw2_pLMXtowq7CCDq31cJDO_pmM9MkD7lCE=&emci=10e7e129-a562-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=778d798f-ae62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684840)
---
| | Team, Last week, we rolled out my plan for a Green New Deal for Massachusetts. And the day we did, it was around sixty degrees in Boston. Climate change is already here – and it is an existential crisis both to Massachusetts and our planet as a whole. If we want to provide a future for our kids, we need to act immediately. My plan will allow Massachusetts to rapidly transition away from fossil fuels and create tens of thousands of green jobs. It will expand and electrify our public transportation systems across the commonwealth, transition our grid to 100% renewable energy, and work to make all public transit fare-free. [_**This is important – and I need to know if you’re with me. If you’re ready for a Green New Deal for Massachusetts, add your name right away.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39913589/321982110/232350256?refcode=em_20211220_p_s_gnd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzhkNzk4Zi1hZTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPajh6F8fw2_pLMXtowq7CCDq31cJDO_pmM9MkD7lCE=&emci=10e7e129-a562-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=778d798f-ae62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684840) We have the tools and resources we need to meet this moment and address the climate crisis all while building a better future for everyone across Massachusetts. We’ll get to work establishing an East-West rail, along with robust regional transit, to better connect all corners of the Commonwealth while working to bring down vehicle emissions. And we’ll not only defend low-income communities and communities of color from the disproportionate impacts of climate change, but make sure they are first in line to share in the benefits of the new green economy. There’s so much work to do to secure a future for our families in the fight against climate change. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves to advance climate justice and develop a clean energy economy that sustains all of us. It’s too important to sit on the sidelines and wait for others to take action. We need to act now to start building a better future for all our communities. [_**If you’re ready for a Green New Deal for Massachusetts, add your name to our petition right away.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39913590/321982111/232350256?refcode=em_20211220_p_s_gnd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzhkNzk4Zi1hZTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPajh6F8fw2_pLMXtowq7CCDq31cJDO_pmM9MkD7lCE=&emci=10e7e129-a562-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=778d798f-ae62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684840) Together, we will deliver a Green New Deal for our kids, for our families, and for our future. Thank you for being in the fight with me. Saludos, Sonia | Sonia Chang-Díaz is a State Senator running for Governor to make real change for Massachusetts families. She is the driving force behind many of the progressive battles we’ve won on Beacon Hill. She never backs down from a fight, and needs folks like you on her team. | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39913591/321982112/676662639?refcode=em_20211220_p_s_gnd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzhkNzk4Zi1hZTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPajh6F8fw2_pLMXtowq7CCDq31cJDO_pmM9MkD7lCE=)

clean_body: Here’s my plan: | | | | | Team, Last week, we rolled out my plan for a Green New Deal for Massachusetts. And the day we did, it was around sixty degrees in Boston. Climate change is already here – and it is an existential crisis both to Massachusetts and our planet as a whole. If we want to provide a future for our kids, we need to act immediately. My plan will allow Massachusetts to rapidly transition away from fossil fuels and create tens of thousands of green jobs. It will expand and electrify our public transportation systems across the commonwealth, transition our grid to 100% renewable energy, and work to make all public transit fare-free. We have the tools and resources we need to meet this moment and address the climate crisis all while building a better future for everyone across Massachusetts. We’ll get to work establishing an East-West rail, along with robust regional transit, to better connect all corners of the Commonwealth while working to bring down vehicle emissions. And we’ll not only defend low-income communities and communities of color from the disproportionate impacts of climate change, but make sure they are first in line to share in the benefits of the new green economy. There’s so much work to do to secure a future for our families in the fight against climate change. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves to advance climate justice and develop a clean energy economy that sustains all of us. It’s too important to sit on the sidelines and wait for others to take action. We need to act now to start building a better future for all our communities. Together, we will deliver a Green New Deal for our kids, for our families, and for our future. Thank you for being in the fight with me. Saludos, Sonia | Sonia Chang-Díaz is a State Senator running for Governor to make real change for Massachusetts families. She is the driving force behind many of the progressive battles we’ve won on Beacon Hill. She never backs down from a fight, and needs folks like you on her team. | = | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, . | Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-Díaz

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Before I run some last-minute errands before the holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Hey Derek — I was just sitting down at the kitchen table and going over my list of errands for this weekend and I found myself getting a bit contemplative. What came to mind was how lucky I am to have such wonderful supporters like you who receive these emails, and all you have done to help me during the course of the year. And I couldn’t let the moment pass without letting you know I was thinking of you. We’ve done so much this year. It’s amazing to think we began 2021 sprinting through the final stretch of the Georgia Senate races, followed by the most devastating day our nation has endured in recent memory on January 6, then another impeachment. But as the year went on, there has been light. That light brings us to today, where the “to do” list seems to be getting longer and longer. But all happy chores. I’m looking forward to see all of my family and spending time with friends. I hope you are too. Stay healthy out there. And thank you again for everything — time to go shopping. Wish me luck! — Adam P.S. If you are in the giving spirit ahead of the holiday, it’d mean so much if you could make a contribution today. We’re going to be shutting down our offices and these emails for a few days, and the new fiscal year is just around the corner. It’d mean so much if you can help us close the year strong with just a $10 donation. Thanks for all you do. | | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39913586/321982106/-1966934778?amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20211221_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTRkZWE0My1hZTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w2WZn9wzoUTJpYDXuT_cEyxhcgw7A-NdjYiJ72rHhmU=)

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: enough chatter, it's time to vote!
disclaimer_text: paid for by ending tax breaks for multinational corporations and the mega-wealthy
body:
| |
---
As we enter the final weeks of 2021, I am reminded of how far we have come — and how far we still have to go to protect our democracy and the future direction of our country. Despite our critical electoral victories in 2020, the poison of Trump’s Big Lie is still coursing through our politics and being used by Republican-controlled state legislatures to enact laws that would undermine the legitimacy of our electoral process and make it harder for people of color and younger voters to access the ballot box. And while we made historic progress this year with the passage of the American Rescue Plan and the infrastructure modernization bill, our razor-thin Democratic majority, which requires 100% caucus unity on any measure, has frustrated our ability to advance the essential work we still must do. That essential work includes ending or amending the filibuster to pass the Voting Rights Act and the Freedom to Vote Act to protect our elections. It also means passing the Build Back Better plan to expand educational and workforce opportunities for all, reduce the financial squeeze on American families, and tackle the climate crisis — all paid for by ending tax breaks for multinational corporations and the mega-wealthy. **Despite the frustrations and setbacks we have faced, this fight is not over. Our democracy cannot survive if the majority of Americans have no say, if a minority can stop all votes on the key issues facing our country, and if the act of voting itself is allowed to become a legitimate political target.** There's been enough talking, tweeting and chattering. The Senate must return on January 3rd ready to take a series of key votes. The American people deserve to see exactly where every senator stands on votes to reform the filibuster, pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, and pass the Build Back Better agenda. It's time for the Senate to vote! The road ahead may not be easy, but the work we are engaged in together will determine the future of our democracy and the kind of America we and our children will live in. With your help, and the active engagement of so many others across this country, we will succeed in advancing the public interest and protecting the integrity of our democracy. Wishing you and yours a happy and healthy holiday season. Onwards, Chris
* * *

The road ahead may not be easy, but the work we are engaged in together will determine the future of our democracy and the kind of America we and our children will live in. With your help, and the active engagement of so many others across this country, we will succeed in advancing the public interest and protecting the integrity of our democracy. Wishing you and yours a happy and healthy holiday season. Onwards, Chris * | Grassroots supporters like you help our campaign make the investments it will take to re-elect Chris in 2022 and protect our Democratic Senate majority: | = | = ---|--- PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate Van Hollen for Senate | 10605 Concord Street, Suite 202 | Kensington, MD, 20895 If you need to, click to receive only our most important emails or you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

Peter,

Republicans lost the 2020 Presidential election, and they are trying to find ways to prevent that from happening again, no matter how unconstitutional. We are now seeing unprecedented attempts at gerrymandering and making it harder for people to vote.

Voting rights are under attack, and Ron Johnson is doing nothing about it. It’s not even that he’s doing nothing though, **he’s actively trying to stop any progress or legislation that would protect the right to vote.**

The Republican attacks on our democracy that we are seeing across the country are completely unacceptable, and the federal government must step in and stop them. We must pass both the ‘John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act’ and the ‘For the People Act’. We must set a federal standard to protect voting rights nationwide.

clean_body: The Republican attacks on our democracy that we are seeing across the country are completely unacceptable. | | = Peter, Republicans lost the 2020 Presidential election, and they are trying to find ways to prevent that from happening again, no matter how unconstitutional. We are now seeing unprecedented attempts at gerrymandering and making it harder for people to vote. Voting rights are under attack, and Ron Johnson is doing nothing about it. It’s not even that he’s doing nothing though, he’s actively trying to stop any progress or legislation that would protect the right to vote. The Republican attacks on our democracy that we are seeing across the country are completely unacceptable, and the federal government must step in and stop them. We must pass both the ‘John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act’ and the ‘For the People Act’. We must set a federal standard to protect voting rights nationwide. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = The most important thing we can do for our democracy is defeating Ron Johnson, and I’m building the only campaign that can take him on and win. We’ve shown that we can raise the grassroots resources to outspend his special interest donors -- but we can’t let up now. Alex isn’t taking a penny of corporate PAC money, but that means we’re relying on people like you to get us to where we need to be. And right now, we’re falling dangerously behind our goals. = Nothing less than the future of American democracy is at risk. -Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Hello,
I don’t want the NRA’s money. The only thing I want from them is an “F” rating so I can wear it like a badge of honor. But not my opponent Chuck Grassley.
Less than 90 days ago, Grassley took yet another check from the NRA. And then the NRA got exactly what they paid for: **Days after 4 more kids were murdered in a school shooting, Chuck Grassley stood up and BLOCKED a bill requiring universal background checks for gun purchases.**
There is a gun violence epidemic in this country, and we need to finally pass meaningful gun safety reform. The only way we’ll get it done, though, is by electing more bold Democrats willing to stand up to the NRA and all their blood money.
**I’m running against Chuck Grassley, and the polls show we can win. But I need your help if we’re going to defeat Grassley and the NRA:**
[**Please, before our next critical fundraising deadline, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to my campaign? With your help, we can defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39913934/321984139/-42398318?refcode=em20211221pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjdjMjliOS1iMTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K1KXNkTFBVaQPAZRAdet2FHVXmxXt4MFJrvZLhTr-Ks=)

clean_body: Hello, I don’t want the NRA’s money. The only thing I want from them is an “F” rating so I can wear it like a badge of honor. But not my opponent Chuck Grassley. Less than 90 days ago, Grassley took yet another check from the NRA. And then the NRA got exactly what they paid for: Days after 4 more kids were murdered in a school shooting, Chuck Grassley stood up and BLOCKED a bill requiring universal background checks for gun purchases. There is a gun violence epidemic in this country, and we need to finally pass meaningful gun safety reform. The only way we’ll get it done, though, is by electing more bold Democrats willing to stand up to the NRA and all their blood money. I’m running against Chuck Grassley, and the polls show we can win. But I need your help if we’re going to defeat Grassley and the NRA: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Mike Franken, Vice Admiral, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

Our fundraising numbers and donors will go public for everyone (including Derrick Van Orden and Donald Trump!) to see. We still have $9,230 to raise to hit our goal for the quarter, and it will take a massive surge from supporters to get us there. Which is why we have to ask: = | = NAME: On Record Donated to Brad Pfaff? No, not yet! Date of last contribution? N/A Suggested action: = = = = = = = When the books close on December 31 at midnight, we’ll have a final list of who stood with Brad Pfaff from the very beginning. So that's why there has never been a better time to make your first donation. Every donation in our record sends a loud message to our Capitol Insurrectionist opponent that western Wisconsin does not support his extreme ideas. But if we’re going to keep him out of Congress, we need everyone’s help before this important deadline. = = = = = = = There is strength in numbers. When does the madness end? | ****
---
Peter,

**_This is shameful and outrageous, even for the Biden Administration._**

Joe Biden’s White House _HUNG UP_ on me when I called to confront their _WEAK_ stance on _Communist Cuba_. The radical Left clearly does not care about anyone, and the WHITE HOUSE hanging up on me about a call about **fighting oppression is just _MORE_ evidence of that.**

_Joe Biden and his gang of Socialists on Capitol Hill_ want to take our country down the self-destructing **path of socialism,** and we _MUST_ stop them.

I want to show the White House and Joe Biden that the American people are **_DONE with their FAILURES and think Biden is UNFIT to lead. Can I count on you to stand with us?_**

Biden’s failures have made America less safe, MORE EXPENSIVE, and have set us on a path to destruction.

I want to get **_500,000 signatures from America First Patriots by MIDNIGHT_**. The White House needs to know what the American people REALLY think.

| | | Over the weekend, Senator Joe Manchin declared on Fox News that there’s no way he can support the Build Back Better Act – the bill that would be life changing for millions of families and help us fight climate change. **With a 50-50 split in the Senate, we need Manchin on board.** If he doesn’t support the progressive Build Back Better Act, President Biden’s agenda and everything we’ve fought for will unravel. Even [coal miners](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd7a2ec5-5f44-4434-a357-62164667c4b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) are calling on Manchin to reconsider! We can’t allow Joe Manchin to sink this historic bill – not after we’ve come this far. [Sign your name: Tell Joe Manchin to vote YES on the Build Back Better Act >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0efcff9d-874d-4631-b5c6-67ed96fcde9b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Donald J. Trump December 21st, 2021
Why isn’t the Unselect Committee of highly partisan political hacks investigating the CAUSE of the January 6th protest, which was the rigged Presidential Election of 2020? Does anybody notice that they want to stay as far away from that topic as possible, the numbers don’t work for them, or even come close. The only thing they can do is not talk about it. Look at what is going on now in Pennsylvania, Arizona, Georgia, Wisconsin, and, to a lesser extent, Michigan where the numbers are horrendously corrupt in Detroit, but the weak Republican RINOs in the Michigan House and Senate don’t want to touch the subject. In many ways a RINO is worse than a Radical Left Democrat, because you don’t know where they are coming from and you have no idea how bad they really are for our Country. The good news is there are fewer and fewer RINOs left as we elect strong Patriots who love America. I will be having a news conference on January 6th at Mar-a-Lago to discuss all of these points, and more. Until then, remember, the insurrection took place on November 3rd, it was the completely unarmed protest of the rigged election that took place on January 6th.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Mask Wearing, Vaccinated Walz Has COVID
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_has_covid&n=1)
---
December 21st, 2021
## Mask Wearing, Fully Vaccinated Walz Has COVID
Fully Vaccinated Governor Walz told the media today that he [tested positive for COVID-19](https://www.action4liberty.com/mask_wearing_fully_vaccinated_governor_walz_tested_positive_for_covid?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_has_covid&n=2). Despite mask wearing and recently receiving the booster shot, Walz still contracted the virus. In October, Walz was joined by former Governor Tim Pawlenty in a media stunt showing them both getting their booster shots. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/mask_wearing_fully_vaccinated_governor_walz_tested_positive_for_covid?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_has_covid&n=3) "I encourage every Minnesotan to get tested before the holidays, and to roll up their sleeves and get their vaccine and their booster to ensure they, too, have strong protection against COVID-19," stated Walz. **Notice the change in talking points? Walz is no longer giving us the BS line about "get the vaccine to stop the spread."** As recently as August, prior to the Minnesota State Fair, Walz was urging Minnesotans to get vaccinated to limit the spread of COVID. Now the Governor is selling the vaccines as a personal protection issue - not a defense from getting the disease. If fully vaccinated Walz can still get COVID, why are these tyrants still pushing the vaccine mandate? Young, healthy people - and especially those who have the natural anti-bodies - should not be forced to get the experimental jab. And as Dr. Neil Shah has been saying recently, Walz needs to [stop with the Vaccine Only approach](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=JgIBoJDRsS4q5gIGXkALnfiL8Pw2g32hFvCbWy8k5ZU&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_has_covid&n=4). There are at-home treatment protocols that could save lives! **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_has_covid&n=5 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_has_covid&n=5)
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_has_covid&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_has_covid&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_has_covid&n=8), software for leaders.

clean_body: | | | A stolen right-wing majority on the Supreme Court is eager to dismantle Roe v. Wade. The United States has a pro-choice majority and Melanie D’Arrigo is running for Congress to make sure our laws reflect that — and, she’s running against an anti-choice Republican for this open seat. The House has already passed the Women’s Health Protection Act, which codifies Roe into law. Now, the Senate must act. **** a pro-choice majority in Congress, Republican-controlled state governments will continue passing stricter, more extreme abortion bans and other direct attacks on our bodily autonomy. That’s why women’s groups like the National Organization for Women PAC, Her Bold Move, Matriarch, Progressive Women of NY, and Moms in Office are working to help Melanie hold a must-win open Democratic seat. Melanie will fight to end the Hyde Amendment and fight for reproductive justice. Will you stand with her today? **** for standing up. – Team D’Arrigo | is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. We are proud to report that we are on track with our goal! Once we reported this to Harriet, she said, “Wow. I am so grateful for the support of the people of Wyoming and this nation. clean_body: | | | | Harriet counts on you. | Friend, Last week was our Mid-Month check-in with Harriet. As we approach our End-of-Year deadline, it is important that we stay on track for our fundraising goals, if we want to defeat Cheney. We are proud to report that we are on track with our goal! Once we reported this to Harriet, she said, “Wow. I am so grateful for the support of the people of Wyoming and this nation. Remember, it is the grassroots citizens like these, that give us such enthusiasm and momentum.” Our fight does not end here, friend. We want to make sure we stay ahead and CRUSH our goal. You have always been a valued member of Team Hageman, can we count on your support? When we sit down after Christmas, we want Harriet to see your name one more time! Don’t let her down as she continues to fight for you, as she has for the last 25+ years. Remember we deserve better and we demand better. That is why we need Harriet! Thank you for all you do. Hageman Finance Team | | | |

Friends,

The way we see it, this race ends in one of two ways:
* **_OUTCOME 1:_** We fall short of our fundraising goals and fail to counter Gov. DeSantis and his right-wing, billionaire donors. He’s **REELECTED** by an **OVERWHELMING MARGIN** in 2022. We lose our best chance to build a Florida for All, where everyone has a seat at the table.

* **_OUTCOME 2:_** We go into 2022 with a surge of contributions from people like you who believe Florida -- and the United States -- deserve better than Ron DeSantis. We **DEFEAT** Gov. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Deadline: 12/31
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Our final test of the year comes in just 10 days. New Year’s Eve marks our last FEC fundraising deadline.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211221-2698-header&t=1&akid=2698%2E2526796%2E07wyo_)
As we come to the end of 2021, we want to express our gratitude for all you’ve done to grow our movement during this challenging year.
**Thanks to all of you, Alexandria’s campaign is once again the number one small-dollar funded campaign in Congress.**
Our final test of the year comes in just 10 days. New Year’s Eve marks our last FEC fundraising deadline. When the clock strikes midnight, we’ll close up our books and then report all our fundraising totals publicly for everyone to see.
**We’ve set a big goal of raising $1.25 million by the end of the year, and we can’t make it without some help.**[Will you chip in your first $3 now before our FEC filing deadline on 12/31? Your contribution could put us over the line.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211221?refcode=em20211221-2698-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2698_2526796_07wyo_&akid=2698%2E2526796%2E07wyo_)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211221?refcode=em20211221-2698-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2698_2526796_07wyo_&akid=2698%2E2526796%2E07wyo_)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211221?refcode=em20211221-2698-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2698_2526796_07wyo_&akid=2698%2E2526796%2E07wyo_)**
We don’t want to fall short on this goal. The truth is that this past quarter has been our toughest in recent memory for fundraising. We know that we need a big surge to close out December and make up for some lost ground.
Obviously, it’s no small feat to raise $1.25 million. But, hypothetically, if just 1-in-10 people reading this email decided to chip in a little bit, we would hit our goal in a matter of hours and be _really_ proud of the fundraising total we’ll file to the FEC.
[What do you say? Can you make your first $3 donation today to help us push over the line on this big end-of-year goal? No donation is too small, every little bit counts.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211221?refcode=em20211221-2698-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2698_2526796_07wyo_&akid=2698%2E2526796%2E07wyo_)
Together we are showing that we can run a strong, progressive grassroots campaign and compete at the highest levels to keep Alexandria fighting for us in Congress — all without taking a dime from corporate PACs or special interests.
Thanks for being part of our movement.
\- Team AOC

clean_body: Our final test of the year comes in just 10 days. New Year’s Eve marks our last FEC fundraising deadline. As we come to the end of 2021, we want to express our gratitude for all you’ve done to grow our movement during this challenging year. Thanks to all of you, Alexandria’s campaign is once again the number one small-dollar funded campaign in Congress. Our final test of the year comes in just 10 days. New Year’s Eve marks our last FEC fundraising deadline. When the clock strikes midnight, we’ll close up our books and then report all our fundraising totals publicly for everyone to see. We’ve set a big goal of raising $1.25 million by the end of the year, and we can’t make it without some help. We don’t want to fall short on this goal. The truth is that this past quarter has been our toughest in recent memory for fundraising. We know that we need a big surge to close out December and make up for some lost ground. Obviously, it’s no small feat to raise $1.25 million. But, hypothetically, if just 1-in-10 people reading this email decided to chip in a little bit, we would hit our goal in a matter of hours and be really proud of the fundraising total we’ll file to the FEC. Together we are showing that we can run a strong, progressive grassroots campaign and compete at the highest levels to keep Alexandria fighting for us in Congress — all without taking a dime from corporate PACs or special interests. Thanks for being part of our movement. \- Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Team Sully Highlights
subject: As we prepare for Christmas...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
We're back with another edition of our weekly recap email. Here's what Sully and the team have been up to! | |
---
Team,

Before you start your Christmas celebration with friends and family, we wanted to share what you might have missed last week.

🗞️ **IN THE NEWS**

The tragic epidemic of violence ravaging our state continues to remind us why support for law enforcement is so essential. This is not normal, and it’s why changing leadership in this state is so important. We made this video to show just how bad Chicago has gotten to draw attention to this tragic crime epidemic.

clean_body: We're back with another edition of our weekly recap email. Here's what Sully and the team have been up to! | | Team, Before you start your Christmas celebration with friends and family, we wanted to share what you might have missed last week. 🗞️ IN THE NEWS The tragic epidemic of violence ravaging our state continues to remind us why support for law enforcement is so essential. This is not normal, and it’s why changing leadership in this state is so important. We made this video to show just how bad Chicago has gotten to draw attention to this tragic crime epidemic. 📲 SULLY TV One advantage of Sully being one of eight kids? The Sully fam has a whole lot of cousins. And that makes it no problem for us to field a full cast for our annual Christmas pageant! It’s one of my favorite Sully Fam traditions. Costumes, sets, singing - we go all out. Just watch: 📲 SULLY ON SOCIAL ’Tis the season for giving. We’re sending gifts to our most loyal social media followers once a day. Want to snag some Team Sully merch for yourself? All you have to do is engage with one of our posts on any platform to be eligible. 🎤 MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD Respond to this week’s one-click poll: What issue facing Illinois do you think is driving our record population loss? 📊 ILLINOIS FACT OF THE WEEK This year alone, JB Pritzker's appointees on the Prisoner Review Board have released , including child and cop killers. From all of us here at Team Sully HQ, we hope you have a wonderful Christmas. God bless! We'll see you next week, Team Sully | | | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

With everything going on in Washington right now -- from the Build Back Better Act to the renewed call for voting rights -- I want to cut through the noise and ask you about something that's weighing heavily on me.

**The anniversary of January 6th is fast approaching. It's still jarring to recall that there was a serious, coordinated attempt to throw out the results of a legitimate election. Here in America._Let that sink in..._**

As someone who was deployed to the Middle East to protect and defend democracy, this is something I care deeply about. But, I need to know if it's something that's on your mind, and voters’ minds as well.

We just got word of a PowerPoint presentation that was circulated in the White House detailing a plan to “declare a national emergency” to overturn the 2020 election results.

The PowerPoint's author, Army Colonel Phil Waldron, reportedly visited the White House several times to meet with members of Congress and Trump’s chief of staff.

[**How important is it that members of Congress like Doug LaMalfa are investigated and held accountable for their role in the January 6th insurrection?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39909059/321957635/-835618133?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDY1MTNiZS05MjYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Snkln8u0xIZxAllwpudzyD9YKidRUMA18Q5vjy7i198=&emci=b66513be-9262-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bd6513be-9262-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=11663292)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Manchin 🤔
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Democrats should vote like Democrats!
#
Derek, Joe Manchin announced he’s a "no" vote on Build Back Better...the legislation Biden and Democrats have been working on all year...on Fox News.
I truly don't get it. 🙄
We're talking about a popular + transformative bill that would do everything from cutting child care costs nearly in half for families in Manchin’s home state of West Virginia to expanding health coverage to over 100,000 uninsured Pennsylvanians.
**Call me old fashioned, but I think Democrats should vote like Democrats.** We don't need to be so concerned with what Republican senators or mega-donors will think — we just need to vote for what’s right for the American people.
**Here's a promise: If you trust me with your vote in 2022, you’ll always have mine in Washington, DC.** I'll never base my vote on what I think rich people or Republicans want to see — I'll just do what I know to be right.
It’s clear that without having a trustworthy 51st vote when it counts, we won't be able to toss the filibuster and get things done. That’s what’s at stake in Pennsylvania.
**[So, I'm asking for your help right now: Can you chip in your first $5 to help flip PA and establish a real Senate majority?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38852?refcode=em20211221-3918&t=1&akid=3918%2E434096%2E1mIIHJ)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38852?refcode=em20211221-3918&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3918%2E434096%2E1mIIHJ)**
I am truly, truly grateful for all the support you've given our campaign so far. If millions of people here in Pennsylvania and across the country donate, volunteer and spread the word, I'm confident we will win. And when we do, I'll go to the Senate and fight for us as hard as I can. I guarantee it.
Thanks for everything,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211221-3918-footer&t=21&refcode2=3918_434096_1mIIHJ&akid=3918%2E434096%2E1mIIHJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=22&akid=3918%2E434096%2E1mIIHJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=3918%2E434096%2E1mIIHJ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Cassie Henry, Beto for Texas
subject: We’re still looking for your response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Did you see this?
#
Hi, I wanted to check in. Did you see Nick’s (our campaign manager) note about our 2022 strategy survey?
We’re not done making decisions about how we focus and grow this campaign in the critical months ahead. **And we’re still looking for supporters like you to give your feedback.**
[Will you add another voice from Pennsylvania and fill out our 2022 Strategy Survey now? It should only take a minute!](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20211221&t=1&akid=167972%2E444211%2E553Sil)
I really appreciate it. We’ll keep you posted on what we’re hearing from you and other supporters, and how we plan to use your feedback to make our campaign even stronger.
–Cassie Henry
Deputy Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas
_\-----Forwarded message-----
_ Date: Friday, December 17, 2021
From: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
Subject: re: our 2022 strategy
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Hey — it's Nick, Beto's campaign manager.
I just got out of a 2022 strategy meeting with our senior leadership team and wanted to reach out. We have big plans for next year including traveling to every corner of Texas, turning out a historic number of voters, and electing the first Democratic Governor to Texas since 1991.
But one important perspective was missing from our meeting — _yours!_ **This campaign is about all of us, especially the people from places that are often forgotten or overlooked, so I'd love to hear your thoughts on our 2022 strategy.**
[With that in mind, we put together a brief survey. Please, will you represent Pennsylvania and complete our 2022 Strategy Survey?](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20211221&t=2&akid=167972%2E444211%2E553Sil)
**[Start the survey »](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20211221&t=3&akid=167972%2E444211%2E553Sil)**
With your help, we will elect Beto and defeat Greg Abbott next year, but we need to be clear-eyed about the challenges that lie ahead. Abbott has a $55 million war chest, and his corporate donors will spend whatever it takes to protect their power.
**That's why it's imperative we have a foolproof campaign strategy in place.** Our senior leadership team will be meeting Monday morning to review the results of this survey, and I hope we can count on your response before then.
[**Please take a moment to give your input. It will take just a few seconds and help us run a better campaign.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20211221&t=4&akid=167972%2E444211%2E553Sil)
We'll be in touch soon to share our results with you.
Thank you,
Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211221-167972-footer&t=5&refcode2=167972_444211_553Sil&akid=167972%2E444211%2E553Sil)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=6&akid=167972%2E444211%2E553Sil)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=167972%2E444211%2E553Sil)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Defend Roe (add your name)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Roe v. Wade is at risk like never before. We need to fight back.
#
Peter,
Make no mistake: reproductive rights are at risk like never before.
With more abortion restriction laws enacted around the country this year than any year in our nation’s history – and an anti-abortion majority cemented on the Supreme Court, we need to do everything we can to protect reproductive rights nationwide by passing the Women’s Health Protection Act.
**[We need 10,000 signatures on our petition before midnight to show the groundswell of support our movement has to put a stop to the GOP’s crusade against abortion rights. Will you add your name right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39916380/322003935/1799832511?code=murray&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpm-211221-whpa-joint-action&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzBkODliMC1iZjYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=budvW-AqEsvUuWHLHNJJhxETU9DGuaLakxDN_Y1yzPw=&emci=151461aa-bf62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=0c0d89b0-bf62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=13116610)**
Peter, the GOP’s extreme anti-abortion laws – like the one in Texas that bans abortion after six weeks, before many people even know they are pregnant – are endangering patients seeking care each and every day and taking away their ability to make their own decisions about pregnancy and parenting.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
"She's just willing to keep having the conversation and willing to find a way forward."
#
Peter,
Last night, Pramila went on Rachel Maddow’s show to discuss her continued advocacy for the Build Back Better Act’s popular policies.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9066?refcode=em20211221-894&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=894%2E420207%2EEFVI4m)
**Maddow had this to say about Pramila:** "One of the central players in the effort to craft this Build Back Better deal, Washington Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal is chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus. In that role, she has led Progressives in the House in their many negotiations...She's not a pushover. She's not being irresponsible or kind of a squish. **She's just willing to keep having the conversation and willing to find a way forward."**
[**Can you stand with Pramila today in her continued fight for our popular, progressive policies in the Build Back Better Act? Chip in $3 right now to help fuel her fight. We can’t back down or let up.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9066?refcode=em20211221-894&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=894%2E420207%2EEFVI4m)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9066?refcode=em20211221-894&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=894%2E420207%2EEFVI4m)**
Pramila fought tirelessly for the President’s agenda in the House, and she’s continuing her advocacy to push the Senate to deliver for the people. Pramila’s fight to make the largest investment in working people, families, and our communities in decades continues no matter how tough it gets or how much money corporations and special interests spend against us.
Rachel Maddow wasn’t the only MSNBC host to notice Pramila’s tenacity last night. Lawrence O’Donnell added: "Congresswoman Jayapal actually presents an optimistic view of what's next. She actually does it and it's real."
Pramila isn’t giving up — she’s leading the way to ensure the Senate takes action on the many popular, progressive policies in Build Back Better. She knows the Senate can’t fail the people. Too much is at stake.
[**Peter, can you help fuel our work to keep the pressure on and protect our progressive wins in the Build Back Better Act with a $3 donation today? We have to keep up our fight, and by chipping in today, you would be making a huge contribution to this critical work.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9066?refcode=em20211221-894&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=894%2E420207%2EEFVI4m)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

name: Mark Kelly
subject: In just a moment, I am going to ask you to contribute $3 to my re-election. Will you please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
In just ten days, we close the books on the last official FEC fundraising deadline before the election year.
#

Friends —
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make your first $3 contribution to my re-election campaign. Please give me a moment to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth:
In just ten days, we close the books on the last official FEC fundraising deadline before the election year. And when it ends, we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers for everyone to see.
The press will be looking to see the strength of our campaign with so much at stake. Our opponents will be looking to see if we’re vulnerable to attack or if their negative ads have taken their toll.
Right now, we’re about 2/3 through the month but less than 1/2 way to our goal. So we really need A LOT of donations in the next few days, especially since the donations will slow during the holidays.
So please. I need you today. What do you say?
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to give me the peace of mind we can reach our goals before this critical FEC fundraising deadline ends and we’re legally required to report our numbers?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?refcode=em211221-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1832_6688874_l1FIr3&akid=1832%2E6688874%2El1FIr3)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Doug Gansler
subject: Please join me for a special evening in Baltimore!
body:
| Hi friends, On January 6, I'll be in Baltimore for an evening reception with a great group of passionate supporters. This is a special opportunity for me to speak with you directly about the issues that matter most in Maryland, and our country, regarding women's reproductive rights, climate change, the criminal justice system, and COVID recovery. If you are fully vaccinated and would like to attend, RSVP by replying to this email or emailing: tom@ganslerformaryland.com. Please remember to include the names of all attendees in your message. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: More MLK. Less CRT.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Speak out against CRT! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=23a577ae66&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

The Dems and their Socialist teachers union buddies have been pushing social guilt and segregation, under the banner of "Critical Race Theory".

_I love America! And one of the things I love about America is how we can come together to confront big problems._

CRT pushes us away from each other. That was not the vision of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. And I let 'em know about it!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e330809171&e=afa21b7626), a swing district in the Orlando area. This is a targeted district by the NRCC and we can take this district!**

I'm a substitute teacher, and I see a lot of what's happening in the schools.

And they need to answer for subjecting our kids to CRT!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9383bbc07e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Last week I sent the opening salvo downrange.... I admire and respect our Polk County school administrators and teachers. But, Critical Race Theory must be erased from Polk County schools, it’s the law of the land! We must teach our children to join together. We are not oppressors and victims, we are Americans!

The Constitution of the United States clearly sets forth that we are endowed by our Creator with certain inalienable rights which among these are life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

This is the standard in which we should aspire. Integration, not separation.

Lest we forget, the ultimate goal set forth by Dr. Martin Luther King Junior, who remarked in his timeless “I HAVE A DREAM” speech from the steps of the Lincoln Memorial....

_"I have a dream that my four little children will one day live in a nation where they will not be judged by the color of their skin but by the content of their character."_

Unfortunately, Dr. King’s vision is not the philosophy at the bedrock of our school districts diversity program! All you have to do is go over to the district website and read for yourself!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=75c7fedc3c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **I am a substitute teacher. I see the good but I also see what needs to be rooted out!**

My Socialist opponent, Darren Soto, disagrees. Biden disagrees. They want Americans divided by race. I want us united by being Americans!

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had, because I stood up for our country. I fought for America First just like I did in the military! Will you stand alongside me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fc0916591e&e=afa21b7626)

Help me stand for Americans against Biden, and those who would destroy and divide our country! [Help me stop all of Biden's agenda!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d33d30dcd1&e=afa21b7626)

body:

---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Election Integrity, Trump endorsed candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona. I am the only candidate nationwide who has successfully developed ballot counter-fraud measures with fool-proof watermarking that we are pushing to not only be accepted and used in Arizona, but around the nation.

**And I am writing you today because we have a lot of work in front of us, and not much time.**

[_We have under two weeks to hit our fundraising goal of $50,000, and we have $38,850 left. We need this to push forward with the Pima Audit, to pressure AG Mark Brnovich to prosecute those responsible for fraud, and to make sure we are in a position to win in 2022._](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=218dc0dab8&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Can you help me with a generous donation today? ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5c9bad1980&e=44b8c466b0)_

_Right now, a donor who wishes to remain anonymous, has pledged to match 2 for 1 any donations made in the next 48 hours._

We have been making huge strides ALL year.
* After pushing for and self-funding an Election Integrity hearing in Maricopa, I helped launch America’s Audit in Maricopa, which uncovered massive amounts of fraud.
* I developed foolproof counter-fraud ballot measures and watermarking.
* I have supported grassroots Election Integrity patriots around the country.
* I have been endorsed by President Trump and countless others, speaking at his rallies.
* I have fought for and launched a successful petition to audit Pima County, which will soon be getting underway after we had an Election Integrity hearing in Pima, where 35,000 illegal and fraudulent votes were discovered.

**And it takes this much – and more – to defeat the Anti-American Socialists in 2022. They don’t care about America. They don’t care about Democracy.**

**_All they care about is winning, at any cost._**

[And this is why I so urgently need your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d0d8132199&e=44b8c466b0). Again, we have an anonymous donor that will match 2 to 1 any donation made in the next 48 hours.

_[Please help with a rush donation today! Any donation will help!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d66380c1f6&e=44b8c466b0)_

Our campaign has been attacked and silenced by the mainstream, Fake News Media. Our campaign is being attacked on ALL fronts.

**This is because I am the worst nightmare for the media and the Democrats who perpetrated this fraud. I am a former investigator and also a certified Six Sigma Process Engineer. **

This means I am the Election Integrity Conservative in Arizona who can beat the Leftists at their own game. I know what they are up to, and I’ve proved it.

**Now it’s all about the next steps. **

**Again, we must:**
* **Push Forward with the Pima Audit.**
* **Pressure AG Mark Brnovich.**
* **Secure victory for Republicans in 2022.**

[These are three goals which I will never sacrifice on, and three goals which I cannot accomplish alone. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=71eb9dbf1c&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Help me complete these critical goals with a donation today! 2022 is just around the corner, and we need a running start. Donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $1,000 or more today!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1645567922&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8077f2757f&e=44b8c466b0)

subject: Republicans are working AGAINST Americans!
