body:
Senator Patty Murray recently said in an email, "Republicans’ goals are clear. They want to block progress and make sure working
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f1NslDkyb/c?w=OCQMMRuRdoGrXdVxYpptZq9Q0kF0_N_5fx5GdHIrfcs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vc28vZjFOc2xEa3liP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Republicans are working AGAINST Americans!
---
| | [](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f1NslDkyb/c?w=VRmHFayWS3b4oyxYkwrhAeXNghm9pxgmiMo29bJ8CgA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPXdvcmtpbmdmb3J0aGVwZW9wbGUmYW1vdW50PTI1MCIsInIiOiIwNGQ2ZjQxMi1iOTkyLTQwNTItZjFhNy05ODc0YjdkYzdhMTEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
---
| | Senator Patty Murray recently said in an email, "Republicans’ goals are clear. They want to block progress and make sure working families don’t get the support they need and have earned. That’s why we just can’t let them get back control of the Senate." That was it. Three sentences to send the message that many of us are not getting. The "us" I am referring to are those out there who don't watch everything going on in politics and campaigns. The idea is that what we're facing is a challenge but also an opportunity to really do something good for the working families of America. Do I agree with her? Absolutely. Republicans don't think of working families like most of us do. They see them as too comfortable, much like themselves and therefore not in need of support. Or worse, they see these Americans as not deserving of support or assistance from our government. Working families come in a lot of versions and there's more to it than which is typically been thought of by Republicans.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f1NslDkyb/c?w=QuOBGfWNvWGLJrw5A2-rAApoci4OiHXaJ7De7LcAg7o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPXdvcmtpbmdmb3J0aGVwZW9wbGUmYW1vdW50PTI1MCIsInIiOiJiODk2ZDYzMy1iZjlhLTQ3ZDQtYmNhNS1kOTVlYjBjZGI1OTYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
---
| | Some are single parent households. Others are multigenerational. Today, these families not only include two working parents but often older children who work to contribute to the household. They are often working multiple jobs to make ends meet because their pay at one job just won't cover the necessities. You'd think someone working a full-time job would be able to support a family; not in excess, but at least in some comfort. Sadly, this is not the case for so many who find themselves living paycheck to paycheck - having to make regular difficult choices about which bill can't be put off, how much food can be afforded at the grocery store or which prescription can be filled.
I am here to tell you why the Republicans, who so often claim to be working hard for and representing working families, simply aren't doing that and won't be doing it in the future. How they makes claims that deny the reality of their position, their legislation and their votes. They talk a good game and too many have been fooled by it. So let's put the real face on this issue.
Starting with the Affordable Care Act, which Republicans HELPED TO WRITE, only to vote against it. Attacked it in the press and on social media. Supported judicial challenges to overturn it. Introduced legislation to revoke it without a single concise idea of how to replace it. That last little hypocrisy is the most obvious light to shine on them. They claimed to have an ideal replacement only if they could get it repealed first. While the ACA was far from perfect, in part largely due to the Republicans who fought back while HELPING TO WRITE IT, in was light years ahead of anything they’ve proposed, which we haven’t actually seen yet.
"While it is true that no Republican voted for the final bill, it is blatantly untrue that it contains no GOP DNA. In fact, to make such an assertion is like researching your ancestry and going no further back than your mother and father."[[Source]](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f1NslDkyb/c?w=NDZ2zWaaZSawyvcc2rn-U3o4FPI_DH7kcf4PCnvdd6A.)
And while they have fought against the ACA, tooth and nail, they fail to mention that repealing it would have deprived 31 million working Americans of the health insurance that could make the difference between seeing a doctor and ignoring a health issue that might prove detrimental to their quality of life, ability to work and in some cases being a fatal disease.
What else have they fought that actually benefits working families? Let's look at the expanded Child Tax Credit created by Democratic leadership in the White House and Congress. This benefit, paid monthly, helped lift millions of families, but especially children, out of poverty. The Republicans claim it didn't but the research proves them wrong. "A new study by my Urban Institute colleagues Greg Acs and Kevin Werner shows that, in a typical year, the expanded CTC would reduce child poverty from 14.2 percent to 8.4 percent nationally – a reduction of over 40 percent."[[Source](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f1NslDkyb/c?w=vMhP9GUQ8SfgjELQA5upMdKDYUYSQCj_PZa0d2Xv3mY.)]
Many Republicans also claim these payments aren't being used for daily expenses and feeding the economy. Again, these lies are provably untrue.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f1NslDkyb/c?w=hC_6I-8XeClI5OgT-sGlP9z_XG51bTUdm_05Fq7OaNg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPXdvcmtpbmdmb3J0aGVwZW9wbGUmYW1vdW50PTI1MCIsInIiOiIwZGJlOTFmOC00NGFiLTRjZjktYzMwOC04N2I2NmRjMDkyNDAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
---
| | Are Republicans working to increase wages for working families? Absolutely not. They've opposed a minimum wage hike for decades. And back in March, with the Senate vote on President Biden's Covid 19 relief bill, EVERY REPUBLICAN OPPOSED a 5 year graduated increase plan to double the current minimum wage to $15 per hour. EVERY SINGLE ONE!
---
|
---
| | "Since the last federal minimum wage hike — to $7.25 an hour, starting July 24, 2009 — the cost of living has increased 20%, while the price of essentials such as housing and health care have increased even faster."[[Source](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f1NslDkyb/c?w=8dt-vFIEPw1qu09uvKPfFtLZeMvL65m3gq8OEZk_63I.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JzbmV3cy5jb20vbmV3cy9taW5pbXVtLXdhZ2Utbm8taW5jcmVhc2VzLTExLXllYXJzLyIsInIiOiJlNzI3MGM0Ni0yNTNkLTRmNWEtMzMxYy0wOGEyOTllNzU2NDgiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)]
How are they fighting for working families?
Now I'm going to round out this true account of the Republican support (or lack thereof) for working families with Paid Family Leave. Once again, an issue that deeply impacts working families. From maternity to elderly care, Paid Family Leave would allow working families to avoid the question of "Can I afford to spend more time with my newborn or aging parent?"
Democrats introduced a 12 week plan. Hard negotiations with Republicans saw that cut to 4 weeks. Compared to the rest of the world, we are one of only six nations without federally mandated paid family leave. At 4 weeks, we would remain far closer to the bottom than the top.
"Of the 174 countries that offer paid leave for a personal health problem, just 26 offer four weeks or fewer, according to data from the World Policy Analysis Center at the University of California, Los Angeles." [[Source]](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f1NslDkyb/c?w=FRWSs4tCxuOtvggYeWNqKCvqCb0OWbdoPUVGgJy-dII.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vMjAyMS8xMC8yNS91cHNob3QvcGFpZC1sZWF2ZS1kZW1vY3JhdHMuaHRtbCIsInIiOiJlNzI3MGM0Ni0yNTNkLTRmNWEtMzMxYy0wOGEyOTllNzU2NDgiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)

And what makes this so wrong for Republicans to oppose, as if it wasn't already bad enough, is that ALL FEDERAL WORKERS already receive 12 weeks of paid parental leave! So are they saying only some people are good enough to receive such a benefit while others are not?
As you can see, the working families of America CANNOT RELY ON REPUBLICANS to represent their interests. To represent them in meaningful ways, through legislation, that makes life a little easier, a little better or a little safer. They don't want to see us as one nation where all are treated fairly, represented honestly and respected sincerely.
Whether in the Senate, where Patty Murray is working hard for you or the House where I want to be working hard for you; the Republicans are not doing the jobs they were elected to do but are actively fighting efforts that would improve the lives of hard working American families, help feed and clothe children, or protecting the health and safety of Americans by providing and protecting access to affordable health care.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f1NslDkyb/c?w=YzausgCHLAugRk5CtKcoFs6PmghAA1BhraR4gmSzOeo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPXdvcmtpbmdmb3J0aGVwZW9wbGUmYW1vdW50PTI1MCIsInIiOiIwNzA0OTFjMi1mMDhjLTRmOTgtZmE1YS02NjZkY2IyNmQwOTkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)

| |

| I want to represent WA-03 to:
* Defend your rights as [working people](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f1NslDkyb/c?w=UCAJkImhxoclRixm5GqYkeQtcO0DxnZQgdecK1XBrvE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzk4Tmt1NWM4Zj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiZzdGF0dXM9RHJhZnQmY2lkPTAwMDAwMDAwLTAwMDAtMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMCMvbWFpbiIsInIiOiIzZmY0NjQ3MC0xYWVmLTRmZWQtMjZhOS0zNTQ0NGJlN2Q5MDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ) and families.
* Aim for the [healthcare we all deserve](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f1NslDkyb/c?w=9W-AAnCIZZJ5cvdoJVy-C89V16oiJjNXs3BECtLiv4s.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vaGVhbHRoY2FyZSIsInIiOiIzZmY0NjQ3MC0xYWVmLTRmZWQtMjZhOS0zNTQ0NGJlN2Q5MDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ), written into law.
* Protect a [woman's bodily autonomy](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f1NslDkyb/c?w=MtB8erZjI500V9TpQYKWmhXlN4OEVPBoFJOMkvYLQWY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3dhMDMiLCJyIjoiM2ZmNDY0NzAtMWFlZi00ZmVkLTI2YTktMzU0NDRiZTdkOTAyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0) with protected reproductive care, written into law.
* Securing our [education system with the teaching](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f1NslDkyb/c?w=_ocNgJmWTWjtE5D8i1Dpk8u2BLKmBm-Ppz1GBH_Znwo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vZWR1Y2F0aW9uIiwiciI6IjNmZjQ2NDcwLTFhZWYtNGZlZC0yNmE5LTM1NDQ0YmU3ZDkwMiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9) of facts, good or bad.

clean_body: Senator Patty Murray recently said in an email, "Republicans’ goals are clear. They want to block progress and make sure working | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Republicans are working AGAINST Americans! | | | | Senator Patty Murray recently said in an email, "Republicans’ goals are clear. They want to block progress and make sure working families don’t get the support they need and have earned. That’s why we just can’t let them get back control of the Senate." That was it. Three sentences to send the message that many of us are not getting. The "us" I am referring to are those out there who don't watch everything going on in politics and campaigns. The idea is that what we're facing is a challenge but also an opportunity to really do something good for the working families of America. Do I agree with her? Absolutely. Republicans don't think of working families like most of us do. They see them as too comfortable, much like themselves and therefore not in need of support. Or worse, they see these Americans as not deserving of support or assistance from our government. Working families come in a lot of versions and there's more to it than which is typically been thought of by Republicans. | | | | | Some are single parent households. Others are multigenerational. Today, these families not only include two working parents but often older children who work to contribute to the household. They are often working multiple jobs to make ends meet because their pay at one job just won't cover the necessities. You'd think someone working a full-time job would be able to support a family; not in excess, but at least in some comfort. Sadly, this is not the case for so many who find themselves living paycheck to paycheck - having to make regular difficult choices about which bill can't be put off, how much food can be afforded at the grocery store or which prescription can be filled. I am here to tell you why the Republicans, who so often claim to be working hard for and representing working families, simply aren't doing that and won't be doing it in the future. How they makes claims that deny the reality of their position, their legislation and their votes. They talk a good game and too many have been fooled by it. So let's put the real face on this issue. Starting with the Affordable Care Act, which Republicans HELPED TO WRITE, only to vote against it. Attacked it in the press and on social media. Supported judicial challenges to overturn it. Introduced legislation to revoke it without a single concise idea of how to replace it. That last little hypocrisy is the most obvious light to shine on them. They claimed to have an ideal replacement only if they could get it repealed first. While the ACA was far from perfect, in part largely due to the Republicans who fought back while HELPING TO WRITE IT, in was light years ahead of anything they’ve proposed, which we haven’t actually seen yet. "While it is true that no Republican voted for the final bill, it is blatantly untrue that it contains no GOP DNA. In fact, to make such an assertion is like researching your ancestry and going no further back than your mother and father."[[Source]]() And while they have fought against the ACA, tooth and nail, they fail to mention that repealing it would have deprived 31 million working Americans of the health insurance that could make the difference between seeing a doctor and ignoring a health issue that might prove detrimental to their quality of life, ability to work and in some cases being a fatal disease. What else have they fought that actually benefits working families? Let's look at the expanded Child Tax Credit created by Democratic leadership in the White House and Congress. This benefit, paid monthly, helped lift millions of families, but especially children, out of poverty. The Republicans claim it didn't but the research proves them wrong. "A new study by my Urban Institute colleagues Greg Acs and Kevin Werner shows that, in a typical year, the expanded CTC would reduce child poverty from 14.2 percent to 8.4 percent nationally – a reduction of over 40 percent."] Many Republicans also claim these payments aren't being used for daily expenses and feeding the economy. Again, these lies are provably untrue. | | | | | Are Republicans working to increase wages for working families? Absolutely not. They've opposed a minimum wage hike for decades. And back in March, with the Senate vote on President Biden's Covid 19 relief bill, EVERY REPUBLICAN OPPOSED a 5 year graduated increase plan to double the current minimum wage to $15 per hour. EVERY SINGLE ONE! | | | "Since the last federal minimum wage hike — to $7.25 an hour, starting July 24, 2009 — the cost of living has increased 20%, while the price of essentials such as housing and health care have increased even faster."] How are they fighting for working families? Now I'm going to round out this true account of the Republican support (or lack thereof) for working families with Paid Family Leave. Once again, an issue that deeply impacts working families. From maternity to elderly care, Paid Family Leave would allow working families to avoid the question of "Can I afford to spend more time with my newborn or aging parent?" Democrats introduced a 12 week plan. Hard negotiations with Republicans saw that cut to 4 weeks. Compared to the rest of the world, we are one of only six nations without federally mandated paid family leave. At 4 weeks, we would remain far closer to the bottom than the top. "Of the 174 countries that offer paid leave for a personal health problem, just 26 offer four weeks or fewer, according to data from the World Policy Analysis Center at the University of California, Los Angeles." [[Source]]() And what makes this so wrong for Republicans to oppose, as if it wasn't already bad enough, is that ALL FEDERAL WORKERS already receive 12 weeks of paid parental leave! So are they saying only some people are good enough to receive such a benefit while others are not? As you can see, the working families of America CANNOT RELY ON REPUBLICANS to represent their interests. To represent them in meaningful ways, through legislation, that makes life a little easier, a little better or a little safer. They don't want to see us as one nation where all are treated fairly, represented honestly and respected sincerely. Whether in the Senate, where Patty Murray is working hard for you or the House where I want to be working hard for you; the Republicans are not doing the jobs they were elected to do but are actively fighting efforts that would improve the lives of hard working American families, help feed and clothe children, or protecting the health and safety of Americans by providing and protecting access to affordable health care. | | | | | | I want to represent WA-03 to: Defend your rights as and families. Aim for the , written into law. Protect a with protected reproductive care, written into law. Securing our of facts, good or bad. | | If a friend forwarded you this email, don't miss the next! | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _.

| Hey, I know we’ve been emailing a lot lately, so I’ll keep this as brief as I can.

My team just let me know that our Ad Fund is about to be completely empty.

**Ads are a *vital* component of this campaign.** They allow us to inform voters of both my MAGA opponent’s corruption, and my plans to uplift my community with what I’ve learned as a pastor, educator, and nonprofit leader.

If we don’t have the resources to run our ads, we don’t have the ability to reach voters and get our message out. There’s no other way around it.

But we ran the numbers and if just 10% of the people reading this chipped in $1, we’d be able to fund our crucial digital ads through the end of the year. clean_body: ad fund = completely empty | Hey, I know we’ve been emailing a lot lately, so I’ll keep this as brief as I can. My team just let me know that our Ad Fund is about to be completely empty. Ads are a vital component of this campaign. They allow us to inform voters of both my MAGA opponent’s corruption, and my plans to uplift my community with what I’ve learned as a pastor, educator, and nonprofit leader. If we don’t have the resources to run our ads, we don’t have the ability to reach voters and get our message out. There’s no other way around it. But we ran the numbers and if just 10% of the people reading this chipped in $1, we’d be able to fund our crucial digital ads through the end of the year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Pulling down our ads would severely hinder our fight to flip this seat, but every dollar makes a difference in keeping them up! Enough with go-along-to-get-along Republicans. **Enough** with excuses. **Enough** with playing nice with socialists who hate America. **ENOUGH.** **I’m going to be blunt.** The end of the year is coming up, and I need every last dollar to meet our fundraising goal. But there are liberals who want to take over Georgia—and the rest of our country. That’s why I’m running for Congress. Because the time has come to send a relentless fighter to Washington Enough with the status quo. Enough with go-along-to-get-along Republicans. Enough with excuses. Enough with playing nice with socialists who hate America. ENOUGH. I’m going to be blunt. The end of the year is coming up, and I need every last dollar to meet our fundraising goal. I am running against some people with deep pockets and the only way I can compete is with your help. I know you want to change the status quo in Washington— If everyone who reads this email donates just $10 or more, we will be able to get our message out. Best, Patrick | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2021 Patrick Witt for Congress, All rights reserved.

subject: Time to get tough on crime

body:
Governor Walz is making it easy for criminals [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=e606bf66d20d4748861188fa62834259&_e=tgtin--4InN6s024xo1t3eFcOoBgL7glKR8RLADrmDzjl6OHA1mRlKxtNOQjnkpfuRalg-ruY-X-JHbsVqWl5QjrA0LcLKxQrgnD7mZU3PmkziRi3GwgRbNFBs4u0vPgz_5JJbxSdmQ96qZ4s7nGROUnNBqr5mjue9jG-GiEDSt1JP9WsqyYQNfKUHE9KnK12uXB90S-vlhk-2vocc7bGOHYSqPYXkBck1xY-w0C8PaPE4u6w1cY9fz9Bx3m-MAasrqwiOVXYNJH2GLaCWcv-FYUinyAme7dMahUV7jeFUXRWWNDQFzIXN4PIicRC_p9zOnBoCpsjv2c6EmmicusIA%3D%3D) My friend,
As crime rates skyrocket, **Governor Walz and the Minnesota Sentencing Guidelines Commission are going soft on crime** by shortening the prison sentences for people who commit a crime while on probation or parole. In an environment with an already over-burdened police force, Governor Walz and his failing administration have put our officers and communities at further risk! Dangerous criminals should not be given a get out of jail free card. [**Minnesota Deserves Better Leadership >> Chip In!**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=e606bf66d20d4748861188fa62834259&_e=tgtin--4InN6s024xo1t3eFcOoBgL7glKR8RLADrmDzjl6OHA1mRlKxtNOQjnkpfuRalg-ruY-X-JHbsVqWl5QjrA0LcLKxQrgnD7mZU3PmkziRi3GwgRbNFBs4u0vPgHyN-CRbrGgEcHPmrMj_weLN2q5n7gGvMElHmXOE7wDWnmTaZTdMtRnAM8h2R7Wtq_1lyowBNNIDLszc2pkiPKfFPTJyvj-9M8FJcPyIx53M_UopbAKi6JiJTmk12ppvdHzwH3IWZs5AeWI4TMlAyhHUeabJf5wJ9ly66B2MBAGDo82Ikn9B9OPJI7KxpNo1zmKsrN50fgALLwPExrocKtg%3D%3D) By working to implement this harmful policy, it does nothing but prove to the public that Governor Walz and his administration are tone deaf to our pleas of concern. As Walz continues to fail our state, our local communities, our families, and our justice system, we see further signs of Minnesota needing a change in leadership. I will continue to stand proudly with our police officers and those who work to hold dangerous criminals accountable for their actions. **Minnesotans deserve the right to feel safe in their neighborhoods.** Empowering criminals by loosening accountability is not the answer. I hope you will join me in holding criminals accountable. name: BREAKING POST OFFICE UPDATE (via DCCC)
subject: Louis DeJoy GONE?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you SUPPORT President Biden's move to OUST Louis DeJoy's allies from USPS leadership?
| | | _**MSNBC BREAKING:**_
**President Biden OUSTS key Louis DeJoy ally at the Post Office**
[Let us know: Do you SUPPORT President Biden's moves to oust Louis DeJoy's allies from USPS leadership?](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

We're fired up like never before.

**FIRST:**

We told you that Louis DeJoy -- _Trump 's hand-picked Postmaster General_ \-- is scheming to make mail delivery **PERMANENTLY** slower and more expensive!!

**THEN:**

Senator Amy Klobuchar delivered a **STIRRING** call to defend this vital public service:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

**NOW:**

**President Biden just FIRED one of Louis DeJoy 's top allies at the USPS - _which means we 're one step closer to saying goodbye to this Trump crony once and for all!_**

President Biden and Senator Klobuchar are doing everything they can to SAVE the post office from Republican attacks.

But the fight isn't over yet. And at this pivotal moment, we need to know President Biden and our Democrats have strong support from this grassroots team.

**[So quickly, let us know: Do you SUPPORT President Biden's move to OUST Louis DeJoy's allies from USPS leadership?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

---
[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Do you support President Biden's efforts to save our post office from Louis DeJoy and his cronies?](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thanks,

DCCC

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. name: Team West
subject: One year ago today...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
History cannot repeat itself in 2024. | | **URGENT**

**🚨 🚨 One year ago today, far-right extremists broke into the Oregon state capitol building, smashed windows, assaulted journalists, and battled police to overthrow our democracy and end our fight against the coronavirus. 🚨 🚨**

**_[Today we’re counting on 300 Democracy Defenders to make sure this never happens again. name: Tim Ryan
subject: My kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1428%2E3611125%2ElYE-zm ][IMG]

I'll be straightforward, folks. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6317?t=1007&akid=1428%2E3611125%2ElYE-zm ]I’m asking you to chip in a
few bucks to my campaign before my end-of-year fundraising deadline.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6317?t=1008&akid=1428%2E3611125%2ElYE-zm ]Donate

This campaign means a lot to me. It’s not just about winning this open
Senate seat.

It’s about making sure my kids grow up in a country that gives each of us
a fighting chance at the American dream.

That means making sure their school buildings are soundly built and fully
equipped, and that the teachers in those buildings are well-trained and
well-paid.

It means continuing to provide tuition-free public education after high
school, ensuring that they have the skills to succeed and innovate in a
competitive job market.

And it means making sure that when they put in a hard day’s work, they’re
earning every cent they deserve.

Look, my worst nightmare is my kids growing up and asking me, “You were in
Congress. What the hell did you do?”

I’m running for Senate to create the best future I can for my kids, your
kids, and every kid from every hardworking family in this country.

But Republicans are already flooding this race with millions of dollars,
and I can’t win this seat without your support. So that’s why I’m asking:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6317?t=1009&akid=1428%2E3611125%2ElYE-zm ]will you chip in $5 before this crucial FEC fundraising deadline hits?

Thank you,
Tim

body:

| Dear Fellow American,

This is a very special time of the year...and I want to wish you and all those close to you a very Merry Christmas and holiday season, and a happy and prosperous New Year.

[**I also want to ask you to consider making a special contribution year-end to Judicial Watch.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57441&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)** Contributions are tax-deductible!**

Your support will help us keep:
* Fighting in state and federal courts to protect the **integrity of our elections** ;

* Exposing taxpayer funding of Marxist, racist **Critical Race Theory propaganda** in our schools;

* Leading the courtroom challenges to illegal alien sanctuary policies and other failures to enforce immigration law across the country; and

* Investigating **Biden family****corruption.**

These efforts represent just a small portion of our record number of investigations and lawsuits fighting public corruption and government secrecy.

[**Please help us with your best contribution ...and thank you for all you do for Judicial Watch!**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57441&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President

name: Rep. Demings (personal note)
subject: It's important for me to share my story with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
It's important for me to share this with you. Friend: This is a longer but especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.

I was raised in Jacksonville, FL – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've got to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked hard. And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had faith. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.

That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me: "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.

I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.

Never tire. These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.

Never tire, I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.

This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians. I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.

So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is resources. The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?refcode=jtk1983-fr-text

Thank you for being in this with me. Never tire.

Val Demings
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ibu2rS35CUKF9kop2dIjsg2] , or click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/98c8aed0-9f5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/6f1adc91-cb62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjFhZGM5MS1jYjYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KJYqSdIdQxX5utCHv7fDrwr3QCoqV7tHyl7OTMWBo8=&id=123159867 .
Val Demings for U.S. Senate
P. O. Box 536926
Orlando, FL 32853
United States
Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

subject: Allen West Endorsement for Ed Thelander
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Committee to Elect Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
Endorsement and Video attached | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f98e052e1c12/allen-west-endorsement-for-ed-thelander?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
**Allen West Endorses Ed Thelander**
Ed Thelander met Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) Allen B. West, after a motorcycle accident years ago. Ed was Allen's personal security detail for a year, where they gained mutual respect for each other.

Allen believes in Ed and encourages his desire to continue serving his country out of the uniform, but in Congress.
---
|
---
|
# Watch here: [https://vim](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=ef09616c04&e=f8a0a76a2b)[eo.com/646](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=c34ce7d73f&e=f8a0a76a2b)[289152/6b2183e580](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=061ab36c37&e=f8a0a76a2b)

---
| | | This is "EdThelander.mp4" by Chad Campbell on Vimeo, the home for high quality videos and the people who love them.
vimeo.com
---|---

|
# __**Below is an endorsement from the Lieutenant Colonel:**__

Texas is on the front line of a battle for the future of this great Republic.

The need to meet that challenge is the foundation of my own campaign for Governor here, but there are others who are waging this fight elsewhere in America, too.

Like my friend and fellow warrior – both on the foreign battlefield and here at home a fighter for our constitutional rights, our freedom and our prosperity – Maine Congressional candidate and former U.S. Navy SEAL, Ed Thelander.

Ed is a husband and father, a community leader and volunteer, and a man of faith as well as a 21-year veteran of the SEALs, and, as a former Congressman myself, I know that he has what it takes to be a great leader on Capitol Hill.

Ed has served our nation with honor on and off the field of battle. He is now ready to serve in Congress to take on the pressing challenges facing our beloved country and will always put the citizens of his state first.

My campaign to bring commonsense Texas and America First principles and battle-tested leadership to Austin depends on the difference making support of grassroots conservatives like you – just like Ed Thelander's does in Maine.

[That is why I am calling on you for an immediate 2022 "Frontlines of Freedom" Fundraising Operation that will benefit Ed's campaign.](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=04d12d2e53&e=f8a0a76a2b)

If you make a contribution of $20, $50, $100 or even more right now, Ed will receive valuable resources and you will help ensure he can get his winning message to the voters in 2022.

[Winning the ideological battle for America's future is happening across this nation, and here is your chance to make an impact.](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=6e1e013f60&e=f8a0a76a2b)

_[Thank you, ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=11c061a52c&e=f8a0a76a2b)_

Steadfast and Loyal,

Allen B. West
Lieutenant Colonel (Ret)

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Tell the Senate to take action against gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Americans deserve to feel safe at their schools, malls, movie theaters, places of worship, grocery stores, and workplaces.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39912216/321975378/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211221-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzVmYzM5Yy1hNTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7orx504id3QLFc-h1HX5vUvQeU3fWM8UztZSn2gwrhM=)
---
| As we approach the end of 2021, I am reflecting on the progress we have made this year — and the issues that have yet to be resolved. This year alone, there have been over 600 mass shootings in our nation. We cannot continue to be a country where gun violence is normalized; we need to take real action to stop gun violence now.

It’s simple: Americans deserve to feel safe at their schools, malls, movie theaters, places of worship, grocery stores, and workplaces. Earlier this year, I voted for two bipartisan gun violence prevention bills that would require background checks for all gun sales and transfers, closing the Charleston loophole used by the Mother Emanuel AME Church shooter in 2015.

**Now it’s up to the Senate to pass this bill, and we need to show that there is overwhelming grassroots support pressuring them to act.[_Will you sign my petition to demand the Senate pass gun violence prevention legislation now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39912217/321975379/-569560403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzVmYzM5Yy1hNTYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7orx504id3QLFc-h1HX5vUvQeU3fWM8UztZSn2gwrhM=&emci=c8b6f745-7962-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f75fc39c-a562-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14239920)**

clean_body: Americans deserve to feel safe at their schools, malls, movie theaters, places of worship, grocery stores, and workplaces. | = | As we approach the end of 2021, I am reflecting on the progress we have made this year — and the issues that have yet to be resolved. This year alone, there have been over 600 mass shootings in our nation. We cannot continue to be a country where gun violence is normalized; we need to take real action to stop gun violence now. It’s simple: Americans deserve to feel safe at their schools, malls, movie theaters, places of worship, grocery stores, and workplaces. Earlier this year, I voted for two bipartisan gun violence prevention bills that would require background checks for all gun sales and transfers, closing the Charleston loophole used by the Mother Emanuel AME Church shooter in 2015. Now it’s up to the Senate to pass this bill, and we need to show that there is overwhelming grassroots support pressuring them to act. | As a millennial, this is deeply personal. I was in elementary school when the Columbine shooting occurred. Active shooter drills have become routine for school-aged children, and just this month we observed nine years since the tragedy at Sandy Hook. But it shouldn’t have to be this way. The legislation I supported in the House is just the beginning. name: Christina Davidson
subject: No Jab No Job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Health Freedom Defense Fund
body:
I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing to you today because I think we have something important in common. I think you're a patriot, and I think you know what's at stake. You know that freedoms given away are never given back... | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077364:6Djqm1ETN:m:1:3253819041:7A0CB1D4F14EAC941B11E7926B4EBEB2:r)
---

Peter,

I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing to you today because I think we have something important in common.

I think you're a patriot, and I think you know what's at stake.

You know that freedoms given away are never given back.

And no matter your vaccination status, you know that your medical decisions are between you and your doctor - not you and your government, or you and your boss.

**That's why I'm suing the federal government alongside of 6,000 other federal employees with the help of the Health Freedom Defense Fund and why I hope I can count on your generous support today.**

[**Will you give $25, $50, $100 or more and give us the ammunition we need to win this legal battle?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077364:6Djqm1ETN:m:1:3253819041:7A0CB1D4F14EAC941B11E7926B4EBEB2:r)

My name is Christina Davidson, I'm a paramedic firefighter, and I've worked for the Department of Defense for 14 years.

**_If I did what the government is doing I'd lose my license on the spot._**

I'm not allowed to give my patients medication without their consent, and I'm not allowed to threaten them to take medication.

But that's exactly what's happening to me and thousands of other employees across the country, and that's why we need you on our side.

_Because what starts with us won't end with us._

**If they can do it to me, they can do it to you.**

We're taking on this legal battle because we know if we give up and give in, it's only a matter of time before they come after you, your livelihood and your family the way they came after ours.

We want to stop tyranny in its tracks and codify our medical rights into law once and for all.

[**But we don't stand a chance without you.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077364:6Djqm1ETN:m:1:3253819041:7A0CB1D4F14EAC941B11E7926B4EBEB2:r)

I won't mince words...we've got our work cut out for us.

The government is going to fight us every step of the way.

They've already shown us how far they're willing to go to push these mandates.

They've blatantly defied the courts, and are encouraging private employers to do the same. The President has even told businesses to ignore the courts.

Federal employees lucky enough to get an exemption are required to undergo "reeducation" training.

On top of regular threats, we're told we have no chance of promotion unless we shut up and take it.

And if we're fired, it won't just be a matter of finding a new job.

They're making it so that we'll never be able to find work again.

They want to make us so desperate that we have no choice but to surrender once and for all.

This has nothing to do with health.

**They want to break our wills, break our spirits, and send a loud, clear message that they have control over our lives.**

And if we let them win, there's no turning back.

[**Which is why I hope you'll fight along with me with a generous gift of $25 or more today to help fund lawsuits to fight vaccine mandates and preserve medical freedom.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077364:6Djqm1ETN:m:1:3253819041:7A0CB1D4F14EAC941B11E7926B4EBEB2:r)

**I don't know if you're vaccinated - and I don't want to know.**

It's none of my business.

I want to know if you'll stand up for your countrymen when it matters most.

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,

Christina Davidson
Paramedic & Firefighter
Proud Supporter, Health Freedom Defense Fund

| [ DONATE ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077364:6Djqm1ETN:m:1:3253819041:7A0CB1D4F14EAC941B11E7926B4EBEB2:r)
---

---

| Paid for by Health Freedom Defense Fund
[www.healthfreedomdefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59077365:6Djqm1ETN:m:1:3253819041:7A0CB1D4F14EAC941B11E7926B4EBEB2:r)

---

¡Vamos!

Team Caraveo
| **Dr. Yadira Caraveo** is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress.

In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. Republicans only need to win in FIVE Congressional races to take the majority in the House in November. So we’re not exaggerating when we say electing Dr. Caraveo — who’s endorsed by EMILY’s List and 37 local leaders — could mean the difference between a Republican-controlled House and a Democratic-controlled House. Let’s not forget: if Republicans win the House, we can count on them to spread their dangerous conspiracy theories, threaten our democracy, cater to Big Oil and Big Gas, and attack reproductive rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = ¡Vamos! | | | | Join us as we gather to share in the spirit of Christmas together at our Holiday Fundraiser and Gift Drive!
---

# **Celebrate the Spirit of Christmas & Make a Difference!**
---
---
**Join us Tonight from 6:00-8:30pm for our Christmas Event & Gift Drive!**

We will gather together with Superintendent and Candidate for Governor Marc Thielman and his wife Brenda as important updates on pressing Oregon issues are shared and ways ‘we the people’ can fight to retain our freedoms, alongside inspiring messages you won’t want to miss! Held at Along Came Trudy’s, a festive freedom-loving venue that, like Marc and the Alsea School District, fought to stay open against closure mandates last year and continues to stand strong.

**Tickets are just $45 for a single, or $75 per couple/pair so bring a friend! Tickets will be available for purchase at the door.**

Event tickets include delicious and filling appetizer and dessert buffets, with gluten-free options throughout. A no-host bar will also be available. We are also collecting new and unwrapped toys and basic goods to bring to a local charity during this time of community need.

The event features a variety of hand-picked items in a silent auction as well, perfect for holiday gift shopping as an additional way to support the campaign!

Marc will share in a discussion about his personal and professional background, political leanings, policy concepts and how he has again been successful recently at fighting directly against Governor Brown and radical leftist ideologies.

His presentation will be followed by a live question and answer session where you can ask your direct questions and get direct and honest responses!

clean_body: | | | | Join us as we gather to share in the spirit of Christmas together at our Holiday Fundraiser and Gift Drive! Celebrate the Spirit of Christmas & Make a Difference! Join us Tonight from 6:00-8:30pm for our Christmas Event & Gift Drive! We will gather together with Superintendent and Candidate for Governor Marc Thielman and his wife Brenda as important updates on pressing Oregon issues are shared and ways ‘we the people’ can fight to retain our freedoms, alongside inspiring messages you won’t want to miss! Held at Along Came Trudy’s, a festive freedom-loving venue that, like Marc and the Alsea School District, fought to stay open against closure mandates last year and continues to stand strong. | Tickets are just $45 for a single, or $75 per couple/pair so bring a friend! Tickets will be available for purchase at the door. Event tickets include delicious and filling appetizer and dessert buffets, with gluten-free options throughout. A no-host bar will also be available. We are also collecting new and unwrapped toys and basic goods to bring to a local charity during this time of community need. The event features a variety of hand-picked items in a silent auction as well, perfect for holiday gift shopping as an additional way to support the campaign! Marc will share in a discussion about his personal and professional background, political leanings, policy concepts and how he has again been successful recently at fighting directly against Governor Brown and radical leftist ideologies. His presentation will be followed by a live question and answer session where you can ask your direct questions and get direct and honest responses! | Beautiful Appetizer & Dessert Buffets Merry & Mingle with Superintendent Marc Thielman Hear Important Oregon Updates Followed by Live Q & A Great Gifts available in Silent Auction Learn How You Can Help Fight for Oregon! Hosted at Along Came Trudy’s All Ages GIFT Drive for Oregon Families in Need Tuesday, 12/21/20216:00-8:30 PM Along Came Trudy 1488 18th St Springfield, OR 97477 | | Not able to attend our event and still want to support Marc's campaign?** Please consider making a contribution to help us continue our fight for freedom! If you have not already donated this year, you have a $50 political tax credit you can use per person, or $100 per couple! Plus, Follow @MarcforOregon on to watch the Live Stream, starting at 6:30! | Thank You! | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 949, Bandon, 97411

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1040%2E878179%2EFlVLV2). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1040%2E878179%2EFlVLV2).**

name: Jim Renacci for Governor
subject: DeWine is the Grinch Who Stole Ohio!
body:
Make Ohio Great - Donate or Volunteer Today!
| | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUEFugzAQfI25gfACJhw4pKG5RZVyqHKzwF7AEbapgab8vialPVRarbQz3vHsyJI1hWSBKiEGSgEo0IzFaQQigaIVBxq3GWVpTNJYR3elHZpaCBUJq4O-pPEBMZOFlFJkdSyaIgPKkoL6Kc8aFgxlP8_jRJIjgbOvCcXiMHoo41BuIh7bJcPWurCzn-iMdR5G-xFKFKgbdCQ5L7PmGqVaNEkq1LUaCLANnOziBHrQiIHXehxUu-6U8GOtOuPJ3_PCrXGJ3gFyNfG5R945ZUTPH73l02wH5LZXluNm7kfGmhnN_PNF2FxOXwurr7eN5mZQ0hP_wF5Jf3N1e3s_VfdD4Eo5PtQwqInlPshuc_9McLdbkvyFADy3AJ5hQboeL9c-W8cs9DJhbfTrxsHJ93kd8e_hrhHtmQDJq28vL5dA)

| | Friend,
Christmas is just around the corner! Pretty soon it will be a new year... and hopefully a new governor.
As the Republican primary approaches, never forget that **DeWine is the Grinch who stole Ohio!** His draconian lockdown was nothing but a power grab. He took away our **jobs**.** **
He took away our **schools**.
He took away our **freedom**.
He took away our **safety**.

The Grinch gave back everything that he took. All DeWine gave us was mask mandates, vaccine lotteries, labor shortages, critical race theory, and high crime rates.
---
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUEFugzAQfI25gWABQw8c0tD0FFXKoerNMvYCjrBNDTTl9zUJ7aGStZJndmdnR1a0eZI0UBXEkCQACSQ5jbMIRApPrSiTuM0TmsUki3V0Vdqh4UKoSFgd9BVNKQJPMMtEzuO8iMuElrzleV6kGTZZMFT9PI8TSQ8ETv5NKBaH0U0Zh3IT8dguGbbWhZ39Qmes8zDaz1CiQN2gI-lpmTXTKNWiSVqj5mogQDdwsosT6EEjBsb1OKh23Snhv1x1xpO_54VbYRK9A2RqYnOPrHPKiJ7desum2Q7IbK8sw83cQ8aaGc38WBG6S4PX7_PrufE0M4OSnvgH9kr6m-uPt_djfS0DV8nxpoZBTbTwQXab-3uCu92KFM8E4D4FcA8LsvVwvvT5Ouahlwm50S8bB0df53XEv8ZdI9ozAVLUP3EblvI)
---
| | The Grinch changed his ways and his heart grew bigger. The only thing that grew bigger under **DeWine was corruption**. Thanks to his leadership, we’re number one in the nation!

Ohioans have had enough! It’s time we send this Grinch packing and put Ohio first.

Help us end 2021 in a BIG way and consider donating to my campaign today. Together, we can make this one of the last Christmas’ that **DeWine the Grinch** is governor!
---
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUEFugzAQfI25gWDBJjlwSEJzqFS16qHqzQJ7wY6wTQ00ze9rUtpDJWslz-zOzo6sWLuXLNIVpJBlABlklKVFAiKHfSd2WdrRjBUpKVKTXLTxaBshdCKciVTFoG2zfVFQmXcUyhIkbWgGbZO3FBvWRUOl5nmcSH4gcA5vQrF4TK7aepSrSMA2ybhzPu7dJ3rrfIDRfcQSBZoWPcnPy2y4QakXQ_IaTaMHAmwFJ7d4gQG0YuCNGQfd3TZKhG-jexvI3_PitXCJwQFyPfFZIe-9tkLxq3J8mt2A3CntOK7mfmScndHOPyvixy-2m7rp-EIDze2gZSD-gUrLcHP9_vx2qi-7yFdyvOph0BMrQ5D96v6e4Ga3IuWRANynAO5hQXE7PL0qehtpHGTixpqHlYNTqPNtxL_GTSPZMgFS1t96OpZ0)

| | I know times have been hard ever since DeWine’s tyrannical lockdowns. So, if now isn’t a good time to donate, would you consider volunteering? Team Renacci is growing, and with patriots like you, we can make Ohio Great Again.
---
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUMtugzAQ_BpzA9kLGDhwSENzqyr1UKUni9gmduQHAkeIv69JaKVWslb2zO54dkRLL42giW4BAyEABEhJcZEBz6EZeE3wUBJaYFRgm920naTrOdcZ9zZRbV6RgpOmkjUm9UAwralocCHijfacXhLTqhDGGeUHBKd4_ipEgHsXeh5QfroHy6wU-m5R3knba4OAbuDs7xOXEXTcsN6ORg_rTvH47PXVRfLHf7oVJuSinWR6ZkFJdp2044otyrM5eCOZV9ozuRl4ykQT0oXnF-lFlLfFnr9yGmnmjBaR-AcqLeJS3fn989jd6mRqxbhoY_RMq5jUdXP_iGi326LqBQE8pgAeaUCxHt4-VLmOZRpl0t7Z142DY6xhHeVv466R7ZkAqrpvlsuKkw)

Jim Renacci

We’re so proud of everything we’ve accomplished this year, and our grassroots supporters are a HUGE part of that! **That’s why we really want you to join us.**
Odessa will be joined by special guests, including Justice Democrats Executive Director Alex Rojas, who will talk about why we urgently need to send more progressives to Congress. She is really excited to get to meet folks from all over who are with us in this campaign to shake up the status quo here in Nashville.
[**So, if you can, please join us tomorrow night and celebrate everything our campaign has accomplished in 2021.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yiuiVTotr4el1_MWcJ1UnD2mxKXD7IKcopKoUwqaWqsU4E9v1CG6V08NHtyH20lVxQ4Yn9HVO-797E7NiBf0pC893lw6V75ZcvRgI_OzC_mnS507Z_W8oxWeJITE8tQRQHP0Mnfyf-zVDrc_QiMWTFUnldnEwjEnGIC-VniCG9-GHNxYlUx0YgYzK72mXGaPnC4KhNenYNQhs8CsF4konscE-slmPP1wcgRSVsnERSlQ8yeWAI_tKDtmZvJhrWNABa20qfzgPTA0ur8F0jHIWT5sq42vlNaYVvEvOCs_jrzXXww-6wY2dgS4QIL_CT2J6IUeFSujApsiirIGBTNFyOUPIgVEqmJiTEB5yhJX71Cw/3i1/SlKO1yP3RQ-sW1Vc5vfG6w/h3/4Y_CdgCgDLU3efpqqKQ-zTRFmGHXPI7MFfj_0SIzqHs)

clean_body: One last chance to RSVP and meet Odessa | | | Hey Peter, I wanted to reach out with one more reminder about our end-of-year celebration with Odessa tomorrow evening. Have you been waiting for an Odessa-MC’d event with some special guests? Well look no further than tomorrow night. | Zoom Wednesday, December 22nd 7:00 pm CT/ 8:00 pm ET We’re so proud of everything we’ve accomplished this year, and our grassroots supporters are a HUGE part of that! That’s why we really want you to join us. Odessa will be joined by special guests, including Justice Democrats Executive Director Alex Rojas, who will talk about why we urgently need to send more progressives to Congress. She is really excited to get to meet folks from all over who are with us in this campaign to shake up the status quo here in Nashville. We’d love to see you there! Aarica Finance Director, Odessa Kelly for Congress To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

| | Dear Friend, With Amanda Makki, you don’t have to _hope_ she’ll be a reliable conservative in Congress. She’s proven it over and over again! body:
Imagine for a moment that a magic genie came down from the sky and said...
#

$3.
Imagine for a moment that a magic genie came down from the sky and said that for just $3 you could have the power to flip North Carolina’s Senate seat and elect Cheri Beasley.
It’d be amazing, wouldn’t it?
You’d give it immediately, right?
Probably the easiest and best $3 you’d ever spend.
Well, it’s true. You have that power.
Because as you read this, someone else gave their $3. And by the time you are done reading this, someone else will have chipped in their $3.
Now they are all hoping YOU will do the same.
That’s how the magic happens — when thousands and thousands of people come together for a cause larger than themselves. In this case, it’s to elect Cheri Beasley and flip this seat.
So please:

| | Dear ,

**It’s time for new statewide leadership that cares about Texans.**

I’m Joe Jaworski and I’m here to help you do something about it. Our campaign has a winning strategy to beat Ken Paxton in November 2022, but we need your help to get there.

[**Check out the video below to see some of our latest stops on the Jaworski 2021 Tour and donate to help us keep some gas in the tank.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=732f77e7c1&e=5d8d80652b) [](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=4beb0f0df3&e=5d8d80652b)
It’s time we had an Attorney General that worked for the people — not special interests.

[**Donate today and help me stand up for all Texans.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=bb50c1e5c1&e=5d8d80652b)

subject: Protect Devin Nunes' seat!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SAVECALIFORNIANOW and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We can't allow Democrats to flip Devin Nunes' seat and increase their majority, thus making it harder for us to win back the House next year. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=89f52764514c4273929cb7aa835ee7fb&_e=wV4T9kP2L3icBH4POmhmoGADe25GfXlYHThzDPWHQ73NE6gaNhUpcfNh4Rq3HLHPhlyXnZUvjell5gWMTDCLZntMgn_ypuJGNC5pp4cVa2puSiPI--UY-IOpvJw6ItlFlfohwVovqRdv_vU-7pA7-_ZSoUJ_6xHuntWD6webEAtTHmLR4AhWaZpzxkgk75zpN5YK16Cw9cbjBABCdOkoMBTArCS1wq5r-1ap9dghCipKEQ772BLolXrCZ9LbEDMmEoBtIzHhFJ4SImyDHMndouO17qaSmoUweaTHcswPfsVr2MN0cL_Ql3vJtj69GdUiMgkKgZe2B_xN8pSuB68lQW6pCkx5zX9z078JlNg3GlxD1y0U7fmYpD2M9ySS0rTMwqnTnUptABQ_g9SCjNXpFayVOnuqzhQ6u1p4iQ_7SsUBOc6tsPKfSpcg53LOXZGAlbysjWnCVpRVlPlhQXnvC33jSlhhMZ-TcYkPqnoVOyI%3D)

---
Peter,

Now that Congressman **Devin Nunes** has announced his retirement, Democrats are scrambling to take over his open seat in California's 22nd District in what will be a special election early next year.

Democrats know that redistricting will make this seat more competitive for the midterms, so if they secure a Democrat incumbent through a special election going into the General, they will have an advantage.

clean_body: I need your help if we want any chance at winning this race and helping Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority in 2022. I need your help if we want any chance at winning this race and helping Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority in 2022. | Peter - here's some polling that came out earlier this year: GEORGIA SENATE RACE Warnock 48% - Walker 46% On one hand, this is amazing news! We're virtually tied with the Democrat incumbent even though I've never run for political office before. It's incredible that this race would be so close out of the starting gate! On the other hand, this is also alarming news because national Democrats see how tight the race is and are desperately re-doubling their efforts to attack our campaign and prevent us from pulling ahead. The 4th quarter is the first full fundraising quarter we've had since entering this race, so we need to show strength on our year-end fundraising report. Our finance team has told me we need 338 more donors to give to our campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT to give us the boost we need on our critical Federal Election Commission report. Republicans MUST WIN BACK the Senate majority this election. Everything is on the line: our military, our economy, the security of our streets and border, and the very fabric of our nation. I got off the sidelines and jumped into this senate race because we cannot afford to fall short. This race is neck and neck, but we can gain critical momentum Please stand with me. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Team Booker
subject: This secretive billionaire has funded Rand Paul for years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Last week, news broke that an infamous billionaire, Jeff Yass, is funding
a dark money super PAC to attack our campaign and protect Rand Paul’s
seat.

Make no mistake. Big money donors like Jeff Yass are the reason why Rand
Paul has been able to get away with neglecting Kentuckians and staying in
office.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14107?refcode=em20211221-1357&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1357%2E346206%2EmAZwT4 ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14107?refcode=em20211221-1357&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1357%2E346206%2EmAZwT4 ][IMG]

It’s going to be an uphill battle — but if we work together we have the
power to end this chapter of politics in Kentucky.

Let’s show Rand Paul and Jeff Yass that we’re ready to fight: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14107?refcode=em20211221-1357&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1357%2E346206%2EmAZwT4 ]Will you
chip in $5 or anything you can to our people-powered
campaign today? There’s a historic movement rising up in Kentucky to
replace Rand Paul and we’re not letting 1 billionaire stand in our way.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14107?refcode=em20211221-1357&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1357%2E346206%2EmAZwT4 ]Contribute $5

Since day one, we’ve made it clear that this campaign is built by the
people, for the people.

That’s why we’re proud to share that our average online donation is
$23.70. That might not seem like a lot, but there’s a lot of power in that
number.

This number represents the grassroots movement we’re building right here
in Kentucky: teachers, fast food workers, coal miners, nurses, students,
and believers in change are coming together and chipping in whatever they
can to help defeat Rand Paul and elect Charles.

That’s powerful. If we keep fighting like this, putting our $23.70
donations together — we’re confident we can finally hold Rand Paul
accountable for his corruption and lies — and replace him with a leader
who will actually fight for US.

Especially now that it’s confirmed that billionaire Jeff Yass is backing
Rand Paul again through a dark super PAC — it’s critical we raise a record
amount of grassroots donations so we can compete and continue growing our
movement.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14107?refcode=em20211221-1357&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1357%2E346206%2EmAZwT4 ]Every dollar counts now that Rand Paul is building his war chest of
dark money to drown out our people-first movement. Will you give $23.70
(our average donation) or anything you can afford today to power our
campaign’s organizing work and prepare for every attack this super PAC is
planning this election?

Let’s fight back,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211221-1357-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1357_346206_mAZwT4&akid=1357%2E346206%2EmAZwT4

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1357%2E346206%2EmAZwT4

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

**GEORGIA SENATE RACE
Warnock 48% - Walker 46%**
**On one hand, this is amazing news!** We're virtually tied with the Democrat incumbent even though I've never run for political office before. It's incredible that this race would be so close out of the starting gate!

**On the other hand, this is also alarming news** because national Democrats see how tight the race is and are desperately re-doubling their efforts to attack our campaign and prevent us from pulling ahead.

**[We need your help, Fellow Conservative, so we can pick up the momentum, win this race, and help Republicans win back the Senate majority.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=51a238d206404aad935915ef80a0fa8f&_e=FZdO5SJmdnLKVLO8u0o3OMxQ36SeZGF1kSz9t5T9mAJYtosBga_xZF_3SkOxhjfTYYIxjP0PtSNEGlfnRyTJbwxQiKP46qIjVI_rMFf9LFEldkVm37hWcMW0ndMAqR-8FvQRvr5bRychIeK_rmpCo-7osAbWKNQrcizqkO1hEtMY2NNOYcnzkgXO0jnnUm94tWsAgy2sPCVk_Dvlnu4zX_IzWLvjKYIhtpC5xz62qH3AJGi34YRXsWrHs-rvLMrEF9uSqbkELKZlKr4hFYrWmV3EVbJqljQJd7r8PF7R_9XexKNMg8dQ1h53NatB-G3zEKlStNw6vU9ckjTy-4qFgI8Z7QMurJwnM7JNzX7J2PfGm3OhCfj29WPRUp4zKuBO_n3uaKDwd_T_pk25ueG5TFcJnIPHG-zugWMDrmqMYF8CIuv_-qirTjHVfOMMUkdZdwCr9qOXWxKcx-26-CpQLg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: I need your help if we want any chance at winning this race and helping Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority in 2022. I need your help if we want any chance at winning this race and helping Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority in 2022. | Fellow Conservative - here's some polling that came out earlier this year: GEORGIA SENATE RACE Warnock 48% - Walker 46% On one hand, this is amazing news! We're virtually tied with the Democrat incumbent even though I've never run for political office before. It's incredible that this race would be so close out of the starting gate! On the other hand, this is also alarming news because national Democrats see how tight the race is and are desperately re-doubling their efforts to attack our campaign and prevent us from pulling ahead. The 4th quarter is the first full fundraising quarter we've had since entering this race, so we need to show strength on our year-end fundraising report. Our finance team has told me we need 338 more donors to give to our campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT to give us the boost we need on our critical Federal Election Commission report. Republicans MUST WIN BACK the Senate majority this election. Everything is on the line: our military, our economy, the security of our streets and border, and the very fabric of our nation. I got off the sidelines and jumped into this senate race because we cannot afford to fall short. This race is neck and neck, but we can gain critical momentum Please stand with me. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Friend,

With the holiday season in full swing, here's a quick update on where things stand with our campaign. It's important to me that you're kept in the loop.

We're traveling the state -- meeting with community organizations, labor unions, farmers, small business owners, and anyone who believes Iowa deserves better leadership.

I know we have what it takes to win this. I can tell you from six years in the legislature, that there's no future for our state if we don't work to win now. That's why we're laying the groundwork for next year's election right now, as early as possible.

**Running a campaign that touches every corner of our state takes time and money. We're investing everything we've got into this race, but we need to make up a gap in our fundraising numbers before we're due to report at the end of the month.**

[**Can you please take a look at where we've been this past month in the photos below, then consider chipping in $3 to our end-of-year goal? Hi friend,

Sometimes it feels like this year just started, yet here we are at the end of it already. That also means we’re at the end of the fundraising quarter, and we’re determined to finish the year off strong.

By helping us reach this fundraising goal, you’re helping us go into the New Year in the best way possible. This isn’t about just starting another week or month off with momentum – **it’s kicking off our critical election year.**

Powering through,
-Team Chelsea

| | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure.

body:
Join the team and help get Kevin Dellicker elected! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevindellickerforcongress/introducing-kevin-15240724?e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, You've heard from Kevin about why he's running and where he stands on the issues. If you agree with Kevin that strong families, good jobs, and safe communities are the path to keeping America free, I want to invite you to join our team! Kevin believes that the problem in Washington is that too many of our politicians no longer represent us. So from Day 1, he has made this campaign about you. You know what our communities need and so [we want you a part of this campaign](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=4bc7bd4dd4&e=1090c5c412)!

Whether you can collect signatures to get Kevin on the ballot or host a meet-and-greet to introduce Kevin to your community or assist with a fundraiser, we can't do this without you!

If you're ready to join Team Kevin, please fill out our [volunteer form](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=3ba32abc7b&e=1090c5c412) and someone on our team will be in touch! As always, thank you for supporting Kevin! Best, Linda Swankoski Campaign Coordinator
---
